one day emily was in her backyard when she saw a swamp she had never seen a swamp before and she was very excited she looked out over the swamp and it was so lively the sun was shining and she could see butterflies whizzing through the air emily wanted to get a closer look so she decided to go stand in it she hopped and skipped over to the edge of the swamp when she got there she heard a voice it said you can stand in here if you want but be careful the ground is wet and it can get slippery emily remembered the voices words and slowly stepped into the swamp it felt strange standing in the swamp she stood there taking in all the sights the swamp was alive with the chirping of birds and the buzzing of bees she felt free and happy as she explored when it was time to go home emily slowly stepped out of the swamp and thanked the voice for its warning she smiled understanding that the swamp is a safe and lively place
one day two friends rose and mia were playing in the park mia said i have an idea lets make a jug rose thought it was a great idea and said that sounds fun what should it look like mia said we can design it together lets make it black and put a handle on each side rose and mia gathered some black rocks and sticks and then they worked together to build a jug they measured each side carefully and put the handle on the sides rose said it looks great now we should fill it up with water they filled it up with water and then they sang songs while they drank from the jug they shared the jug with the other children in the park and then they all laughed together rose said this was a really good idea mia im glad we designed the jug together mia smiled and said me too lets design something else together soon
once upon a time there was a little girl called rosie she was very enthusiastic and loved to explore outdoors one day when rosie was walking in the park she saw a squirrel it was holding something in its mouth she was excited and asked the squirrel what it was doing the squirrel said im sorting these nuts i want to make sure i have enough for the winter rosie was so enthusiastic about the squirrels sorting that she decided to help she took some of the nuts from the squirrel and started to sort them into piles the squirrel was very happy with rosies help and thanked her rosie was delighted to have made the squirrel happy and they both continued sorting the nuts together the end
lily and ben were playing in the park they liked to run and jump and slide they saw a big dog with pale fur and a long tail the dog was barking and running around it looked wild and scary look ben a wild dog lily said it is very pale maybe it is sick lets move away lily ben said it might bite us come on follow me they moved away from the dog and ran to the swings they swung high and low and felt happy they forgot about the dog but the dog did not forget about them it followed them to the swings it wanted to play with them it wagged its tail and jumped up and down hi kids do you want to play with me the dog said i am not wild i am friendly and i am not sick i am just pale my name is snowy lily and ben stopped swinging they looked at the dog it did not look scary anymore it looked cute and nice hi snowy lily said you can play with us we like dogs but you scared us before why did you bark so loud i was lonely snowy said i ran away from my home i wanted to find new friends but no one wanted to play with me they all ran away from me you are the first ones who did not run away lily and ben felt sorry for snowy they got off the swings and petted him he licked their faces and wagged his tail he was happy you can be our friend snowy ben said but you should not run away from your home your family must miss you they must be looking for you snowy nodded he remembered his family he loved them he wanted to go back to them but he did not know how can you help me find my home snowy asked i dont know where it is i got lost lily and ben nodded they wanted to help snowy they looked at his collar it had a tag with his name and a phone number lets call this number lily ben said maybe it is your familys number maybe they can come and get you they found a phone near the park they called the number a woman answered she sounded worried hello who is this she asked hi we are lily and ben lily said we found your dog snowy he is with us in the park he ran away from his home he wants to go back to you the woman gasped she sounded happy oh thank you thank you thank you she said you are very kind we have been looking for snowy all day we love him so much we are coming to the park right now please stay with him until we get there lily and ben smiled they stayed with snowy until his family came they hugged him and thanked him for playing with them they said goodbye to him and his family they waved to them as they drove away lily and ben felt good they had made a new friend and helped him find his home they had a fun and exciting day they went back to their own home and told their mom and dad about their adventure they were happy
once upon a time there was a mommy and a daddy they had a new infant the infant was so little and cute the mommy and daddy loved the infant so much one day the mommy and daddy took the infant for a walk they went to the park the park was big and had lots of trees the sky was dull and gray the mommy said lets go on the swings the daddy said okay but we have to be careful with the infant the mommy sat on the swing and held the infant the daddy pushed them gently the infant giggled and said wee go higher the mommy and daddy smiled and went higher the infant loved the swings after a while they stopped and went home the infant was tired and went to sleep the mommy and daddy were happy they had a fun day at the park
anna and ben like to play with their new toys they have a big box of blocks a soft doll and a shiny car they make a house with the blocks and put the doll and the car inside they are happy but then they see a candle on the table it has a bright flame that makes them curious they want to touch it but mom says no she says it is hot and can burn she says they have to be careful anna and ben do not listen they wait until mom goes to the kitchen and then they sneak to the table they take the candle and bring it to their house they think it will make their house look pretty but they are wrong the candle is too close to the sheet that covers their house the sheet catches fire and starts to burn it makes a lot of smoke and noise anna and ben are scared they drop the candle and run away mom hears the fire and comes back she sees the burning sheet and the candle she is angry and sad she puts out the fire with water and throws away the sheet she scolds anna and ben for being naughty and dangerous she says they could have hurt themselves and the house she says they have to say sorry and go to bed anna and ben feel bad they say sorry to mom and hug her they say they will not play with fire again they go to bed and cuddle with their doll and car they hope mom will forgive them and love them they hope their house will be new again
once upon a time there was a big box inside the box was a shiny button every day the button would beep and move the button wanted to be complete just like everyone else one day the careless box lid wasnt shut properly the button fell out and rolled away it rolled into a big puddle and the button wasnt happy if it got wet it wouldnt work again but then something amazing happened a kind bird flew down and carefully picked up the button with his beak the bird flew it up to the top of a tall tree he set it down on a branch and the button was safe again the button was so pleased now it could stay in the tree and be complete the button had a new happy home in the tall tree and it beeped and moved all day just like before the end
lily and ben were twins who liked to go on walks with their mom and dad they saw many things on their walks like trees flowers birds and bugs sometimes they saw unusual things like a big rock with a face or a pond with shiny fish one day they went to a new place for their walk it was a big hill with many colors there were red yellow green and blue patches on the hill lily and ben wondered what they were mom what are those colors lily asked they are plants sweetie they grow on the hill and make it look pretty mom said can we touch them ben asked no honey they are very delicate and we dont want to hurt them we can look at them from here and enjoy the landscape dad said lily and ben nodded and looked at the colorful hill they thought it was very beautiful and unusual they wanted to see more of it they walked along the path that went around the hill they saw more plants and animals they saw a rabbit a bird a butterfly and a lizard they were happy and curious but then they saw something that made them stop and gasp it was a big hole in the hill it was dark and deep and scary lily and ben wondered what was inside mom what is that lily asked dad can we go there ben asked mom and dad looked at each other and smiled they had a surprise for lily and ben that my dears is a cave and we are going to explore it mom said a cave what is a cave lily asked a cave is a place under the ground where you can find many interesting things like rocks crystals water and maybe even bats dad said bats what are bats ben asked bats are animals that fly at night they are not scary they are amazing they use sound to find their way in the dark mom said lily and ben were excited and nervous they wanted to see the cave and the bats but they also felt a little afraid they held their moms and dads hands and followed them to the hole they put on helmets with lights and went inside they saw a new and unusual landscape they saw walls and ceilings with shapes and colors they saw drops of water and pools of water they heard noises and echoes and they saw bats lots of bats they were hanging from the ceiling sleeping some of them woke up and flew around they made squeaky sounds and flapped their wings lily and ben were amazed and happy they had never seen anything like this before they wondered what else they could find in the cave they explored the cave with their mom and dad they learned many things and had fun they saw more plants rocks crystals and animals they saw a spider a frog a snail and a snake they spent a long time in the cave they felt like they were in a different world they forgot about the hill and the colors but then they remembered they wanted to see the hill and the colors again they wanted to see the sun and the sky they said goodbye to the cave and the bats they thanked them for letting them visit they went back to the hole and climbed out they saw the hill and the colors again they saw the sun and the sky they felt warm and bright they smiled and hugged their mom and dad they thanked them for taking them to the cave they said it was the best walk ever they walked back to their car and drove home they talked about the cave and the hill they wondered what they would see on their next walk they were happy and curious
anna and ben are friends they like to play at the beach they make sand castles and look for shells they have fun one day they see a big boat on the water it is white and shiny it has flags and windows it looks fancy anna and ben want to see it closer they find a big rock near the water they climb on it they lean over the edge they try to see the boat they wave and shout they hope the boat will see them but the rock is slippery anna and ben lose their balance they fall into the water they splash and scream they are wet and scared a man on the boat sees them he throws a rope to them he pulls them up he wraps them in towels he is kind and friendly he tells them his name is sam he is the captain of the boat he shows them around the boat he lets them touch the flags and the windows he gives them cookies and juice he tells them stories about the sea they have fun anna and ben are happy they thank sam for saving them and showing them his fancy boat they say goodbye they go back to the beach they are still wet but they are not scared they are brave they are friends
once upon a time there was a pretty animal it had soft furry fur and bright shining eyes every day it would lie down in the sunshine and nap one day the animal was lying in the grass snuggled up in its favorite spot suddenly it heard a noise it was a growling sound the animal was scared it looked around to try to find the source of the noise but there was nothing there the animal was so frightened that it ran away looking for a safe place to hide it ran and ran until it came to a small cave the animal ran into the cave and it felt safer there then it heard the growling again this time the animal was brave enough to peek outside the cave to its surprise it saw a very large animal with huge teeth the big animal was growling the pretty animal was very scared but it didnt run away the big animal slowly moved closer and closer but eventually it stopped and settled down the pretty animal slowly moved out of the cave and realized that the big animal was not mean or scary in fact the big animal was just looking for someone to play with the pretty animal and the big animal had a lot of fun playing together that day from then on they were the best of friends the pretty animal had learned that not all animals are mean or scary
once upon a time there was a heavy truck the truck belonged to a man called ben one day the truck stopped working so ben took it to a mechanic when ben arrived at the mechanics shop the mechanic told him that the truck had frozen he said it needed fixing before ben could drive it away ben asked the mechanic can you fix it the mechanic looked at the truck and said yes i will fix it but it will take me some time so ben left the truck at the mechanics shop and came back a few days later when he arrived the mechanic said it is fixed you can drive your truck away now ben was so happy he drove the truck home and it never froze again

once upon a time there was a little mouse named max max loved to eat cheese one day max saw a big piece of cheese on the table it looked so tasty max ran to the cheese and took a bite but then he heard a loud noise it was the cat max was scared and didnt know what to do hey little mouse said the cat thats my cheese give it back max didnt want to give up the tasty cheese but he didnt want to get eaten by the cat either so he had an idea max bowed his head and said please mr cat can i have just a little bit of cheese its so tasty the cat thought for a moment and then said okay little mouse you can have a small piece but dont take too much or ill have to eat you max was happy to have a little bit of cheese and the cat was happy to share from that day on max and the cat became friends and shared the cheese together the end
anna liked to play dress up with her moms clothes she would put on a big hat a big coat and big shoes then she would stand in front of the mirror and pretend to be a grown up she would say things like hello i am anna and i have a very important job or i am going to a fancy party with my friends she had a lot of fun one day she found a big necklace in her moms drawer it was shiny and colorful and had many beads anna thought it was the most beautiful thing she ever saw she wanted to wear it and show it to the mirror she put it around her neck and ran to the mirror but she did not see that the necklace was too long and got tangled in her feet as she reached the mirror she tripped and fell the necklace broke and the beads scattered all over the floor anna was scared and sad she started to cry she thought her mom would be angry and not love her anymore she heard her mom coming up the stairs she tried to hide under the bed but it was too late her mom saw the mess and the broken necklace she came to anna and hugged her she said dont cry my sweetie im not angry im sorry you got hurt it was an accident i can fix the necklace i love you very much anna felt better she hugged her mom back and said i love you too mom im sorry i broke your necklace i wanted to be like you you are so pretty and smart and nice her mom smiled and said you are pretty and smart and nice too anna you dont need to wear my clothes or my necklace to be like me you are perfect just the way you are she kissed anna and helped her clean up the floor then they played dress up together with some other clothes and accessories that were not so big or fragile they had a lot of fun
tom and sam are friends they like to play with cars and balls one day tom has a letter in his hand he says to sam look i have a letter from my grandma she lives far away she sends me stickers and candy sam says wow that is nice can i see your letter he reaches for the letter but tom pulls it away he says no it is mine you cannot have it go away sam feels sad and angry he wants to see the letter too he thinks tom is not a good friend he says fine i do not want to play with you you are mean he runs away and bumps into a tree he falls down and hurts his knee he cries out loud tom hears sam crying he feels sorry for him he remembers that sam is his friend he runs to him and says are you okay sam i am sorry i was mean you can see my letter if you want here take it sam stops crying he looks at the letter he sees the stickers and the candy he smiles and says thank you tom you are a good friend i am sorry i ran away can i share the candy with you tom nods and says yes of course let us share the candy and the stickers and let us play with the cars and the balls we can have fun together they hug and make up they eat the candy and stick the stickers on their cars and balls they play and laugh they are happy they have a letter a hurt knee and a friendship
once upon a time there was a fish named nemo nemo loved to swim in the ocean and explore new places one day nemo saw a nice rock in the distance he wanted to see it up close so he swam as fast as he could when he got there he saw a big turtle the turtle said hello and asked nemo if he wanted to dive with him nemo was scared at first but then he remembered that he loved to dive so he said yes and they both dove into the deep blue sea they saw many beautiful fish and even found a treasure chest nemo was so happy that he made a new friend and had a fun adventure the end
lily and ben were friends who liked to play by the river one day they saw a big raft made of wood and rope it looked like fun so they climbed on it and pushed it into the water look we are on a boat lily said we can go anywhere we want lets go to the other side ben said maybe we can find something fancy there they paddled with their hands and feet but the raft was heavy and slow the river was fast and strong it carried them away from the shore where their parents were waiting help help lily and ben shouted we are lost a man who was fishing heard their cries he had a small boat with a motor he quickly came to their rescue and pulled them on board are you okay kids he asked what were you doing on that raft we wanted to have fun and see something fancy lily said well you were very foolish and dangerous the man said that raft is not safe for children it could have broken or flipped over the river is not a place to play you could have drowned or hit by rocks we are sorry sir ben said we didnt know we were just curious the man took them back to the shore where their parents hugged them and scolded them they thanked the man for saving them and apologized for their mistake the man smiled and said its okay kids im glad you are safe but next time dont go on the river without an adult and if you want to learn something fancy why dont you ask your parents to teach you they know a lot of things that you dont lily and ben nodded and agreed they learned their lesson and never went on the raft again they asked their parents to teach them many things like how to read how to draw and how to sing they realized that learning was more fun and rewarding than playing on a dangerous raft

with her brother her brother did not like to paint he liked to play with cars and balls and make noise one day lily found a door in the hallway she opened the door and saw stairs she climbed the be hungry her mother said im sorry mommy i did not know i just wanted to paint i did not have space in my room and my brother did not let me paint he was noisy and mean lily said her mother hugged her and said i understand lily you have a wonderful talent and you should paint but you should also be careful and listen to me and you should be kind to your brother he may not like to paint but he is real sun and sky and field lily liked the idea she said thank you mommy you are right i will be careful and listen to you and i will be kind to my brother and i will paint in the backyard can we go now her mother nodded and said yes we can go now but first lets clean up the attic and have some lunch and then you can paint as much as you want lily smiled and said ok mommy i love you her mother smiled and said i love you too lily the moral value of the story is be careful and listen to your parents be kind to your siblings follow your passion and creativity

once upon a time in a hot desert there lived a little cactus the cactus was good and loved to make friends every day the sun would rise and the cactus would say hello to all the animals that passed by one day a small bird came to the cactus the bird said hello cactus can i sit on you the cactus was happy and said yes bird you can sit on me but be careful of my prickles the bird was careful and sat on the cactus they became good friends as the sun rose each day the bird would come and sit on the cactus they would talk and laugh together the cactus and the bird were very happy and they lived happily ever after

lily and ben were friends they liked to play in the park one day they saw a big nest in a tree they wanted to see what was inside lets climb the tree and look at the nest said ben ok but be careful said lily they climbed the tree and reached the nest they saw four blue eggs inside they were very pretty wow look at the eggs said ben i wonder what kind of birds they are maybe they are robins or bluebirds or jays said lily can i touch one asked ben no dont touch them said lily you might break them or make the mother bird angry but ben did not listen he reached out his hand and touched one of the eggs he felt it was warm and smooth he wanted to hold it he tried to pick up the egg but it was slippery he dropped it the egg fell to the ground and broke they heard a loud crack oh no said lily you broke the egg ben felt bad he looked at the broken egg he saw a baby bird inside it was wet and still it did not move or make a sound im sorry im sorry said ben i didnt mean to break it but it was too late the egg was broken and the baby bird was gone they heard a loud squawk they looked up and saw the mother bird she was big and angry she had sharp claws and a long beak she saw them and flew towards them run said lily shes coming they jumped down from the tree and ran away the mother bird chased them she pecked at their heads and scratched their backs they cried and screamed they ran to the gate of the park and got out the mother bird stopped at the gate and glared at them she made a loud noise and flew back to her nest lily and ben were hurt and scared they had blood and feathers on their clothes they felt sorry for the broken egg and the baby bird they wished they had not climbed the tree and touched the nest they learned a hard lesson they should have been brave and left the eggs alone they should have respected the mother bird and her nest they should have listened to lily
jack was a brave 3 year old boy who liked to explore one day while he was playing outside he saw an old door he had never seen it before he walked slowly towards it because he was curious he grabbed the handle and tried to open it it was locked jack tried harder and harder but could not unlock it just then jack saw a key on the ground it was old and rough he picked it up and put it in the door he turned it and the door unlocked inside he saw something very special it was a big dinosaur jack was so excited he petted it and the dinosaur snuggled up close jack smiled and they were best friends ever since

tom and lily were twins who liked to play outside one day they saw a well in the woods they ran to the well and looked inside they saw some shiny coins at the bottom of the well wow look at the coins tom said lets get them he tried to reach for the coins but he was too short he asked lily to help him lily was scared of the well but she wanted to make tom happy she held his hand and leaned over the well with him but then something bad happened tom and lily lost their balance and fell into the well they screamed for help but no one heard them they were wet and cold and scared they wished they had not been greedy for the coins they wished they had listened to their mom who told them not to go near the well they wished they had played with their toys instead after a long time a man appeared near the well he heard their cries and looked inside he saw tom and lily and threw them a rope he pulled them out of the well and took them home tom and lily were very sorry for what they had done they hugged their mom and thanked the man they learned a good lesson they learned that being greedy is bad and being safe is good they learned to be happy with what they have and not to want what they dont need they learned to be good twins

boring tom said lets go back sue said but when they turned around they saw that the hole was gone it was covered by a big stone that fell from the ceiling they were trapped in the chamber they were naughty and curious then they heard a sound it was a voice it was coming from a small window in the wall hello hello are you there the voice said it was their friend ben he had seen them go in the hole and followed them he had seen the stone fall and blocked the hole he had looked for another way to get to them he had found the window ben ben we are here we are here tom and sue said dont worry i will help you ben said he ran to get a rope and a flashlight he came back and threw the rope through the window he told tom and sue to tie it around their waists he pulled them out one by one he and said you are welcome i am glad you are safe you are my friends friends help each other friends solve problems together friends are good the end

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to eat spicy food but her mommy always said it was too hot for her little tummy one day lily and her mommy went to the train station to visit her grandma they got on the train and found a seat lily was excited to eat her favorite spicy chips on the train but her mommy said no you know spicy food makes your tummy hurt she said lets wait until we get to grandmas house and settle in lily was disappointed but she listened to her mommy as they rode the train they saw a man with a big bag lily wondered what was inside suddenly the mans bag fell and spilled all over the floor it was full of spicy chips the man was upset and didnt know what to do lily remembered what her mommy said about settling in first so she offered to help the man clean up his chips he was grateful and even gave lily a bag of her own to eat when they got to grandmas house lily was happy and her tummy didnt hurt because she waited to settle in before eating her spicy chips
lily and ben were twins who liked to play music lily played the piano and ben played the saxophone they learned from their dad who loved jazz jazz was a kind of music that made people happy and dance one day they decided to visit their grandpa who lived in a big house they wanted to show him their music and make him smile but when they got there they saw that grandpa was grumpy he did not want to talk or play with them he just sat on his chair and read his newspaper grandpa why are you so grumpy lily asked because i am old and tired and bored grandpa said can we play some music for you ben asked no i dont like music it is too loud and noisy grandpa said lily and ben felt sad they wanted to make grandpa happy but he did not like their music they wondered what to do then they had an idea they went to the piano and the saxophone and started to play jazz they played softly and gently but with joy and rhythm they played songs that their dad taught them songs that grandpa used to like when he was young at first grandpa did not notice he kept reading his newspaper but then he heard the music he looked up and saw lily and ben playing he felt something in his heart he felt a warm and happy feeling he remembered his youth when he used to dance and sing to jazz he remembered his wife who loved jazz too he felt a tear in his eye he put down his newspaper and got up from his chair he walked to the piano and the saxophone and hugged lily and ben thank you my dear children he said you have made me happy you have reminded me of the beauty of music i am sorry i was grumpy i love you and i love your music lily and ben smiled they were glad they made grandpa happy they learned that music can heal and connect people they learned that jazz is a gift that they can share with others they learned that they can always visit grandpa and play jazz for him

once upon a time there was a lazy ant who didnt want to work one day he saw a big piece of cake on the ground he wanted to eat it but he couldnt carry it alone a hardworking ant saw him and said hey lazy ant why dont you help me carry the cake we can share it together the lazy ant replied i dont want to work i just want to eat the cake the hardworking ant said if you help me i will give you a piece of the cake do you accept my offer the lazy ant thought for a moment and finally accepted they worked together and carried the cake to their home they shared the cake and became good friends the lazy ant learned that its better to work hard and share with others than to be lazy and alone

once upon a time there was a little fish who wanted to come and see the world but the world was a big and difficult place and he was scared to come every night he would look at the stars dreaming of what it could be like outside the pond then one day his best friend the bee came over and told him the news he said that if the little fish came with him he could show him the beautiful world outside their pond the little fish was so excited that he swam as fast as he could to come with the bee when he came to the top of the water he saw a world that was so much bigger than his pond there were trees and clouds and even other fish little fish was so happy that he wanted to stay forever he thanked his best friend the bee and promised to come back and visit often the little fish still comes back to visit his pond but now he knows that the world is a special and beautiful place and he will never forget how difficult it was to make the journey out of the pond

once upon a time in a far away land there lived a perfect fire all the people were scared of it because it was so big every night the fire grew bigger and bigger until the people became very scared then one day a brave little boy stepped forward and said i will make the fire shrink all the people cheered with joy the boy pointed his finger at the fire and a magical wind came and started to blow around it every time the wind blew the fire got smaller and smaller until it was very tiny everyone clapped and cheered the little boy had made the fire shrink to a perfect size and it shone brightly in the night sky all the people were very happy and thanked the boy for saving them from the big fire from that day on the little boy was known as the fire shrinker and he lived happily ever after
once upon a time a naughty bird called toby was walking around the forest he saw a beautiful feather in the grass he picked it up and admired how it shone in the sun suddenly toby heard a voice it was a rabbit who said hey that feather is mine dont take it toby was a bit scared but he trusted the rabbit he explained that he was admiring the feather and would give it back i can trust you cant i asked the rabbit toby nodded happily and gave it back the rabbit smiled and told toby thank you for trusting me as a reward here is a special feather just for you toby was so excited about the new feather he thanked the rabbit before running off to show his friends from that day on toby trusted others and was always kind to them
once upon a time a little girl named lily went to the park to play she saw a squirrel on a tree and said hello little squirrel do you want to play with me the squirrel looked at her and said yes i do want to play with you what do you want to play lily thought for a moment and said lets play hide and seek the squirrel agreed and they played together after a while lily saw that the squirrel looked sad she asked whats wrong little squirrel why do you look sad the squirrel answered i lost my acorns and i dont know where they are lily felt compassionate and said dont worry little squirrel i will help you find your acorns they looked everywhere and finally found the acorns the squirrel was very happy and said thank you lily you are a kind and compassionate friend lily smiled and said youre welcome little squirrel im happy to help
one day a restless little dog named spot was playing outside the sun was hot and the heat made spot very warm spot wanted to find a friend to play with spot saw a big tree and heard a bird singing do you want to play with me asked spot the bird said yes lets play they decided to play a game called clap and hop spot would clap his paws and the bird would hop from branch to branch they played and played until they were tired spot and the bird sat under the tree to rest that was fun said spot the bird agreed and they both took a nap in the shade
once upon a time there was a farmer and an animal the farmer liked the animal very much every morning the farmer would take the animal for a walk they would go for long walks together and enjoy the sunshine and the wind in their hair one day the sky turned dark and it started to rain the farmer stopped and put a veil on the animal the veil was dry and warm the animal and the farmer started running trying to get home before the rain got heavier but the rain was too strong the farmer and the animal stopped and stayed under a big tree they both stayed dry and safe under the tree until the rain stopped when the rain stopped the farmer and the animal were happy so they started walking again the farmer took off the veil and enjoyed the sun and the wind the farmer and the animal had a great day together they were both very happy when they got home
once upon a time there was a pretty bird the bird wanted to sing something special so he practiced and practiced until the song was clear on the day of the big sing the bird flew to the top of a tall tree there he sang so loudly that everyone could hear his sweet voice down on the ground a special couch was waiting it was a special clear blue couch and it sat in the middle of a large field the bird flew down and perched upon the couch everyone in the field cheered and the bird began to sing his voice echoed through the air and his song was beautiful when the song was finished everyone clapped and cheered the bird bowed and flew away the sound of the bird singing still lingers in the air

once upon a time there was a small crab his name was henry and he really wanted to know where he belonged he had a shell but he wasnt sure if it was the right one or not he was feeling lost so he decided to go on a journey henry hopped along the beach looking for answers he talked to the other crabs he saw but nobody knew what type of shell was the best for henry so he kept looking finally he found a dependable hermit crab the hermit crab said you should be proud of your shell henry its your special home all you need to do is find something to decorate it with every shell is unique henry was so happy to know he belonged somewhere he found stones and colored pebbles to put on his shell now henry travels too but he always returns to his special shell decorated and dependable
once upon a time there lived a little girl called molly she was very adventurous and she loved to explore one day she reached up to the ceiling and noticed that it was incomplete it was missing some pieces mollys mommy saw her reaching for the ceiling and asked what are you doing molly molly replied i am trying to complete the ceiling its missing some pieces so im trying to find them mollys mommy smiled she thought molly was so adventurous she said to molly let me help you find the pieces we can complete the ceiling together so molly and her mommy worked together to complete the ceiling they found all the pieces and fit them together to fill the gap finally the ceiling was complete and they stood back to admire their work molly smiled and thanked her mommy it felt so good to be able to complete something molly and her mommy had had a very adventurous day
tim and mia are playing in the park they like to go on the swings the slide and the seesaw they see a big wheel with many colors and lights it goes round and round very fast tim wants to try it but mia is afraid come on mia lets go on the wheel it looks fun tim says no tim it is too high and too fast it will scare me i dont want to go on the wheel mia says please mia dont be scared i will hold your hand we can see the whole park from the wheel it will be fun tim says mia thinks for a moment she likes tim and she wants to make him happy she decides to be brave and go on the wheel with him they get in a seat and buckle up the wheel starts to move wow look mia we are going up tim says mia feels her tummy go funny she closes her eyes and holds tims hand tight she hears the wind and the music and the people she is scared tim i dont like this i want to get off please make it stop mia says dont worry mia it will be over soon just breathe and look at me you are doing great tim says he smiles at her and tries to calm her down he is proud of her for trying something new he knows she is scared but he also knows she is strong the wheel goes round and round a few more times then it slows down and stops tim and mia get off the seat and walk away mia feels dizzy and shaky she is glad it is over thank you tim for holding my hand you are a good friend mia says thank you mia for going on the wheel with me you are very brave tim says they hug each other and smile they are happy they go to the ice cream stand and buy two cones they lick the ice cream and enjoy the tasty flavors they forget about the wheel and have fun in the park

once upon a time there was a blue tomato it loved to slip around every morning it would slip out of its home and go exploring it would slip over the hills and around the trees it would go so fast that the birds and the bees couldnt keep up the blue tomato soon made friends with a big yellow sun the sun would follow the tomato as it slipped around and around every day the blue tomato would slip back home in the evening exhausted but happy it was content to spend its days slipping around and making new friends and they all lived happily ever after the end
once upon a time there was a little girl who wanted to try something new her mum said that she could make something original so the little girl decided to make a cake she mixed the ingredients together put it in an oven and waited when the cake was ready the little girl was excited to take out her masterpiece as she tasted the cake she noticed something was missing she thought it needs something sweet so she added honey once the little girl had added the honey the cake tasted amazing she loved the way her original cake tasted the little girl was so excited about the cake that she forgot to take a nap the next day she was so tired that she could barely stay awake in school the moral of the story is that its important to take a nap when you need one even if something fun comes up that way youll have enough energy to enjoy it
once upon a time there was a boy called frank frank was three years old one day he decided to go on a walk as he walked he heard the sound of a distant violin frank saw a man playing the violin and it made him very happy he wanted to make music too so he asked the man if he could try the man said yes so frank grabbed the violin he held it in his hands and tried to make some music but instead of making beautiful music frank started to slap the violin the man laughed and said he should try playing the strings so frank tried he moved his fingers over the strings and made the most wonderful sound frank was so proud of himself and he clapped his hands the man thanked him and said goodbye frank waved goodbye and watched him walk away until he was nothing but a distant memory frank then smiled happy to have made music that made the man smile
lily and max are friends they love to play with toys they have many toys but their favorite is a big train the train has many cars and makes noises they can push the train on the floor and pretend to go to different places one day lily and max are playing with the train in lilys room they are happy and have fun they take turns to be the driver and the passenger they say choo choo all aboard but then lilys little brother ben comes in he sees the train and wants to play too he grabs the train and runs away lily and max are sad and angry they say hey thats our train give it back ben does not listen he laughs and says no its my train now im the best player lily and max chase ben around the house they try to get the train back but ben is fast and sneaky he hides behind the sofa under the table and in the closet he makes fun of lily and max he says you cant catch me you are slow and silly lily and max are tired and frustrated they dont like ben they think he is mean and rude they say we dont want to play with you you are a bad player but then they hear a loud crash they run to the kitchen and see what happened ben tripped over a chair and fell down he dropped the train and broke it the train is in pieces and does not make noises anymore ben is hurt and scared he cries and says ow ow ow im sorry im sorry lily and max feel sorry for ben they see that he is not a bad player just a little brother who wanted to join them they say its okay ben we forgive you we can fix the train together do you want to play with us ben nods and smiles he says yes please thank you lily and max you are good players and good friends lily and max hug ben and help him up they go to lilys room and look for glue and tape they work together to put the train back they are happy and have fun they say we love our train and we love each other
once upon a time there was a boy named jack he was 3 years old jack collected many different kinds of rubber things rubber ducks rubber balls and rubber monkeys one day jack saw an ugly rubber toy in a shop he wanted the toy so badly that he asked his mom if he could buy it but his mom said no she said it was an ugly toy why cant i have it jack asked he was very sad and he wanted the toy very much his mom said its ok lets record it so you can always remember it so jack decided to record the toy he looked at the toy and said thats an ugly one and then he put it back on the shelf jack was very happy that his mom suggested recording the toy now he had something to remember it by it was a very special memory
once upon a time there was a little fish named nemo nemo lived in a big blue ocean with his fish friends one day nemo saw an incredible sight a big whale was jumping out of the water nemo was amazed he had never seen anything like it before the next day nemo and his friends were playing a game of hide and seek nemo found the perfect hiding spot behind a rock suddenly he felt a spring in his tail it was a little crab the crab wanted to play too nemo was happy to have a new friend to play with as the sun began to set nemo and his friends swam back to their homes nemo was still thinking about the incredible whale and the fun game with the crab he realized that there were so many amazing things in the ocean that he had yet to discover and with that thought nemo fell asleep dreaming of all the adventures he would have

once upon a time there was a big blueberry it was in a pond and wanted to swim but it couldnt swim without help lucky for the blueberry there was a very helpful fish living in the pond he saw the blueberry and wanted to help it the fish used its fins to push the blueberry through the water the fish and the blueberry swam around the pond together they had lots of fun after a while the blueberry grew a bit too tired to keep swimming the fish said goodbye and swam away the blueberry found a sunny rock to rest on it felt warm and peaceful and the blueberry was happy the end
once upon a time there was a boy named timmy timmy loved to play basketball with his friends one day timmy went to the park to play basketball with his friends he brought his long basketball with him while playing timmy slipped on a banana peel and fell down his friends rushed to help him up they saw that his basketball had rolled away they all looked for it together and found it behind a tree timmy was happy to have his basketball back he thanked his friends for helping him and they continued playing from that day on timmy made sure to watch where he was walking so he wouldnt slip again
once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play with his toy cars and trucks one day he saw a big truck with expensive tires driving down the street he wanted to play with it but he knew it wasnt his timmy decided to march over to the truck and ask the driver if he could play with it but when he got closer he saw that the driver was very angry the driver had a flat tire and didnt have a spare he didnt know what to do timmy thought for a moment and remembered that his dad had a spare tire in the garage he offered to help the driver and they went to get the spare tire timmy felt proud that he could help someone in need from that day on the driver always waved to timmy when he drove by

once upon a time there was a brave boy named tom he was always looking for new things to explore one day he was walking in the forest when he noticed something strange he saw a big rock with a golden nail sticking up from the top tom was curious he reached down and grabbed the nail suddenly he felt something cold on his finger and everything around him started to freeze tom had discovered a magical nail tom was scared but he knew he had to be brave he held the nail tightly and closed his eyes he waited for the cold to pass and when he opened his eyes again the forest was filled with wonderful ice sculptures tom was amazed and he knew he had to share this special discovery with the world from then on tom and his magical nail went around freezing everything in sight everywhere he went people were in awe of his amazing talent

once upon a time there was a great bull he loved to bake every day the bull would make something in his oven one day the bull decided to bake a cake he put all the ingredients into the bowl and mixed them together then he put the mixture into a pan and placed it in the oven the bull waited and waited but no cake appeared he waited and waited suddenly there was a loud beep from the oven the bull opened the door and there was the most perfect cake he had ever seen the bull was so happy he ate the cake right away it was the best cake that he had ever baked he was so proud of himself that he went and told all of his friends he was very proud of his great baking

thats gross we cant bake our cake in there it will taste bad tom had an idea maybe we can clean the oven lets get some soap and a sponge they ran to the sink and grabbed some soap and a sponge they went back to the oven and started to scrub the inside they did not know that the oven was still hot they did not see the red light that said on ouch tom cried he touched the oven rack and burned his hand he dropped the sponge and ran to the sink he put his hand under the cold water sue heard him scream and turned around she saw the sponge catch fire she dropped the soap and ran to the oven she tried to grab the sponge but it was too hot she burned her fingers and let go the sponge fell on the floor and set the kitchen rug on fire help help tom and sue shouted they ran out of the kitchen and looked for mom they found her in the living room reading a book mom mom the oven is on fire they said mom jumped up and ran to the kitchen she saw the smoke and the flames she grabbed a fire extinguisher and sprayed the oven the sponge and the rug she put out the fire and turned off the oven she looked at tom and sue they had tears in their eyes and blisters on their hands they looked once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to draw with her crayons one day she found a fake crayon that her brother had left behind it was not a real crayon but it looked like one lily decided to use the fake crayon to draw a picture of a big stretchy snake she stretched the snake all the way across the page it looked so cool when her brother saw the fake crayon he was surprised he thought it was a real one but lily knew the difference she was happy with her stretchy snake and her fake crayon
jill and ben were friends who liked to play with dolls they had a big group of dolls that they dressed up in fancy clothes and hats they pretended that the dolls were going to a party or a picnic or a wedding one day jill and ben went to the park with their dolls they found a nice spot under a tree and set up their dolls on a blanket they were having fun until they saw a big dog running towards them the dog was barking and wagging its tail it wanted to play too but the dog did not know how to play with dolls it jumped on the blanket and knocked over the dolls it grabbed some of the dolls in its mouth and shook them hard it tore off their fancy clothes and hats and made them dirty it spoiled the dolls and the game jill and ben were very sad and angry they cried and shouted at the dog they tried to get their dolls back but the dog ran away with some of them they had to leave the park with their ruined dolls they did not want to play with dolls anymore they did not want to be friends anymore the dog spoiled everything
jill and jack were brother and sister they always liked to quarrel today was no exception i want to play with your toy shouted jill no its mine shouted jack just then their mom came in whats going on here she asked jill and i are quarreling said jack well why dont you both do some yoga instead said their mom so jill and jack did some yoga together they did the tree pose and the warrior pose after yoga jill and jack were tired but they were also happy they had stopped quarreling to celebrate their mom took them to the store we can buy something nice but it has to be cheap said mom so they each got a small toy and they were very happy
lily and tom like to play with blocks they make buildings with the blocks they make tall buildings and short buildings they make houses and shops and schools one day lily and tom want to make the tallest building ever they use all the blocks they have they raise the building higher and higher they stand on chairs and books to reach the top they are very proud of their building but then ben comes in ben is lilys big brother he is six years old he thinks he is very smart he sees the building and he laughs he says that is a stupid building it is too tall it will fall down watch this ben pushes the building with his hand the building wobbles and shakes the blocks fall down they make a loud noise they hit the floor and the chairs and the books lily and tom are very sad they cry they worked hard on their building they liked their building ben thinks it is funny he laughs more he says that was a stupid building you are stupid too you dont know how to play with blocks you are babies lily and tom are angry they are not stupid they are not babies they know how to play with blocks they say you are mean you are a bully you broke our building you are not nice go away ben is surprised he is not used to lily and tom talking back he is not used to them being angry he feels bad he says im sorry i was just joking i didnt mean to break your building i didnt mean to make you cry can i help you make a new building lily and tom look at ben they are still sad they are still angry but they are also kind they say ok you can help us but you have to be nice you have to be careful you have to share the blocks and you have to say sorry ben says sorry he says he will be nice he says he will be careful he says he will share the blocks he helps lily and tom make a new building they make a big building they make a strong building they make a beautiful building they are happy they are friends
lily and ben were playing in the park they liked to run and jump and slide but lily was not careful she tripped on a rock and fell down she hurt her knee and it was bleeding ow ow ow lily cried it hurts ben ran to her and saw the blood he was scared he wanted to help lily he remembered that his mom had a bandage in her bag he ran to the bench where his mom was sitting and asked for the bandage mom mom lily needs a bandage she fell down and her knee is bleeding ben said oh no poor lily here take this bandage and go help her his mom said she gave him the bandage and a kiss ben ran back to lily with the bandage he saw that her knee had some dirt and grass on it he knew he had to clean it first he looked around and saw a water fountain he took lilys hand and helped her stand up come on lily we have to go to the water fountain and wash your knee then i can put the bandage on it ben said okay ben thank you for being my friend lily said she was still crying a little but she trusted ben they walked to the water fountain and ben turned it on he gently washed lilys knee with his hand and the water he dried it with his shirt then he opened the bandage and stuck it on lilys knee there all done does it feel better ben asked lily looked at her knee and saw the bandage it had a picture of a dinosaur on it she smiled yes it feels better and i like the dinosaur its cool lily said ben smiled too he was happy that he helped lily he was honest and brave and kind come on lets go play some more but be careful okay ben said okay ben and thank you for the bandage you are the best friend ever lily said they hugged and ran back to the playground they played until it was time to go home they had a lot of fun and they learned to be careful and to help each other
lily and tom are friends they like to play with trains they have a big track in the living room they can make the trains go fast or slow one day lily wants to play with the red train but tom wants to play with the red train too he says it is my train you can have the blue train lily says no i want the red train you can have the yellow train they start to fight they pull the red train from each other they make loud noises they are not happy mom hears them she comes to the living room she sees the track and the trains she sees lily and tom fighting she is not happy she says stop fighting you are friends you can share the trains you can take turns that is normal fighting is not normal lily and tom stop fighting they look at mom they feel sorry they say sorry mom sorry friend mom smiles she says it is ok i am glad you are sorry now let us play with the trains together you can have the red train for five minutes and then you can give it to tom and then he can give it back to you and so on is that ok lily and tom nod they say ok mom ok friend they play with the trains they share the track they make the trains go fast or slow they are happy mom is happy
once upon a time there was a baby who wanted to fly the baby loved to watch birds flying in the sky and wanted to join them every morning the baby went out and tried to fly he flapped his arms and jumped in the air but he couldnt fly one day the baby noticed a zigzag flying in the air he watched with amazement as the zigzag soared in the sky he realized that he could fly like the zigzag if he just opened his arms the baby tried again this time opening his arms wide he flew in a zigzag pattern up and down and around the sky he felt so free and happy he flew higher and higher and enjoyed the open space of the sky soon the baby had to come down but he would never forget the feeling of flying from that day on he loved trying to fly just like the zigzag

once upon a time there was a caterpillar called bill he had 8 small legs and loved exploring in the garden one day bill was walking around when he heard a noise in the bushes curious he crept closer to take a look suddenly a big tough frog jumped out from the bushes bill was so scared he blinked his eyes and scurried away the frog bellowed where are you going dont be a scaredy cat it made bill feel better as he stopped and said shyly im sorry i thought you were scary the frog smiled and said theres nothing wrong with being scared just always be brave and face your fear everyone gets scared sometimes bill smiled back thanked the frog and continued his adventure he soon realized that sometimes being brave and facing tough things can be quiet rewarding from that day forth bill always remembered the frogs advice and faced his fear no matter how tough it seemed

once upon a time there was a little boy named tim tim was very curious and loved to look at things one day tim found a microscope in his room he did not know what it was but he wanted to see what it could do tim put the microscope on the table and looked through it he saw a tiny bug the bug was trapped in a tight spot and could not get out tim wanted to help the bug so he thought of a plan tim took a string and made a little zip line for the bug he tied one end of the string to the microscope and the other end to his chair the bug climbed onto the string and zipped across to the chair the bug was free and very happy tim felt proud that he could help the bug and learned something new with his microscope

clarissa was feeling very grumpy as she watched the soldiers walk by whats wrong her mother asked why dont you play with them in the garden clarissa shook her head no i dont like the soldiers but her mother smiled and said maybe youll change your mind come and play with them in the garden so clarissa went outside she thought about running away but everything inside her was telling her to give them a chance as she stepped out of the house the soldiers saw her and called her name clarissa was still feeling grumpy so instead of walking toward them she ran away and started to weep the soldiers were startled by her reaction but they followed her anyway and finally caught up to her whats wrong asked one of the soldiers clarissa wiped her eyes and said i was just thinking that sometimes you have to give people a chance and with that the soldiers welcomed her as a friend and she learned that soldiers were not so scary after all
once upon a time there was a deaf rhinoceros she was so lonely she didnt have anyone to talk to so she decided to try and make some friends she tried calling out to the other animals but nobody answered her she even tried walking around and stretching out her neck hoping to make some friends but still nobody replied she tried different things she tried running she tried hiding and she even tried making funny noises but still nobody paid her any attention suddenly she noticed a monkey the monkey was being very friendly so she tried being friendly too she lowered her horn and smiled at the monkey the monkey was so happy that someone was being nice to him that he screamed and ran away the rhinoceros was so sad she thought she would never find a friend but then another animal stepped out from behind the trees it was an elephant the elephant was deaf just like the rhinoceros the rhinoceros and the elephant became best friends they played and laughed together and they never felt so happy the rhinoceros finally had a friend
tom and mia were playing in the garden they saw a big door with a lock they wanted to see what was behind the door lets unlock the door tom said he found a key under a rock he put the key in the lock and turned it the door opened with a creak wow look mia said behind the door there was a small room with many things there were books toys clothes and a big bowl what is in the bowl tom asked he walked to the bowl and looked inside the bowl was full of shiny stones they were red blue green and yellow they sparkled in the light they are so pretty mia said she picked up a stone and held it in her hand it felt warm and smooth she wanted to take it home wait dont touch them tom said he saw a note on the wall it said do not touch the stones they are mysterious they can do magic they can make you happy or sad they can make you big or small they can make you fly or fall be careful tom and mia were scared they dropped the stones and ran out of the room they closed the door and locked it they decided to never go back lets play something else tom said ok lets play ball mia said they ran to the garden and played ball they forgot about the bowl and the stones they were happy
once upon a time there lived a tiny pale bug he was very lonely but he enjoyed exploring his world one day the bug decided to gather some oxygen so he could breathe while exploring he hopped around slowly collecting the oxygen in a container suddenly a scary bug appeared and spoke to the tiny bug the scary bug said give me your oxygen or else the tiny bug was very scared but he tried to be brave he gestured to his container of oxygen and offered to share the scary bug shook his head it is not enough he said if you dont give me your oxygen there will be consequences the tiny bug swallowed nervously and collected the last of the oxygen he thought he could run away fast enough but the scary bug was too quick the pale bugs last breath was his last and he never explored his world again he had been unknowingly gathering oxygen for the grave

lily and tom were playing with their toys in the living room they liked to make noises and pretend they were animals or cars or planes but their mom was working on her laptop in the kitchen she had a lot of things to do and she needed peace and quiet shh kids please be quiet i have to finish this work by today can you play in your room or outside she asked them but mom we want to play here we have more space and more toys and its too hot outside lily said yeah mom we dont want to move we are having fun tom said mom looked worried she knew they were bored and wanted to have fun but she also had to work she thought for a moment and then had an idea how about this i will give you a challenge you can play here but you have to move very slowly and quietly like you are in slow motion and you have to whisper can you do that she said lily and tom looked at each other they thought it sounded funny and fun they nodded and agreed okay mom we will try but you have to tell us if we are doing well lily said of course i will thank you kids you are very good and smart mom said lily and tom started to play in slow motion they moved their toys very slowly and whispered to each other they made funny faces and giggled softly mom smiled and went back to her work she felt more peace and less worried she was happy that her kids were happy and creative she loved them very much
once upon a time there was a big bear he was walking through the forest when he noticed a lovely smelling lotion he asked himself what is that mild smell he decided to find out he cautiously stepped towards the lotion and sniffed it he liked it so much that he said i must have it he grabbed the lotion and started walking away suddenly a tiny voice asked what is that you have big bear the big bear turned around and saw a little bunny rabbit the big bear replied this is lotion and it smells so tasty the bunny rabbit gasped oh you should be careful big bear imagine if its too sweet or too sticky the big bear thought about this for a moment and then said maybe i should find something mild instead with that the big bear put the lotion back and walked off he soon found a new lotion which wasnt so sweet and didnt make him sticky the little bunny rabbit smiled and said see big bear i told you to be careful and imagine what might happen

one day mama and her three year old son tim went to the park tim saw some children playing in the sandbox and wanted to join them mama said wait here and stand still im going to get something from the car tim waited and stood still but he was getting impatient when mama came back she was carrying two buckets filled with sand mama said tim carry this bucket it wont be too heavy for you tim looked at the bucket and it seemed heavy to him thats too heavy mama he said mama looked at him her face a bit stern i wouldnt ask if it was too heavy tim thats rude can you try tim nodded and grabbed the bucket he was surprised when he found that he couldnt lift it but mama had already started walking towards the sandbox so tim tried again this time he was able to stand up with the bucket in his hands he smiled to himself proud that he was able to lift the weight mama smiled at him too and said good job timmy lets go show the other kids
one day a young girl was walking through the forest she was wearing a warm mitten on her hand suddenly she heard a strange noise like something was calling her the girl couldnt resist so she followed the sound when she reached an unknown place she saw a big dark tree then a voice came from the tree and said if you pick one of my mittens you will become a beautiful princess the girl was so excited to be a princess she quickly grabbed one of the mittens hanging from the tree as soon as she touched it the tree started to tremble and an evil laugh filled the air the girl tried to move but she couldnt it was like she was frozen the girl started to cry as she realized she had become a part of the tree from then on she lived as a mitten in the trees branches unknown to the world

once there was a little girl named lucy she was three years old and loved to go outside and explore every time she went on an adventure lucy took her pale cord with her one day she decided to go find a secret spot near her house she followed the cord as she walked along until she came to a beautiful lake the lake was very still and the morning light made it look pale lucy was very intrigued and she wanted to explore more she grabbed her cord and began to walk around the lake she waded in the shallow part of the lake feeling the cold water on her toes she looked up at the clouds in the sky and smiled everywhere she looked there were amazing things to explore finally after having so much fun in the lake lucy offered to gather some twigs and leaves to make a fire next to the lake she and her parents discussed the plan and with the help of her pale cord lucy was able to find all the things they needed when they finished they all watched the little fire sparkle in the night lucy was so happy to see the fire and thanked her cord for helping her find the materials the next day lucy and her parents went back home with slept smiles on their face happy to have spent such a wonderful day together

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to draw with his pen he drew pictures of his family his friends and his pets timmys mom said timmy its easy to draw just try your best one day timmys friend billy came over to play billy saw timmy drawing and said thats not good your picture looks weird timmy felt sad and started to cry his mom said timmy dont listen to billy just ignore him you are doing a great job timmy wiped away his tears and continued to draw he drew a picture of himself and his mom holding hands when he finished he showed it to his mom his mom smiled and said wow timmy you are such a great artist i love your picture timmy felt happy and proud of himself from that day on he never let anyone make him feel bad about his drawings again
sam and mia liked to play with their toys in the living room they had many toys like cars dolls blocks and books but they did not like to put their toys away when they were done they left them on the floor on the couch on the table and everywhere one day their mom came home from work and saw the mess she was not happy she said to sam and mia you need to return your toys to their places the living room is not organized it is hard to walk and find things and it is not safe you can trip and fall and hurt yourself or break something please help me clean up sam and mia did not want to clean up they wanted to keep playing they said to their mom but mom we are having fun we will clean up later can we play for a little longer their mom said no you cannot play for a little longer you have played enough it is time to return your toys to their places you can play again tomorrow but only if you keep the living room organized now come on lets do it together it will be faster and easier sam and mia sighed they knew their mom was right they did not want to trip and fall and hurt themselves or break something they did not want to make their mom unhappy they decided to help their mom clean up they returned their toys to their places they put the cars in the box the dolls in the basket the blocks in the bag and the books on the shelf they made the living room organized their mom smiled she said to sam and mia thank you sam and mia you did a good job the living room looks much better i am proud of you now how about we have some cookies and milk as a reward sam and mia smiled too they said to their mom yes please we love cookies and milk and we love you mom they hugged their mom and went to the kitchen they enjoyed their cookies and milk they were happy they learned to return their toys to their places and keep the living room organized

leo was a rare lion who lived in the jungle he liked to hang from the trees and swing with his tail he was very strong and brave but also very lonely he had no friends to play with one day he saw a big bird flying in the sky it had bright colors and a long beak leo wanted to talk to the bird so he climbed up a tree and called out hello bird what is your name do you want to be my friend the bird heard leo and flew closer he was curious about the lion who hung from the trees hello lion my name is rani i am a toucan i have never seen a lion like you before why do you hang from the trees leo smiled and said i like to hang from the trees it is fun and i can see the whole jungle why do you fly in the sky rani said i like to fly in the sky it is free and i can see many things i can also find fruits and nuts to eat leo and rani realized that they had something in common they both liked to explore and try new things they decided to be friends and play together they had a lot of fun hanging from the trees and flying in the sky they also shared their food and stories leo was happy to have a friend who understood him rani was happy to have a friend who admired him they were a rare pair but a perfect match

once there was a silver fox every day the fox would wander through the forest looking for food one day he stopped in front of a huge tree but no matter how hard he tried he couldnt climb it he felt so sad suddenly he saw a strange creature it was small silver and had long ears the fox knew that it was a bunny and he said hello but the bunny just hopped away the fox kept walking and soon found a small stream he stopped to take a drink but when he looked in the water he saw the bunny again this time the bunny was swimming the fox was so surprised and he wanted to swim too the fox tried to swim but he found it hard he tried and tried until eventually he could swim quite well with each day the fox was getting better and better and he was so happy the silver fox kept swimming and soon he became the best swimmer in the forest he was so proud of himself and all the other animals in the forest were amazed by his skill the fox was no longer sad and his happiness continued to increase

tim and mia were playing in the park with their bikes they liked to go fast and make turns and jumps they had fun and laughed a lot but then tim saw a big hole in the fence he wanted to see what was behind it he told mia to follow him he pushed his bike through the hole and went to the other side mia was scared she did not want to go to the other side she saw a lot of smoke and noise and big machines she thought it was a bad place she shouted to tim come back tim come back tim did not listen he was curious he rode his bike closer to the machines he saw a big pipe that was spitting out fire he thought it was cool he wanted to touch it but then he felt very hot and dizzy he could not breathe well he realized that the fire was taking away the oxygen the oxygen was the air that he needed to live he started to cough and cry he wanted to go back to the park he turned his bike around and tried to ride back to the fence but it was hard he was very tired and sick he fell off his bike and lay on the ground mia saw him fall she was very worried she ran to the hole and called for help she saw a man who was wearing a big hat and a coat he was a firefighter he had a hose that could spray water the firefighter saw mia and tim he understood what happened he ran to tim and picked him up he put a mask on his face that gave him oxygen he said dont worry tim i will restore you i will make you better he carried tim to his truck and drove him to the hospital mia followed him on her bike she was glad that the firefighter was there she hoped that tim would be okay she learned a lesson she would never go to the bad place again she would stay in the park with her bike
once there was a little girl named mary she was embarrassed when she saw a hive in the nearby field it was a huge hive and it was filled with bees but the bees were not angry they were quite mild and didnt even buzz around even though she was scared mary felt that she had to go see it so she went to the bee hive and looked inside it was full of little wax cells filled with honey mary was amazed and she smiled she was no longer scared she was happy to have discovered this hive but then something embarrassing happened mary accidentally knocked over the hive all the honey and wax spilled out making a giant sticky mess mary quickly ran away from the hive embarrassed that she had made such a big mess but she would never forget the mild and friendly bees in the hive

once upon a time there was a little girl named amy she had a small cozy bedroom in her bedroom she had a big furry teddy bear she loved her teddy bear very much one day amy saw a new friend appear in her bedroom it was a little furry cat amy was very happy to see the cat she said hi cat do you want to play with me and my teddy bear the cat meowed and started to play with amy and her teddy bear but after a while the cat got tired of playing it looked at amys big furry teddy bear and decided to do something bad the cat took the teddy bear and ran away with it amy was very sad and cried no cat please bring back my teddy bear but the cat did not listen and disappeared with the teddy bear amy was left alone in her bedroom feeling very sad without her favorite toy
once upon a time there was a lion named leo leo was a big strong lion with a loud roar he lived in a peaceful jungle with his friends the monkeys and the birds one day leo went for a walk and found a shiny belt on the ground he picked it up and put it on as he walked through the jungle he met a monkey named max max looked at leos new belt and said wow that belt is so shiny where did you get it leo replied i found it on the ground it looks nice doesnt it max looked at leo and said be careful leo that belt might belong to someone else its always best to ask around before taking something that isnt yours leo thought about what max said and realized he should have asked around first he took off the belt and decided to ask his friends if they knew who it belonged to as he walked away max smiled and thought to himself im glad i could help leo hes a good friend
once upon a time there was a cute little girl named lily she loved to play with her dolls and her toys one day her mommy asked her to help move some furniture around in the living room lily was happy to help and started to push the sofa as she was pushing her mommy said lily can you jog over to the other side and push from there lily nodded and jogged over to the other side of the sofa she pushed and pushed until the sofa was in the right spot after they finished moving the furniture lilys mommy went to the kitchen to make some tea while she was gone lily climbed up on the sofa to play with her dolls suddenly the sofa tipped over and fell on top of lily she was hurt very badly and had to go to the hospital lilys mommy was very sad and wished she had been there to stop the accident from that day on she promised to always watch over lily and keep her safe

once upon a time there was an elderly lady who loved to knit she had a cozy crib where she would sit and knit all day long one day she couldnt find her knitting needles she searched high and low but they were nowhere to be found she asked her cat if he had seen them but he just meowed back at her then she asked her neighbor a kind man who liked to solve puzzles he came over and looked for the needles with her after a while the man found the needles hidden under a cushion on the couch the elderly lady was so happy and grateful that she knitted him a warm scarf as a thank you gift from that day on she made sure to always keep her knitting needles in a safe place

once upon a time a big fat onion was growing in a garden the onion was happy because it had lots of sun and water one day a little girl named lily came to the garden she saw the onion and said wow you are a big onion the onion replied yes i am big but i will remain here in the garden until i am ready to be picked lily asked why do you want to stay here the onion said i want to grow bigger and stronger so that i can be a good onion for someone to eat lily smiled and said i love onions when will you be ready the onion replied in a few more weeks i will be ready to be picked and eaten but until then i will remain here in the garden growing bigger and stronger
