once upon a time there was a grumpy bear he was always grumpy and didnt like to play with the other animals one day the animals wanted to cheer up the grumpy bear so they decided to give him a whistle they raised their voices and whistled as loud as they could the bear was so surprised he had never heard such a joyful sound he tried to whistle back and he did a good job now the grumpy bear was happy he started to play with the other animals and they were all so happy they raised their voices even louder and everyone whistled and laughed together since then the grumpy bear hasnt been so grumpy he loves to raise his voice for a whistle every day
once upon a time there was a little duck named ducky ducky loved to swim in the pond with his friends one day ducky saw a shiny leather ball at the bottom of the pond he wanted to get it so he asked his friend froggy can you help me dive down to get the ball froggy replied sure i can help you dive down to get the ball but be careful the water is very deep and the leather ball might be dull ducky and froggy took a deep breath and dove down to the bottom of the pond ducky saw the leather ball and grabbed it with his beak he brought it back up to the surface and showed it to froggy look i found the ball said ducky froggy looked at the ball and said its a bit dull but we can still play with it ducky and froggy had a lot of fun playing with the leather ball and they were very happy they dove down to get it the end
once upon a time there was an ugly stable inside the stable was a small box one day a strong man came to the stable he looked at the box and said i need to lift this box he bent down put his hands underneath the box and he lifted it up the box was filled with toys the man set the box down smiled and said these toys will make the children happy the man was so strong he could lift the box with his hands what a strong man
ben and lily were playing in the park they saw a big red wagon with a long handle they wanted to ride in it can we pull the wagon ben asked lily yes lets pull it lily said they ran to the wagon and grabbed the handle they pulled it with all their might the wagon was heavy and hard to move they had to pull very tight they pulled it across the grass and the dirt they pulled it up and down the hills they pulled it around the trees and the swings they had so much fun pulling the wagon they laughed and shouted they felt strong and happy look theres a pond ben said he saw a shiny blue pond with ducks and fish he wanted to pull the wagon to the pond be careful ben lily said she saw a sign that said no wagons near the pond she was afraid they would fall in the water but ben did not listen he pulled the wagon faster and faster he pulled it too close to the pond he did not see a big rock in the way crash the wagon hit the rock and tipped over ben and lily fell out of the wagon the handle flew out of their hands the wagon rolled into the pond splash the wagon sank into the water the ducks and fish swam away the water was cold and wet ben and lily were scared and sad they lost their wagon they were soaked and dirty they ran to their mom and dad they told them what happened they said they were sorry mom and dad hugged them and dried them they said it was okay they said they were glad they were not hurt they said they would buy them a new wagon ben and lily felt better they learned their lesson they said they would never pull the wagon too tight or too fast again they said they would always listen to the signs and to each other they said they still loved pulling the wagon

once upon a time there was a king he was a very stubborn king he lived in a big castle with lots of toys and things every morning he would go for a walk in the park one day he heard a loud noise it was a huge roar the king was very scared he stopped in his tracks and looked around to try and see where the noise was coming from he carefully looked around until he saw it it was a big lion he was roaring and showing his sharp teeth the king was so scared he started to shake he stayed very still not daring to move but then he remembered something important he was the king kings are brave and strong so the king stood up tall and shouted i am the king stop roaring the lion stopped roaring and looked at the king he bowed his head and went away never roaring again the king smiled he was very proud of himself for being brave and standing up to the lion

once upon a time there was a shy bunny he lived in a warm and cozy burrow with his family every day hed take long naps with his favorite blanket he loved to snuggle with it especially when it was cold outside one day the family was getting ready for a big race everyone was excited the bunny was a little worried though he had never run so fast before just then his blanket flew up and landed right in front of him he smiled maybe it was a sign the bunny grabbed his blanket and ran as fast as he could his family cheered him on and he kept running finally he reached the finish line and he had won the race he couldnt believe it and he had done it with his blanket from then on the bunny was never shy again he kept his blanket close to him and raced every day he was the fastest bunny in the burrow

one day a small fish named fin was swimming in the ocean the water was icy but fin liked it he saw a big rock near the shore and wanted to rest on it fin swam closer to the rock but the tide was very strong it was hard for him to swim as fin tried to swim to the rock he met a crab named carl carl said be careful fin the tide can make you soak if you go too close to the shore fin was scared but he really wanted to rest on the rock fin asked carl for help carl thought for a moment and said i have an idea hold onto my shell and i will walk to the rock that way you wont soak fin held onto carls shell and they slowly moved towards the rock the tide was strong but carl was stronger they finally reached the rock and fin was so happy he thanked carl for helping him they both rested on the rock enjoying the icy water and the sound of the tide from that day on fin and carl became best friends

once upon a time there was a great sunrise the sky was bright and beautiful all the birds sang happily then something special happened a tiny little bunny came out of the trees and lay down in the grass she wanted to watch the sunrise get brighter and brighter she watched and watched until the sky was orange yellow and pink it was a great sunrise suddenly a cloud covered the sun the bunny could not see the sunrise anymore she lay in the grass and thought then she had an idea she curled up into a ball and pretended to lie like the sun it was a great moment she was the little sun all the birds came closer to see her and chirp in delight she lay there until the sky was bright again and when the sky was bright again the real sun came out from behind the cloud the little bunny watched the sunrise with delight and in that moment she was part of the sunrise too she lay in the grass and watched until the sky was blue then she hopped away it was a great sunrise
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she was very excited because her family was going on a holiday to the beach but when they got there it was gloomy and cloudy lily was sad because she wanted to play in the sun one day as she was walking on the beach she saw a little crab hello mr crab she said why are you so sad the crab replied i cant find my shell i need it to protect myself lily wanted to help so she picked up shells until she found one that fit the crab perfectly thank you so much said the crab you saved my holiday lily smiled and said im glad i could help now lets play in the sand and they played together until the sun came out and the beach was no longer gloomy

sara and ben were twins who liked to play with their toys one day they found a big box in the attic inside the box there were many old things sara saw a shiny wand and a hat with stars ben saw a book with pictures and a cape with a hood lets play magic sara said she put on the hat and took the wand ben put on the cape and opened the book they pretended to be wizards and witches they waved the wand and said funny words they looked at the book and pointed at the pictures but something strange happened the wand and the book were really magic they made things come true sara turned the sofa into a frog ben made the lamp fly they laughed and clapped they did not know they were in trouble mom and dad came home and saw the mess they were angry and scared they tried to fix the sofa and the lamp but they could not they were helpless they did not know what to do sara and ben felt sorry they did not mean to make mom and dad sad they wanted to help they looked at the wand and the book they remembered what they said and did they tried to undo the magic they waved the wand and said sorry they pointed at the book and said stop the magic worked the sofa turned back into a sofa the lamp fell down the frog hopped away the wand and the book stopped glowing mom and dad hugged sara and ben they were happy and relieved they thanked them for fixing the magic sara and ben smiled they learned a lesson they decided to join mom and dad and help them clean the attic they put the wand the book the hat and the cape back in the box they did not play with them again they played with their own toys they had fun without magic

once upon a time a wise old owl lived in a tall tree he had big eyes that gave him a special look every day he watched the animals play in the forest one day a little rabbit came to the wise owl with a problem he had a big load of carrots and didnt know how to carry them home the wise owl thought for a moment and said i have an idea lets ask our friend the strong ant for help the rabbit and the wise owl went to the strong ant the ant agreed to help the rabbit carry the load of carrots they all worked together to move the carrots to the rabbits home the rabbit was very happy and thanked the wise owl and the strong ant from that day on the animals in the forest knew that they could always ask the wise owl for help they learned that when they worked together they could solve any problem the wise owls special look and big eyes always watched over the forest making sure all the animals were happy and safe
anna and ben are friends they like to play with trains they have a big track with many trains they make the trains go fast and slow and stop and go one day a new boy comes to play his name is tom he has a pretty train it is red and shiny anna and ben want to see his train they ask him nicely can we play with your train tom they say but tom is not nice he says no he says his train is better than their trains he says they have old and ugly trains he teases them that is not nice tom anna says you should share your train we share our trains with you but tom does not listen he keeps his train to himself he makes it go around the track he laughs at anna and ben anna and ben are sad they do not like tom they do not want to play with him they go to another corner they play with their trains they have fun tom sees them he wants to play with them he feels lonely he says sorry can i play with you anna and ben he says i am sorry i teased you your trains are nice too can we share our trains anna and ben think they are still mad at tom but they are also kind they decide to give him a chance okay tom they say you can play with us but you have to be nice you have to share your train and you have to say nice things tom nods he is happy he gives his train to anna he takes a train from ben they play together they make the trains go fast and slow and stop and go they have fun they are friends
ben and sam were brothers they liked to play with their toys one day they saw a man with a big truck the man had many toys in his truck he said he would sell them for cheap ben and sam ran to the man they wanted to buy some toys they had some money from their piggy bank they looked at the toys they saw cars dolls balls and puzzles they also saw a green box the box was dull and had no picture on it what is in the green box ben asked the man it is a surprise toy it is very fun and special you can have it for only one dollar the man said ben and sam were curious they wanted to see the surprise toy they gave the man one dollar and took the green box they ran back to their house they opened the box but there was no toy in the box there was only a rock a dull gray rock ben and sam were sad and angry they had wasted their money they had no new toy they had been tricked by the man they tried to find the man and his truck but he was gone he had driven away with his toys and their money ben and sam cried they wished they had not bought the green box they wished they had bought a car or a doll or a ball or a puzzle instead they learned a hard lesson they learned to be careful and not trust strangers they learned to not judge a book by its cover or a box by its color

once upon a time there was a silly belt everywhere the belt went people would laugh and smile everyone loved to see the silly belt one day the silly belt was in a kingdom with a bad king the king was very mean and made everyone do what he said he wanted everyone to surrender to his will the silly belt didnt like the kings rules it wanted everyone to be happy and have fun so when the king ordered everyone to surrender the silly belt refused the king was very angry and tried to use his powerful army to make the silly belt surrender but the silly belt was not afraid it held its ground and would not surrender finally the king had no choice but to accept that the silly belt would not surrender he realized that the silly belt had won and he and his army had to go away and so the silly belt saved the day everyone cheered because the silly belt had brought them freedom with its sillyness
once upon a time there was a girl who loved to dance every day she would go outside and twirl and spin while the sun was shining one day she noticed something twinkling in the grass it was a bag of salt she picked it up and then danced all around with it whenever the sun made it shine it looked so beautiful the girl kept dancing with the salt and soon she was twirling so fast that the bag split open salt spilled all over the ground the girl was worried she began to dance even faster suddenly the wind picked up and blew all the salt away the ground now looked as clean as before and the girl was happy she kept dancing and spinning until it was time to go home the girl had a great day filled with dancing and playing around with the beautiful salt

noise or mess one day lily and tom decided to sneak into the factory and see what their dad did they waited until he left for work and then followed him they saw a big gate with a sign that said no kids allowed they did not care they climbed over the gate and ran inside the factory was loud and smelly there were machines that moved and clanked there were people who wore hats and gloves lily and tom thought it was fun they touched everything they saw they pushed buttons and pulled levers they made the machines go faster and slower they laughed and shouted but they did not see the boss the boss was a mean man who watched everything on a screen he saw lily and tom and got very angry he called their dad on the phone and told him what they did he said he would punish them their dad was scared and sorry he left his work and ran to the factory he found lily and tom and hugged them he was glad they were not hurt but he was also mad he said they were naughty and foolish he said they could have broken the machines or hurt themselves or others he said they had to go home and stay in their room he said they could not play or watch tv or have dessert he said they had to learn their lesson lily and tom felt bad they said they were sorry they did not mean to cause trouble they just wanted to see what their dad did they did not know the factory was dangerous and boring they said they would never do it again their dad took them home and put them in their room he said he loved them but he had to punish them he said he hoped they would be good from now on he said he would talk to them later lily and tom sat on their bed and looked at each other they were sad and bored they wished they had not gone to the factory they wished they had listened to their dad they wished they could play and have fun they learned their lesson

once upon a time there was a little girl named tess she was three years old every day tess would go out to the park to play one day it was raining outside tess was very sad but then she heard a loud thunder tess was very scared she saw a bright flash of light and ran to her mommy mommy said tess what is that loud noise and the funny light mommy gave her a hug and said that was thunder my dear it comes from the sky and is very loud tess thought really hard she wanted to do something to make the thunder go away then she had an idea i know said tess she ran outside and started to throw rocks towards the sky she kept on throwing and throwing until the thunder stopped the clouds slowly moved away and the sun started to shine again tess was so happy and proud of herself she had made the thunder go away
bunny was a famous hopper he could hop very high and very far he liked to hop all over the forest and show off his skills he made many friends with the other animals who cheered for him and gave him carrots one day bunny saw a hut in a clearing he had never seen a hut before he was curious and wanted to hop inside he hopped closer and closer until he reached the door he knocked with his paw but no one answered he pushed the door and it opened bunny hopped inside the hut it was dark and dusty he saw a big bed a table a chair and a cupboard he also saw a basket full of food he smelled honey and bread and cheese he was hungry and wanted to taste them he hopped to the basket and took a bite of the cheese it was yummy he took another bite and another he did not hear the footsteps outside he did not see the shadow on the wall he did not notice the big bad wolf who lived in the hut the wolf came in and saw bunny eating his cheese he was angry and hungry he roared and showed his teeth he wanted to eat bunny for his lunch bunny was scared and sorry he dropped the cheese and tried to hop away but the wolf was faster and blocked the door bunny was trapped he wished he had not hopped inside the hut he wished he had stayed with his friends in the forest he wished he had listened to his mother who told him not to go near the hut he closed his eyes and waited for the end but then he heard a loud noise he opened his eyes and saw a big axe it smashed the door and made a hole he saw a man with a beard and a hat he was a woodcutter who worked in the forest he saw the wolf and the bunny he was brave and strong he swung his axe and hit the wolf the wolf howled and ran away bunny was saved he was happy and grateful he thanked the woodcutter who smiled and patted his head he gave him some honey and bread and told him to go back to his friends he warned him not to hop inside strange huts again he said goodbye and left bunny hopped out of the hut he felt lucky and learned a lesson he decided to be more careful and not to be too curious he hopped back to the forest and found his friends he told them what happened and they hugged him and gave him carrots he was still a famous hopper but he was also a wiser bunny

once upon a time there was a little bird named tweetie tweetie had a smooth yellow body and loved to whistle all day long one day tweetie was flying in the forest when she saw a big juicy worm tweeties tummy rumbled and she felt an urge to eat the worm but then tweetie heard a voice dont eat that worm tweetie its not safe it was her friend wise owl why not asked tweetie its poisoned replied wise owl oh no cried tweetie thank you for warning me wise owl from that day on tweetie listened to wise owls advice and never ate anything without checking with him first but one day tweetie was flying and whistling when she saw a pretty red berry she forgot to ask wise owl and ate it anyway sadly it was poisonous and tweetie fell from the sky the moral of the story is to always listen to wise advice and never eat anything without checking if its safe

once there was a little boy who owned a brown safe the safe was filled with many treasures that he loved to play with every day he would take out something different and enjoy it until dinnertime one day the boy was being naughty his mom scolded him and told him to tie up the safe so he went to his room and tried to tie the safe with a piece of string but he couldnt do it mom i cant tie up the safe he called out to her go and ask your father for help she said so the boy went in search of his dad but he had gone out he looked everywhere but he was nowhere to be seen finally it was getting late and dark so the little boy had to go to bed in the morning he searched again but his dad was still gone and the safe was still untied the little boy was so sad he never saw his dad again and his treasures were gone forever
pam was walking through the forest when she saw something black it was a huge black bear pam stopped and looked around nervously but the bear did not move pam inched closer wondering why it wasnt moving suddenly it spoke to her do not be afraid the bear said i will not yield pam was very surprised that the bear spoke she cautiously asked what do you mean the bear replied i will return to this forest once a year so that i can watch it grow and thrive pam smiled realizing how brave this bear was with a nod she said goodbye and continued her walk through the forest she was glad she had met the brave black bear
once upon a time there was a little child named tim tim loved to run and play outside one day tim saw a butterfly and wanted to catch it he tried and tried but he couldnt catch the butterfly tim felt frustrated tims mom saw him and asked whats wrong tim tim said i want to catch the butterfly but i cant his mom smiled and said lets try together so tim and his mom tried to catch the butterfly they ran and ran but the butterfly was too fast tim was still frustrated but his mom said dont worry tim we can try again tomorrow the next day tim and his mom went outside to catch the butterfly this time they were ready they ran and ran and finally they caught the butterfly tim was so happy and he said thank you mom from that day on tim and his mom always played together and they caught many more butterflies tim was not frustrated anymore and they both had a lot of fun
one day johnny was walking in the park he saw a cool frog and went to take a closer look hello mr frog how are you today he said the frog smiled i am doing well but i need to sneeze he replied johnny thought it was very strange for a frog to sneeze but he was a friendly frog who wanted to help so johnny said maybe you need to take a break find a nice and cool spot and have a rest the frog thanked johnny and hopped away later in the day johnny saw a rainbow in the sky suddenly he knew why the frog needed to sneeze he remembered how he had told the frog to find a cool spot the rainbow was a sign that he had been successful the moral of the story is that its important to be kind and help others even if it seems like a small thing at first it could have a big effect johnnys thoughtfulness helped the frog find the perfect spot to take a break and sneeze in peace

once upon a time there was a little girl named emma she was three years old and as curious as could be she had discovered that if she washed a toy symbol in soapy water it would become clean and shiny one day emma was playing in the park with her friends they were all playing with a giant symbol they had never seen before it was yellow and red and covered in scribbles emma had a crazy idea she said to her friends lets wash the symbol in the pond her friends looked at her in disbelief and shouted no way emma youre crazy despite their protests emma was determined she grabbed the symbol and scurried over to the pond as she was about to put it in the water the symbol let out a loud splash and went deep beneath the surface emmas friends cheered as they watched the symbol become cleaner and brighter with each second it was submerged once it emerged from the pond it was like a brand new symbol emmas friends clapped and thanked her for her genius idea emma smiled and said see i told you it would work

touch my things one wednesday their mom brought home a big cake she said this is for you ben and lily you can share it after dinner ben and lily looked at the cake and licked their lips they wanted to eat it right away but they also wanted to split it they said how can we share it it is only one cake they decided to cut the cake in half but they were not good at cutting they made a big mess the cake was not even ben said my half is smaller than yours that is not fair lily said no your half is bigger than mine you are greedy they started to argue and fight they pulled and pushed the cake they did not see their nosy dog spot who was watching them spot was hungry he smelled the cake he thought that looks yummy i want some too he waited for his chance when ben and lily were busy fighting he jumped on the table he grabbed the cake with his mouth he ran away with it ben and lily stopped fighting they saw their cake was gone they said oh no where is our cake they heard spot barking outside they ran to the door they saw spot eating their cake he had split it with his teeth he had crumbs all over his face he looked happy ben and lily looked sad they said oh no spot took our cake he did not share it with us their mom came to the door she saw what happened she said im sorry ben and lily you lost your cake you were too busy splitting it and fighting over it you did not enjoy it or share it you learned a hard lesson sometimes splitting is not good sometimes sharing is better ben and lily nodded they felt sorry they hugged each other they said were sorry mom were sorry spot we were silly we will share better next time their mom smiled she said thats good ben and lily im proud of you i have a surprise for you i have another cake in the fridge you can have it tomorrow but only if you promise to share it nicely ben and lily said we promise mom we promise they thanked their mom they thanked spot they went to bed happy they learned to share

once upon a time in a big pond there was a lazy frog named lily she liked to sit on her big green leaf and watch the fish swim by one sunny day a little bug flew by and asked why are you so lazy lily lily just shrugged and said i like being lazy its fun to watch the fish and enjoy the sun the little bug didnt understand and flew away the next day a big rain came all the other frogs were busy swimming and playing in the water but lily just sat on her leaf being lazy a small fish swam up to her and said come play with us lily lily shrugged again and said no thank you i like being lazy on my leaf the small fish swam away sad that lily didnt want to play in the end lily stayed lazy on her leaf watching the world go by she liked her simple lazy life and that was okay

once upon a time there was an adventurous bear one day the bear was walking through the forest when he came across a yummy treat the treat looked tasty and the bear wanted to eat it but then he realized that it was poison the bear resisted the temptation to eat it the bear then heard a voice calling him he looked up and saw a beautiful bird in a nearby tree the bird asked the bear to follow her she said that her name was saila and she knew of a new and exciting adventure that was waiting for the bear the bear accepted the invitation and followed saila to a secret place deep in the forest as they went they saw lots of fascinating things they even made friends with some of the animals along the way when they arrived at the secret place the bear was so happy and excited to start the adventure saila taught the bear lots of new things and together they went on many fun adventures the bear was so glad that he had resisted the poison because the journey with saila was much better than it would have been if he ate the treat the adventures he had helped him to grow and learn in so many ways the bear was so lucky and grateful for the amazing journey

ben and sam were brothers who liked to play with boats they had a big tub of water in the backyard where they could sail their boats one day they found a new boat in the garage it was red and shiny and had a big sail wow look at this boat ben said can we sail it in the tub sure lets try it sam said they took the boat to the tub and put it in the water the boat floated and moved with the wind this is fun ben said lets pretend we are pirates and this is our ship okay arrr sam said but we need some treasure to bury on an island they looked around for something shiny or sparkly to use as treasure they saw a jar of olives on the table they liked olives they were green and salty and yummy lets use these olives as treasure ben said they look like jewels good idea sam said they took some olives from the jar and put them in a small bag they tied the bag to the boat and sailed it to the other side of the tub there is our island ben said lets dig a hole and hide our treasure they got out of the tub and took the boat and the bag of olives they found a spot of dirt and dug a hole with their hands they put the bag of olives in the hole and covered it with dirt we did it sam said we buried our treasure shh dont tell anyone ben said its a secret they smiled and hugged each other they were happy they liked to sail and play with olives they were fat and full of fun
once upon a time in a small village there was a girl named lucy lucy wanted to try her luck and paint a pastel she had a box of colours but her brother timmy insisted on using the green pastel lucy was selfish and argued with him thinking that she should be the one to use it but she agreed with timmy not wanting timmy to be disappointed a week went by and lucy tried her luck she mixed many colours together to create a beautiful mural showing a bright sunshine and a lake with swans and pink flowers she suddenly ran out of colours to use and realised that the only colour she had left was the green pastel lucy was surprised and thankful to her brother who had insisted on using the green pastel instead that day lucy learned a lesson she realised that it was not always necessary to be selfish instead it was far more beneficial to put others ideas first had she not listened to her brother she would not have completed her vibrant mural the moral of this story is to never be too selfish and always take the time to listen to the ideas of others you never know when anothers opinion could turn out to be just what you needed
once upon a time in a big green park there was a small messy dog named binky binky had a long waggy tail and loved to play with his friends one sunny day binky and his friends were playing catch with a big red ball as they played binkys tail got caught in a bush ouch he cried binkys friends heard him cry and came running to help whats wrong binky asked his friend a cute fluffy bunny named lulu my tail is stuck binky said with a sad face lulu and the other friends tried to help binky get his tail out of the bush they pulled and pulled but it was still stuck then a wise old owl named oliver flew down from a tall tree dont cry binky he said i can help you get your tail out oliver used his sharp beak to carefully cut the bush and free binkys tail binky was so happy he wagged his tail and said thank you oliver all the friends cheered and clapped then they went back to playing with the big red ball laughing and having fun together
once there was a little bunny he loved to bounce around he found a feather and picked it up the feather was very flexible the bunny wanted to show the feather to his friend so he bounced all the way to his friends house along the way he met other animals who wanted to try bouncing with the feather when the bunny got to his friends house they had so much fun together they bounced together with the feather making it spin and twirl through the air they laughed and laughed until it was almost dark before the bunny left he put his new feather inside his pocket so he could take it home from then on every time he wanted to play he knew he could get his feather out and they could have lots of fun bouncing and spinning together

once upon a time there was a little fish named blue blue lived in a stream with many other fish one day blue wanted to explore a different part of the stream so blue swam away from the other fish as blue swam the stream became narrower and the water moved faster suddenly blue saw a big rock in the middle of the stream blue tried to swim around the rock but the current was too strong blue got stuck behind the rock and couldnt move blue called out for help but no other fish were around blue remained stuck for a long time feeling scared and alone finally another fish named red came by and saw blue in trouble red swam over and helped blue get free from behind the rock from that day on blue and red became friends and explored the different parts of the stream together they knew that even though they were different they could still help each other when they needed it

sara liked to knit she had a big ball of yarn and two sticks she made loops with the yarn and the sticks she wanted to make a sweater for her doll she knitted and knitted the sweater got bigger and bigger she used more and more yarn the ball of yarn got smaller and smaller she hoped she had enough yarn to finish the sweater she looked at the sweater it was very big it was bigger than her doll it was bigger than her it was bigger than her bed she had made a mistake she had increased the loops too much she did not know how to fix it she was sad she had wasted all her yarn she had no sweater for her doll she had a giant sweater that she could not use she wished she had followed the original pattern she cried her mom came in she saw sara and the sweater she hugged sara and wiped her tears she said dont worry sara you did a great job you are very creative you made a unique sweater we can find a use for it maybe we can make a tent or a blanket or a rug or we can give it to someone who needs a big sweater you can always get more yarn and try again i am proud of you sara smiled she felt better she liked her mom she liked her sweater she was still a knitter she learned from her mistake she wanted to make a new sweater for her doll she asked her mom to help her they went to get more yarn and the original pattern they knitted together they had fun

tom and sam are friends they like to play in the park one day they see a man with a stick in his mouth the stick makes smoke tom and sam are curious hello man what is that tom asks this is a cigarette it helps me relax do you want to try the man says tom and sam shake their heads they know cigarettes are bad they make people sick and smell bad no thank you cigarettes are stupid they hurt your lungs and teeth we dont want to smoke sam says the man laughs he thinks tom and sam are silly he blows smoke in their faces tom and sam cough and run away hey come back dont be afraid smoking is cool you are missing out the man says tom and sam ignore him they find a bench and sit down they see a dog the dog is friendly he wags his tail and licks their hands tom and sam pet the dog they like the dog hello dog what is your name tom asks the dog barks he does not have a name he is a stray he is hungry and lonely can we be your friends sam asks the dog nods he is happy he likes tom and sam they share their snacks with him they play fetch with him they hug him you are a good dog we love you tom and sam say the dog loves them too he bites the mans cigarette and spits it out the man is angry he yells at the dog he tries to kick the dog tom and sam protect the dog they bite the mans leg the man screams and runs away good job dog you are brave you saved us from the smoke tom and sam say the dog barks he is proud he thanks tom and sam they thank him too they decide to adopt him they name him spot they take him home they give him a bath a bed and a collar they are a family the moral of the story is smoking is bad for you and others it is not cool or relaxing it is stupid and harmful friends are good for you and others they are not silly or afraid they are kind and helpful friends are the best
once upon a time there was a little fish named nemo nemo lived in a big ocean with his fish friends one day nemo saw a shiny oyster on the ocean floor he thought it was very pretty and wanted to show his friends nemo swam up to his friend dory and said look at this oyster its so attractive dory agreed and said it was very shiny nemo then had an idea he wanted to design a necklace with the oyster nemo and his friends worked together to design the necklace they found some seaweed to use as string and carefully placed the oyster on it when they were finished nemo put the necklace on and showed it to all his friends they all thought it was very pretty and were happy they could design something together

tom liked to play with worms he dug them out of the dirt and put them in a jar he was excited to show them to his mom and dad he thought they would be proud of him but when he got home his mom and dad were not happy they said worms were dirty and gross they said he had to quit playing with them and wash his hands they said he had to throw the jar away tom was sad and angry he did not want to quit playing with worms he did not want to throw them away he thought they were his friends he ran to his room and slammed the door he opened the jar and took out a worm he hugged it and said he was sorry he said he would never quit playing with it he said he loved it but the worm did not love tom the worm was scared and hurt the worm bit toms finger hard tom screamed and dropped the worm the worm crawled away and hid under the bed tom cried and ran to his mom and dad he said the worm was mean and bit him he said he hated worms he said he wanted a band aid his mom and dad hugged him and said they were sorry they said they would get him a band aid and a cookie they said they would help him find a better toy to play with but tom was still sad he had lost his worms and his finger hurt he wished he had quit playing with worms when his mom and dad told him to he learned a hard lesson
once upon a time there lived a big bear he was always very calm and never disturbed anyone but one day something changed a large university was built near his home and lots of people started to go there every day the bear was not happy about the noise and disturbance so he started to growl a lot and make his presence known he wanted the people to go away from his home at first the people were a bit scared so they stopped coming to the university but after a while they realised that the bear meant them no harm and they started to come back the big bear now lives peacefully in his home but he still keeps an eye on the large university just in case anyone tries to disturb him again

and showed his teeth he tried to look like a crocodile but the ducks were not scared they saw toms mouth they saw his teeth they saw something shiny it was toms coin tom had forgotten to put his coin once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to eat with her fork one day her mommy warned her to be careful with her fork because it was sharp lily listened to her mommy and ate her food slowly later that day lily went outside to play she saw a little bird lying on the ground the bird was not moving and lily knew it was dead she felt sad for the bird and wanted to bury it in the ground lilys mommy saw her digging a hole and asked what she was doing lily told her mommy about the dead bird and her mommy hugged her and said it was okay to feel sad they buried the bird together and said a little prayer
one day a girl named sue found a broken scarf she wanted to wear it but it had a big hole sue asked her mom can you fix this scarf please her mom said i can try but i need to find my sewing kit sue looked sad because she wanted to wear the scarf now she asked can i wear it even if it is broken her mom thought for a moment and said i permit you to wear it but be careful sue wore the broken scarf to the park she saw her friend tim tim saw the hole in the scarf and said your scarf is broken sue felt sad and said i know my mom will fix it later tim wanted to help so he said lets try to fix it now they tried to tie the scarf together but it did not work sue and tim felt sad later sues mom fixed the scarf sue was happy and showed tim the fixed scarf they both smiled and played at the park with the fixed scarf they were happy friends
tim and sam were brothers who liked to play in the woods they found a big log that was hollow and had many holes they thought it was a fun toy and started to poke it with sticks and stones look i can make a bigger hole tim said as he tore a piece of bark from the log me too sam said as he threw a rock at the log they did not know that the log was fragile and had many animals living inside a family of mice a nest of birds and a hive of bees were scared and angry by the noise and the damage stop stop a mouse squeaked as it ran out of the log you are hurting our home but tim and sam did not listen they laughed and kept tearing and throwing ouch ouch a bird chirped as it flew out of the log you are breaking our eggs but tim and sam did not care they thought it was fun and kept tearing and throwing buzz buzz a bee buzzed as it swarmed out of the log you are smashing our honey but tim and sam did not notice they were too busy tearing and throwing the bee was very angry and decided to teach them a lesson it stung tim on the nose and sam on the ear they cried and dropped their sticks and stones they ran away from the log holding their faces ow ow tim and sam sobbed as they ran back to their house that was not fun at all they learned that they should not tear and throw things that are not theirs they should respect the homes and lives of other creatures they should be kind and gentle not mean and rough
one day a small and pale spider went to play outside the spider was very happy because it was a sunny day the spider loved to jump from leaf to leaf while jumping the spider met a big red bug the bug said hey little spider lets play together the spider said yes lets play what do you want to play the bug said lets play hide and seek the spider and the bug started to play the spider hid behind a big rock the bug looked and looked but could not find the spider finally the bug said stop i give up where are you little spider the spider came out from behind the rock and said here i am i win the spider and the bug played all day long they became very good friends from that day on the pale spider and the big red bug played together every day
once upon a time there was a car called big red big red was old and rusty but it had a sweetheart of an engine every day big red would drive around the block looking for a special wheel one day big red found a wheel it was a big shiny wheel that glinted in the sun big red wanted it right away big red drove up to the wheel and stopped then big red opened his door and the driver who was a small rabbit popped out the rabbit looked at the wheel and said i want that wheel then the rabbit hopped onto the wheel and the wheel rolled away big red ran quickly after the wheel but the wheel was too fast big red was sad he wanted the wheel so much but then he heard a voice call out from behind him it was the wheel the wheel had stopped and it wanted big red to enter big red was so excited he quickly jumped into the wheel and raced away as they sped away the wind blew through big reds rusty old body giving him a feeling that was warm and sweet
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to play outside in the sunshine during the warm season but one day she fell into a puddle of mud and got very dirty her mommy said it was time to bathe and get clean lily didnt like the bitter taste of the soap but she loved the warm water and bubbles she splashed and played until she was all clean then her mommy wrapped her in a soft towel and gave her a big hug after her bath lily put on her favorite pajamas and snuggled up in bed she felt so cozy and happy knowing that she was clean and ready for a good nights sleep the end

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved playing in her backyard and picking flowers one day she saw a big truck coming down the street the truck had a sign that said delivery lily was curious about what the truck was delivering she waited patiently as the delivery man carried a big box into her neighbors house the delivery man was very friendly and gave lily a small packet of powder as a gift he said it was amazing and would make her feel happy lily didnt know what to do with the powder so she put it in her pocket and forgot about it a few days later her mom asked her to help with the laundry as she was putting clothes in the washing machine she saw the packet of powder in her pocket she remembered what the delivery man said and decided to put a little bit in the washing machine to her amazement the clothes came out smelling fresh and clean lily was so happy that she decided to use the powder every time she did laundry from that day on she looked forward to the delivery truck coming down her street hoping to receive more amazing gifts
once upon a time there was a girl named honey honey had light brown hair and always wore a pretty dress one sunny day honey went out to play in the park when she got there she saw a bee buzzing around the flowers honey said to the bee please stay and play with me but the bee was busy making honey so he flew away honey was sad she wanted to stay and play with the bee then a friendly butterfly landed on her shoulder honey said to the butterfly will you stay and play with me the butterfly said yes i will stay and play for a while so honey and the butterfly played together in the light of the sun they twirled and twirled around the flowers and honey was happy again

once upon a time there was a girl who liked to pick pretty plants the girl liked to pick the pretty plants and bring them home to her garden one day while the girl was picking some more plants she saw something strange in the dirt she bent down and saw that it was a tiny plant she was very excited and started to dig around it to pick it when the girl was finished picking the plant she took it home and planted it in her garden she put some water and sunshine on it and everyday she talked to it and took care of it she was very helpful to the little plant after a few weeks the little plant started to grow and the girl was very happy she loved caring for the little plant and soon it was bigger and stronger every day the girl would pick a few flowers from the plant and she would give them to her friends the girl was so happy that she had found a helpful little plant and she continued to take good care of it the end
once upon a time there were two best friends martin and ellen they were both 3 years old and were always playing together one day martin and ellen were playing together in the garden but something happened that made them both very sad martin had picked a flower from the flowerbed ellen said to him thats not nice you mustnt do that but martin didnt listen ellens dad saw what had happened and he was very angry he called out in a fierce voice martin that was not ok you need to be punished martin was very scared he started to cry he and ellens dad put their hands together and he said martin you must make a print of your hand with your finger so that you will remember next time that it is not ok to pick flowers martin made a print in the soft soil as a punishment and he promised he will never pick a flower again ellen and her dad hugged martin and they all went inside to have a nice warm drink
once upon a time there was a boy who was very curious he wanted to know how big everything was one day he got out a measure and decided to try it out the boy put the measure against the wall he looked very confused whats this he thought suddenly the boys dad appeared he said to the boy its a measure my son it helps you see how big things are the boy was pleased he rushed out and measured everything he saw the chair the table the tv even the cat he was so proud of himself the boy continued to measure things all day long he found out how big everything was and he laughed with delight the end

once upon a time there was a dependable surfboard every day the surfboard went to the beach with its friend a boy named peter together peter and the surfboard would have lots of fun peter would read to the surfboard they would read stories about brave dragons and funny monsters the surfboard loved it when peter read to her then peter would hold onto the surfboard as she carried him across the waves he would laugh as they raced through the water he knew the surfboard was dependable and would keep him safe at the end of the day they would sit together and watch the sun go down then they would go home happy and content the surfboard and peter were the best of friends and they were always there for each other
once upon a time there was a little bridge over a tiny river this bridge was very upset because it felt small and unimportant it saw the big bridges with cars and people and wished it could be like them one day a little bug with wings came to the bridge the bug was very tired and could not fly it needed to cross the river but it was too weak the little bridge saw the bug and said dont worry i can help you the bug blinked its eyes and smiled it walked across the bridge to the other side of the river the little bug thanked the bridge and said you may be small but you are very important to me the bridge felt happy and proud it understood that even though it was not big it could still help others the moral of the story is that no matter how small you are you can still make a difference
once upon a time there was a little mouse named timmy timmy lived in a small house in the forest with his family one day timmy went out to play and he saw a big factory in the distance he was curious and decided to go see what it was when he got closer to the factory he felt something tickling his nose suddenly he sneezed so loudly that he woke up the nearby animals a kind old owl saw timmy and asked him what was wrong timmy explained that he sneezed because of the smell coming from the factory the owl being very wise told timmy that the factory was making the air dirty and that it was not good for anyone timmy felt sad and wanted to help so he went back to his little house and told his family about the factory together they came up with a plan to talk to the humans who owned the factory and ask them to be more humble and stop polluting the air and they lived happily ever after

once there was a girl named madelyn she loved to explore and play in the forest near her house one day while she was walking around she heard a noise in the bush it was an animal that had a very long waist madelyn wanted to get closer to the animal and find out what it was so she insisted her mom and dad to take her to the forest when they got there madelyn saw that the animal was actually a little fox the fox was very curious and kept walking around almost like it wanted something madelyn asked her dad if they could bring the fox home and he said yes at home everyone was excited to have the fox as part of the family but since it was still very young it was important to teach the fox how to be useful madelyn and her dad spent lots of time training the fox and giving it commands like sit and stay the fox was a very fast learner and soon was able to help with small tasks around the house everyone was very impressed with how well the fox was doing and madelyn was proud of her furry friend from then on the fox and madelyn were inseparable and the fox was always willing to help and insist with anything that needed to be done
once upon a time a little girl named lily was playing in the park she saw a butterfly and wanted to catch it but she didnt know how suddenly a boy named jack came over and said i can help you catch the butterfly lily was happy and said thank you jack told her to be quiet and to move slowly he showed her how to pinch the butterflys wings gently so it wouldnt fly away just then they heard a loud noise it was an emergency they saw a fire truck driving past with its siren on the park was dry and the fire could spread quickly jack and lily knew they had to go home and tell their parents about the emergency they ran home as fast as they could and told their parents about the fire the parents called the fire department and soon the fire was put out jack and lily were happy that they could help in the emergency
once upon a time there was a lucky tuna he lived in the ocean and loved to swim around he wanted to become friends with everyone he saw one day while he was swimming he saw a small green fish the fish was looking sad so the tuna said hello the fish looked up with a surprised look and the two of them quickly became best friends they had lots of fun together playing games chasing each other and exploring the ocean whenever the tuna felt sad or lonely he would go see his friend one day the tuna felt really lucky he swam all around the ocean saying hello to everyone he saw and telling them how lucky he was from that day onwards tuna always felt happy and had lots of friends he was always so thankful for his luck and for his friend the little green fish
once upon a time there was a dependable goose every day the goose would go out to pick flowers for the people in the village the villagers were so grateful for the gooses kindness that they would all come out to applaud when they saw the goose come back with an armful of beautiful flowers even on the coldest of days the goose never failed to bring a smile to the villagers faces one winter all of the flowers died so the dependable goose couldnt pick them anymore the villagers were so disappointed that they went out to find another way to make the goose happy after a while they found the perfect gift a shiny new bell that the goose could wear around its neck every time the dependable goose heard the bell jingle it would remind him of how much the villagers appreciated him the villagers couldnt be happier they all cheered and applauded for the goose even the coldest of days couldnt stop them from being thankful for the shy but dependable goose from then on the goose was always the center of attention and the villagers always gave it an extra special round of applause
once upon a time there was a thin fisherman he was a very brave man who loved to fish every day he put on his hat grabbed his fishing rod and went out on the sea on this particular day he sailed out further than usual suddenly he heard a loud shrink sound he looked around but he couldnt see anything then he felt himself start to shrink he became so small that the fishing rod was too big for him he could still swim though suddenly he saw something floating in the water when he got closer he realised it was his hat he was so happy that he swam back to the boat as quickly as he could as he climbed back onto the boat he started to grow back to his normal size he still had the hat the shrinking was only a dream

here is one possible story but there are many other ways to write it tom was a farmer who had a big field of corn he liked to cut the corn when it was ripe and sell it at the market one day he saw a big truck with a scary machine on it the truck stopped near his field and a man got out hello farmer the man said i am here to buy your corn i will give you a lot of money for it tom was happy to hear that he wanted to have a lot of money to buy a new house and a new tractor he said yes to the man and went to get his papers but the man was not nice he was a liar and a thief he did not want to buy the corn he wanted to cut it and take it away for free when tom was not looking he turned on the scary machine and drove it into the field the machine had big blades that cut the corn very fast and put it in the truck tom heard the noise and ran back to the field he saw the man and the machine and the truck he was very angry and very sad he shouted at the man to stop but the man did not listen he kept cutting the corn and filling the truck tom tried to stop the man but he was too late the man had cut all the corn and drove away with the truck tom was left with nothing but a empty field and a broken heart he cried and cried and wished he had never trusted the man he learned a hard lesson that day not everyone is nice and some people are scary

once upon a time there was a brave lion who was going on an adventure he wanted to explore the jungle so he courageously headed out just a few minutes in the jungle he saw a strange bird who spoke to the lion why are you here the bird asked with a loud chirp the lion replied i am here to explore this brave jungle and be the bravest lion ever the bird felt impressed and proposed a game you need to find 10 pieces of fruit that are hidden in the jungle whoever finds them first will be the winner the lion thought about the offer he was sure that the game was too difficult for him so he lied to the bird i already have the 10 pieces of fruit i am done with the game the bird was disappointed but the lion was relieved he thanked the bird and bravely continued his adventure he learnt to be honest but also to be brave and never give up

tom and mia were twins who liked to play and explore one day they saw a big basket of pastries on the kitchen table they smelled sweet and yummy tom and mia wanted to try them but their mom said they had to wait until after lunch tom and mia were restless they could not stop thinking about the pastries they decided to sneak into the kitchen when their mom was busy they climbed on a chair and reached for the basket but the basket was too heavy and it fell on the floor with a loud bang their mom heard the noise and came running she saw the mess and the twins she was angry and sad tom and mia what have you done she asked you made a big mess and wasted the food you did not listen to me you have to say sorry and help me clean up tom and mia felt bad they knew they did something wrong they struggled to say sorry they did not like to see their mom angry and sad they helped her pick up the pastries and put them in the trash they also wiped the floor and the table their mom hugged them and said thank you for helping me i love you but you have to follow the rules the pastries were for a special occasion maybe next time i can make some for you but now you have to eat your lunch and take a nap tom and mia nodded they ate their lunch and went to their room they were tired and sleepy they learned their lesson they did not want to sneak into the kitchen again they dreamed of sweet and yummy pastries
once upon a time there was a brave bear he wanted to explore the world he looked around but all he saw was a cold landscape the bear was feeling a bit sad he didnt have anywhere to go so he decided to make a request he asked the wind to take him somewhere new the wind heard his request and became very excited it picked up the bear and blew him all around the world the bear got to see so many exciting places he saw mountains and canyons sandy beachs and icy glaciers every place he went was so different and exciting finally the wind brought him back home the bear thanked the wind for his adventure and ran off into the cold landscape he was so happy to be home
once upon a time there was a little green frog he was sitting in the pond and enjoying the sun suddenly he felt the earth shaking beneath him it was an earthquake he was scared and he began to hop around the pond help me he shouted i need someone to help me just then he saw a big green bird can you help me he asked the bird looked around and shook his head im sorry little frog he said but i cant help you i need to find a safe place before the earthquake gets worse the frog felt very sad and afraid he jumped around the pond looking for something or someone to help him but the earthquake was very strong and he couldnt find anyone suddenly it stopped and the frog was safe but he was sad hed needed help and he had been all alone
once upon a time in a big green forest there lived a brown deer the brown deer loved to run and play with his friends they would run and jump all day long the brown deer was very fast and no one could catch him one day the brown deer and his friends saw a big net they did not know what it was the brown deer was curious and wanted to see what it was his friends told him to be careful but the brown deer did not listen the next day the brown deer went to the big net again this time he got too close to the net and got caught his friends heard him call for help and came to save him they worked together to get the brown deer out of the net after that day the brown deer learned to be more careful and always listened to his friends
once upon a time there was a boy called tom who loved to fly he had a special kite with wings and every day he would go outside and soar high in the sky one day he was so high that he started to drift away from the land the wind was strong and he couldnt get back suddenly he felt something go loose and then he dropped down so fast that he couldnt even scream tom crash landed in the middle of the woods he was okay but the kite was broken and he had no idea where he was he was scared and started crying out for help just then a kind voice spoke out of the trees it was a big eagle who said dont be afraid tom youre very far away from home now and you have to find your way back im serious you have to be brave tom dried his tears hugged the eagle goodbye and started walking he kept walking and walking until he knew he was getting close to home eventually he dropped down exhausted onto the grass and smiled when he spotted his house in the distance he had made it home
once upon a time there was a very high tree inside the tree lived a little white kitten the kitten was sad and lonely and wanted to find a friend one day a kind boy named bob heard the kitten meowing bob wanted to help the kitten so he started to climb up the high tree he kept climbing and climbing until he reached the top when he arrived at the top he saw the kitten dont worry little kitty bob said im here to rescue you the kitten was so happy that someone had heard her cries bob carefully climbed down the tree with the kitten in his arms when the bob reached the ground he set the little kitten down on the grass the kitten purred happily and gave bob a big kitten hug bob and the kitten were best friends ever since

once upon a time there was a little boy called john john was three years old and liked to explore outside one day he went looking for mushrooms and found a large tasty one he couldnt wait to show his mum on the way home he heard a loud noise he looked around to see what it was and saw a man with a gun the man was shooting at a target on a tree john was scared and hid behind a bush johns mum had been looking for him and when she found him she said john why are you so scared guns are dangerous and can harm you thats why you shouldnt play with them john nodded and his mum said he needed to go to the hospital there the doctor used a special x ray machine to make sure john was safe john learned an important lesson that day never play with guns because they can be very dangerous he was so happy to find the tasty mushroom and he knew that exploring was safe as long as he was careful

sam was walking home when he saw an elderly lady he noticed that she was leaning against a post so he went to help her he held out his arm but the lady was so surprised she jumped back sam knew she was very scared and he felt sorry for her sam tried again and asked the lady if he could help she smiled and accepted his help she was very pleased and thanked sam many times sam asked the elderly lady where she wanted to go she pointed to a nearby house and thanked him again sam started to walk away but the lady stopped him she had a surprise for him she offered sam a bag of treats for being so kind sam was delighted to receive the treats he thanked the lady and waved goodbye sam went back home feeling proud he had helped an elderly lady and received a surprise in return he was very happy and had learned a good lesson

once upon a time there was a little bird named worry worry was a bitter bird because he did not have many friends he lived in a big tree with other birds but he was always sad and alone one day worry met a wise old owl named wisdom wisdom saw that worry was sad and asked why are you so bitter little bird worry told wisdom that he was sad because he did not have any friends wisdom thought for a moment and said to make friends you must be kind and share with others worry listened to wisdom and decided to try being kind and sharing with the other birds soon worry found that he had many friends and he was no longer a bitter bird worry was happy and he thanked wisdom for helping him learn how to make friends from that day on worry was always kind and shared with others and he lived happily with his new friends in the big tree

sam liked to run and play with his dog rex they would chase each other in the park and have fun one day sam saw a big hill and wanted to climb it he ran up the hill with rex but he did not know that the hill was very steep and slippery sam lost his balance and fell down the hill he rolled and rolled until he hit a rock he felt a sharp pain in his chest and could not breathe well rex barked and ran to him licking his face sam was scared and cried for help a lady who was walking by heard sam and rex she called 911 and waited with them until the ambulance came the paramedics put sam on a stretcher and gave him oxygen they told him he had hurt his lung and needed to go to the hospital sam held rexs paw and said he was sorry at the hospital the doctor checked sams lung and said he had a small tear he said sam would be fine but he had to stay in bed for a few days and take medicine he also said sam was lucky that rex was with him and that the lady helped him he said sam should be more careful next time and not run on slippery hills sam nodded and thanked the doctor he hugged rex and said he loved him he also said he regretted running up the hill and hurting his lung he learned his lesson and promised to be more safe he was glad he was fine and that rex was his best friend

once upon a time there was a big swamp with lots of mud and water it was a terrible place to go because there were scary creatures living there one day a little frog jumped into the swamp and started to play suddenly the frog saw a big bird flying above her the bird swooped down and tried to grab the frog with its sharp claws but the frog was too quick and jumped away the bird chased the frog around the swamp but then the frog vanished the bird searched and searched but the frog was gone from that day on the bird never came back to the terrible swamp again

once upon a time there was a bird the bird liked to fly high in the sky and feel the wind one day the bird decided to soar up into the clouds it flapped its wings and went higher and higher until it reached the top it felt happy and free up there but then the bird saw something strange it was a skull on the ground the bird wondered how it got there and why it looked so sad the bird decided to be brave and investigate it flew down to the ground and looked at the skull it was old and dusty and didnt look very tidy the bird felt sad for the skull and decided to clean it up it used its beak to pick up the skull and put it in a safe place the bird realized that even though it was small it could still do big things like help others and so the bird continued to soar in the sky feeling happy and proud of what it had done

once upon a time there was a girl named marcia she was 3 years old and lived with her family in a modern house she had a refrigerator in her kitchen that was very nice and shiny one day marcia was playing in her kitchen when she heard a funny noise coming from her refrigerator it sounded like it was talking to her she was very excited and said hello is anyone there the refrigerator replied yes im here would you like to play a game marcia said she would love to play a game the refrigerator said ok the game is very simple i will tell you a secret and you have to just listen without saying a word marcia was happy and excited at the same time she agreed to the game and wanted to hear the secret the refrigerator said there is delicious ice cream inside this nice modern refrigerator you can have it anytime you want marcia was very happy and opened the refrigerator door unfortunately she fell in and the door shut tight behind her she was trapped inside with no way to escape moral of the story always listen to your parents when they tell you something

once upon a time there was a big pink elephant who had a bright yellow spot on his back he liked to have fun and play all day one day he heard a ring coming from the nearby jungle he turned his head to look and saw a little dictionary dancing in the air he became so excited because it was so playful the elephant asked the dictionary what are you doing the dictionary responded in a sweet voice im ringing around and having fun the elephant smiled and said that sounds like fun let me join you the little dictionary and the pink elephant then began to ring around the jungle and had a great time all their friends stopped to watch the playful pair when they were tired they stopped to take a rest the elephant thanked the dictionary for such a fun day the dictionary said thank you that was so much fun we should do it again soon the elephant and dictionary then said their goodbyes and went their separate ways from that day onward they were the best of friends
