once upon a time there was a girl who loved to count she had a shiny green notebook in which she kept track of all her tallies every morning shed take out her notebook and count how many sweet things she had one day she found a basket of fresh apples in her garden she counted how many were in the basket and wrote the number down in her notebook then she counted how many sweet strawberries were growing in her backyard once the tally was done she wrote the number in her notebook too next the girl counted the birds that were flying in the sky there were so many it took her a little while to count them all when she was finished she wrote down the number of birds in her notebook at the end of the day the girl felt so proud of herself for all the counting shed done she looked through her notebook and smiled as she read the numbers written in its pages
sam liked to jog with his dad every morning they would jog around the park and see the birds the flowers and the big pond sam liked to jog fast and make his dad chase him he also liked to jog slow and talk to his dad one day they saw a man sitting on a bench with a pipe in his mouth the pipe smelled good like cookies and candy sam wanted to try it but his dad said no that pipe is not for kids sam it is bad for your teeth and your lungs you dont want to be sick do you his dad said no dad i dont want to be sick i want to be strong and healthy like you sam said good sam then lets jog some more and have a delicious breakfast when we get home how about some eggs and toast and fruit his dad said yum dad that sounds delicious i love eggs and toast and fruit sam said they jogged some more and left the park they did not see the man with the pipe again but they did not know that the man had dropped his pipe on the ground and that a dog had found it and chewed it the dog did not like the pipe it made him cough and sneeze and spit the dog ran away and left the pipe on the grass the next day a bird saw the pipe and thought it was a worm the bird picked up the pipe and flew away the bird did not like the pipe either it made him dizzy and sick the bird dropped the pipe in the pond the pipe sank to the bottom and stayed there no one ever saw the pipe again and sam and his dad jogged happily every morning
lily and ben were playing in the mud they liked to make pies and cakes with the wet dirt they laughed and clapped their hands when they finished their creations look at my pie lily it has worms and stones on it ben said yuck ben that is a filthy pie mine is better it has flowers and leaves on it lily said they decided to have a mud fight they threw mud at each other and got very dirty they had fun but they did not see their mom coming ben lily what are you doing you are covered in mud you ruined your clothes and shoes and look at this mess mom said she was very angry she grabbed a towel and tried to wipe them off but the towel was too small and the mud was too sticky she could not clean them you are both in big trouble you have to go to the bath right now and no more playing in the mud ever again mom said she dragged them to the house and put them in the tub she turned on the water and poured soap on them they cried and screamed they did not like the bath they wanted to play in the mud they were very unhappy the end
once upon a time there was a little girl called lucy lucy liked to explore the world around her one day she saw a stick in the garden she picked it up and held it tightly she wanted to remember the stick forever suddenly a hole opened up in the ground the hole was very deep lucy dropped the stick inside the hole and it disappeared she was sad because she could no longer remember the stick but then a funny thing happened the stick flew out from the deep hole and back into her hands lucy was so happy to remember the stick again she held it close and thanked the hole for bringing her stick back the end
once upon a time there was a big strong tree he was very intelligent and could remember lots of things that had happened in the past one day a three year old boy called timmy went up to the tree he said to the tree hello the tree replied hello timmy what can i do for you timmy asked can you tell me a story the tree thought for a moment and then said yes i remember an old story the tree began to tell timmy an exciting story about a knight who fought many battles and went on many adventures timmy listened very carefully and was amazed by the story when the tree finished the story timmy said that was wonderful thank you very much the tree smiled and said it was my pleasure timmy remember being intelligent can help you in life timmy smiled and said i will remember that with that timmy waved goodbye to the tree and went home
once upon a time there was a happy boy named max max loved to play catch with his friends one day max was playing catch with his friend jack when jack threw the ball too hard and it went over the fence max was sad because he couldnt catch the ball max went to get a spoon from his house he thought he could use the spoon to get the ball back when max got back to the fence he tried to catch the ball with the spoon but the spoon was too small and the ball was too big just then maxs cheerful neighbor came over and saw what was happening she said dont worry max i can help you catch the ball the neighbor got a ladder and climbed over the fence she caught the ball and gave it back to max max was so happy and thanked his neighbor from that day on max always remembered to be cheerful and helpful to his friends
anna liked to swim in the sea with her dad they wore masks and fins to see the fish and the reef the reef was a big rock under the water with many colors and shapes anna saw yellow blue pink and green fish she also saw a star a turtle and a crab anna and her dad had a tube in their mouths the tube was connected to a tank on their backs the tank had air inside the tube gave them air to breathe under the water the tube and the tank were their supply of air one day anna and her dad saw a big fish with a pointy nose and a fin on its back it was a shark the shark was not friendly it swam fast and made loud noises it wanted to eat the fish and the reef anna and her dad were scared they did not want to be eaten by the shark anna and her dad swam away from the shark they looked for a safe place to hide they found a hole in the reef they went inside the hole the hole was dark and quiet they waited for the shark to go away after a while they heard no more loud noises they looked outside the hole the shark was gone they saw the fish and the reef again they were happy and relieved they smiled at each other they swam back to the boat they took off their masks fins tubes and tanks they hugged and thanked each other they had a fun and exciting adventure they loved the sea and the reef
tom and lily were playing in the garden they liked to build things with bricks they had many bricks of different colors and shapes they made a house a tower a bridge and a wall look at my house tom said it has a door and a window and a roof it is very big and strong it is nice tom lily said but look at my tower it is very tall and light it has many bricks that shine in the sun i polish them every day with a cloth they are very pretty tom looked at lilys tower he saw that her bricks were light and shiny he wanted to have some too he thought of a plan lily can i borrow some of your bricks he asked i want to make my house bigger and lighter ok tom you can borrow some lily said but you have to give them back when we are done playing and you have to polish them too they are my special bricks tom agreed he took some of lilys bricks and added them to his house he made his door and window and roof light and shiny he was happy with his house but he did not polish the bricks he did not have a cloth he did not care he thought lily would not notice lily finished her tower she looked at toms house she saw that he had used some of her bricks she saw that they were not polished they were dirty and dull she was angry with tom tom you did not polish my bricks she shouted you made them dirty and dull you broke your promise give them back to me now tom was surprised he did not think lily would mind he did not want to give them back he liked his house no lily i will not give them back he said they are my bricks now i used them for my house my house is better than your tower go away lily and tom started to fight they pulled and pushed and shouted they knocked down their house and tower and bridge and wall they made a big mess with the bricks their mom heard the noise she came to the garden she saw the mess and the fight she was not happy lily and tom what are you doing she asked why are you fighting why are you making a mess with the bricks lily and tom stopped fighting they looked at their mom they felt ashamed they did not know what to say mom helped them clean up the mess she made them share the bricks she made them say sorry to each other she made them hug and make up lily and tom learned their lesson they learned to be nice and fair and honest they learned to polish their bricks they learned to play together they were happy again
once upon a time there was a pebble called red red was special because it was the only pebble in the whole wide world that was red red liked being different but it made him lonely sometimes one day red was laying in the sun in the park when he blinked when he opened his eyes he saw something strange a pebble next to him was no longer grey but red just like red was red was very surprised and a bit jealous he wanted to be the only pebble who was red in the whole wide world red blinked and blinked not sure what to do finally red made a decision he got up and said hello to the red pebble the red pebble said hello back so red smiled the two pebbles became friends and red no longer felt so lonely
once there was a young girl named sally sally was very competitive and loved to play games with her friends one day sally was playing with a few of her friends in the park when she noticed a big tree she noticed something shiny in the tree trunk so she decided to climb it up and take a look when she got to the top she saw a tiny jar with a small metal lid she opened it and a white puff of smoke came out and floated away suddenly sally started to feel strange she felt her body get smaller and smaller she was shrinking whats happening sally asked a voice said youve had your wish granted youre shrinking sally looked around and saw her friends were growing while she was shrinking they were now much bigger than her sally was now the same size as a three year old she was so excited she couldnt wait to go home and show her friends when she arrived at home she found that everything was much bigger than it used to be she was now so small it was easier to run around and play all the competitive games she loved it was like a dream come true

lila and sam were best friends they liked to play in the park with their kites one day they found a big red kite in a tree it was stuck on a branch wow look at that kite sam said it is incredible can we get it lila nodded she had an idea she saw a cherry tree near the kite the cherries were ripe and juicy she picked some and put them in her pocket follow me she said to sam we can use the cherries to help us they climbed the cherry tree careful not to fall they reached the branch where the kite was lila threw a cherry at the kite it hit the string and made it loose the kite fell to the ground yay we did it sam cheered lets fly the kite they ran to the kite and picked it up it was bigger than them they tied a long string to it and ran across the grass the wind lifted the kite and made it soar in the sky it looked like a bird lila and sam smiled they felt happy they shared the cherries and watched the kite soar they had a fun day

once upon a time there was a lonely bear called tabby tabby had no friends and felt very sad every day tabby looked out of her chamber wishing she could find some friends to play with one day as tabby was looking out at the forest she spotted a rabbit tabby was so excited and quickly hopped out of her chamber she raced up to the rabbit and asked if they could be friends the rabbit didnt like tabby so they started to tease her tabby felt embarrassed and ran away she ran through the forest until she couldnt run any further tabby hid in a cave and stayed there for a long time she was so lonely tabby missed her chamber and wanted to go home but she was too scared of seeing the rabbit again eventually tabby knew she had to face the rabbit so she bravely returned to her chamber but the rabbit was still there tabby was very scared and the rabbit kept on teasing her tabby was so sad and lonely she never went back out of her chamber again

once upon a time there was a prince he was very impatient he wanted to gain more power so he set out on a journey one day he came across an old woman who said to him if you want to gain power you must go to the far away mountain so he set off to the mountain when he reached the mountain the old woman met him again this time she said you must wait sixteen days and the power will be yours the prince was very impatient and he was not worried about waiting he wanted power right away so he decided to take a shortcut he looked for a magical flower to use so he could gain power in fewer days after a few days he found the flower he was eager to get his power but then something bad happened he slipped and fell into a deep pit and he died moral of the story patience is a virtue
ben and lily were twins who liked to play with their toys they had a big box where they kept their toys and they had a key to unlock the box sometimes they shared their toys and sometimes they fought over them one day ben found a cane in the box it was a long stick with a curve at the end he thought it was fun to pretend he was a pirate with the cane he said arrr matey im the captain of the ship give me your treasure or walk the plank lily wanted to play with the cane too she was jealous of ben she said no i want to be the pirate you can be the parrot give me the cane or ill tickle you ben did not want to give up the cane he said no its mine i found it first you cant have it or ill poke you they started to tug on the cane pulling it back and forth they did not see their grandma coming into the room she was using a cane to walk because her legs were old and sore she saw the twins fighting over her cane she said hey hey hey what are you doing with my cane thats not a toy thats my helper give it back to me please ben and lily stopped fighting they felt sorry for taking their grandmas cane they said sorry grandma we didnt know it was yours we thought it was a toy here you can have it back they gave the cane back to their grandma she smiled and thanked them she said its okay my dears i know you were just playing but next time ask me before you take something that belongs to me and remember to share your toys with each other how about we play a game together i can be the pirate and you can be my crew how does that sound ben and lily nodded and agreed they were happy to play with their grandma they unlocked the box and took out some hats and scarves and coins they put them on and followed their grandma to the living room they pretended they were on a ship sailing the seas and looking for treasure they had fun and forgot about being jealous
once upon a time there was a stubborn puppy who lived in a pink house he wanted to go on adventures but his owner warned him not to go near the dark tunnel but the puppy did not listen one day he snuck away and started exploring he was excited to see what would happen if he went inside the tunnel the puppy crept closer and closer until he was standing at the entrance he took a deep breath and stepped inside deep inside the entrance was dark and scary the puppy was scared but he was stubborn he kept walking until he reached the end of the tunnel when the puppy came out of the other side of the tunnel everything was so different he was so happy with his adventure that he quickly forgot the warning the puppy ran back home and told his owner all about his wild adventure the owner was so happy to see the puppy safe and sound he scolded the puppy for not listening but still gave him a big hug
one day a little boy named tim went for a walk in nature he saw many trees flowers and animals he heard a mysterious sound that went ring ring ring tim was scared but curious so he followed the sound he found a little bird who was making the sound the bird said i lost my mom can you help me find her tim wanted to help so they went to look for the birds mom together they looked all around but could not find the mom then they heard another ring ring ring sound the little bird became happy and said thats my mom they followed the sound and found the mom the two birds were very happy and tim felt good for helping his new friends
once upon a time there was a group of eager toddlers they were always on the lookout for any fun activity that they could do together one day they gathered around their teacher and asked teacher can we do something fun their teacher smiled and said yes why dont you rub your tummies with both hands the toddlers were excited and started to rub their tummies none of them wanted to stop so they kept going and going they rubbed and rubbed until they started to get tired suddenly one of the toddlers got too eager and he rubbed so hard that he started to cry the others in the group immediately stopped and they gathered around their crying friend the teacher came to the rescue she knelt down and comforted the toddler while gently taking his hands away from his tummy she said its ok you can be eager but you must be gentle the group of toddlers looked relieved and they all promised to be more gentle when rubbing their tummies the group went back to having fun together
one day a little boy named tim went to the park with his mom there he saw a big tree with a cone on the ground he picked up the cone and looked at it tim was an intelligent boy so he knew it came from the tree he saw a squirrel on the tree and said hi squirrel look at this cone i found the squirrel leaned down from the tree branch and looked at the cone tim was holding the squirrel liked the cone and wanted to play with it too tim and the squirrel played with the cone rolling it on the ground and throwing it in the air they had lots of fun together when it was time to go home tim put the cone back under the tree and said goodbye to his new squirrel friend

once upon a time there was a little bird named blue blue was very intelligent and loved to fly around the forest blue had many friends but he always wanted to have more one day blue saw a big bird with many feathers blue thought to himself i want to be friends with that bird so blue planned to impress the big bird with his flying skills blue practiced every day and became very good at flying he finally felt ready to show off his skills to the big bird blue flew up high in the sky and did many tricks the big bird was impressed and they became friends however blues other friends were not happy that he had a new friend they started to argue and fight with blue blue tried to make peace between his friends but it did not work one day blue was flying with his new friend when a storm came blues friends were stuck in the storm and blue had to choose who to help blue chose to help his new friend and left his old friends behind in the end blue realized that his plan to impress the big bird was not worth losing his old friends blue was sad and alone without his friends he learned that true peace and happiness come from being kind to others and not just trying to impress them

the veil and pretend to be a bride too one day when sara was not at home lena sneaked into her room and found the veil on the bed she put it on her head and looked at herself in the mirror she felt very pretty and happy she started to rock back and forth humming a song she did not notice that the veil was getting caught on the bedpost suddenly she heard saras voice outside the door lena what are you doing in my room sara asked sounding angry lena got scared and tried to run away but the veil was stuck she pulled hard and ripped the veil in half she dropped it on the floor and ran to her room crying sara came in and saw the torn veil she was very sad and angry she had saved a lot of money to buy the veil and now it was ruined she went to lenas room and knocked on the door lena how could you do this you know how much this veil means to me you are very naughty and selfish you have to say sorry and help me fix it sara said sternly lena opened the door and looked at sara with tearful eyes she felt very sorry and ashamed she knew she had done a bad thing she hugged sara and said im sorry sara i just wanted to be like you you are so pretty and happy i love you sara please dont be mad at me i will help you fix the veil i will do anything to make you happy sara hugged lena back and said i love you too lena i know you didnt mean to hurt me you are also pretty and happy in your own way you dont have to be like me you have to be yourself and you have to respect other peoples things you cant take them without asking that is not nice do you understand lena nodded and said i understand sara im sorry i will never do it again can we still be friends sara smiled and said of course we can you are my sister and my friend come on lets go and see if we can fix the veil together maybe we can make it even more beautiful the end moral value the story teaches the value of respect honesty apology forgiveness and love it shows that taking other peoples things without permission is wrong and can cause harm it also shows that everyone is unique and special and does not have to imitate others it also shows that siblings can overcome conflicts and help each other

tom and lily wanted to buy a flashlight they liked to play with flashlights in the dark they had some money from their piggy bank they asked their mom if they could go to the store mom said yes but they had to be careful and come back soon she gave them a big hug and a kiss tom and lily put on their coats and shoes they took their money and walked to the store at the store they saw many flashlights some were big some were small some were red some were blue they looked at all of them they liked a small yellow flashlight it was shiny and bright they asked the store lady how much it was the store lady said it was five dollars tom and lily counted their money they had four dollars and fifty cents they were sad they did not have enough money then they saw a naughty boy he was sneaking behind the store lady he grabbed a big green flashlight and ran away he did not pay for it he was stealing tom and lily saw what he did they were shocked they knew stealing was very bad they decided to tell the store lady they ran to the store lady and said excuse us miss we saw a naughty boy he took a flashlight and ran away he did not give you any money he was stealing the store lady was surprised and angry she thanked tom and lily for telling her she said they were very good and honest she said she would call the police and find the naughty boy then she said you know what you can have the yellow flashlight for free you deserve it you are very brave and kind tom and lily were very happy they thanked the store lady and hugged her they took the yellow flashlight and ran back home they showed their mom their new flashlight they told her what happened at the store mom was very proud of them she said they did the right thing she said they could play with the flashlight in the dark she said she loved them very much tom and lily smiled and hugged her they said they loved her too they turned on the flashlight and had fun

sara and ben are playing in the garden they like to dig in the dirt and look for bugs sara has a small shovel and ben has a big spoon look sara i found a worm ben says holding up his spoon with a long slimy thing on it wow ben thats a big worm sara says leaning closer to see can i pick it up sure sara you can pick it up but be gentle dont hurt the worm ben says handing her the spoon sara takes the spoon and carefully picks up the worm she feels it wriggle in her hand she giggles and shows it to ben hello worm im sara you are a modest worm not loud or flashy i like you sara says talking to the worm the worm doesnt say anything but it seems to like sara too it curls up in her palm and tickles her skin can we keep the worm ben can we make it a pet sara asks looking at ben with big eyes ben thinks for a moment he likes the worm too but he knows that worms need dirt and water to live i dont think we can keep the worm sara the worm belongs in the garden not in a jar or a box the worm needs to eat and breathe and make more worms if we keep the worm it might get sick or sad ben says trying to explain sara feels sad too she likes the worm but she doesnt want to make it unhappy okay ben you are right we should let the worm go but can we say goodbye to the worm first sara asks holding the worm close to her face of course sara we can say goodbye to the worm maybe we can see it again another day ben says smiling sara and ben say goodbye to the worm and thank it for being their friend then they put the worm back in the dirt and cover it with some leaves they wave to the worm and go back to their digging they hope to find more modest worms and other bugs in the garden

once upon a time there was a nice little fish named nemo nemo loved to swim in the ocean and play with his friends one day while swimming nemo saw a jellyfish the jellyfish was big and wobbly and made nemo tremble with fear nemos friend a nice starfish named patrick saw that nemo was scared and came to help patrick explained to nemo that the jellyfish was not scary but actually very beautiful the jellyfish had long flowing tentacles that moved gently in the water nemo and patrick swam closer to the jellyfish and saw that it was indeed very pretty the jellyfishs colors were bright and it glowed in the sunlight nemo and patrick were no longer afraid and they swam around the jellyfish admiring its beauty from that day on nemo and patrick knew that even scary things can be nice and beautiful

john saw a fat frog in the yard he wanted to touch it but he was scared he watched it hopping from one side to the other he wanted to get closer so he slowly approached suddenly the frog struck its tongue out and john jumped back he was so surprised that he ran back to the house after a while john built up the courage to go back to the yard this time with his mom they both watched the frog and saw it catch a bug with its tongue john felt brave and he asked his mom if he could touch the frog she said he could but only if he did it very carefully so john slowly reached out and brushed his finger against the fat frog tms shell the frog didnt strike its tongue out again and john was so happy that he cheered his mom cheered too

once upon a time there was a mighty workman he was strong and worked very hard all day long but one day he found a task that was too much for him the workman stopped to rest on the side of the work he was very tired then he saw a little ant the workman asked the ant do you have any ideas on how to finish my work its too much for me to do on my own the ant replied it may take time and hard work but if you try hard to yield you can do it the workman smiled and thanked the ant he knew he had a lot of work to do but he said that even he could do mighty things with a lot of hard work and effort the workman continued his work and with each task he completed he felt stronger he kept going until he had finished the task he smiled with pride realizing that there was nothing too hard or too big for him the moral of the story is that with a lot of hard work and effort even the mighty can yield when faced with a challenge

once upon a time there lived a lively young reindeer in the north pole he was always so excited about the snow and he loved playing out in the cold one day he decided to go off into the snow and explore so off he went exploring the snow and having fun but suddenly he noticed something he hadnt seen before a big deep hole in the snow he went over to have a look and noticed it was full of ice just then his mother noticed what was happening and called out to him she warned him to stay away from the hole and said dont go too close the ice is too cold for a reindeer like you the young reindeer listened carefully and promised to stay away from the deep and chilly hole he thanked his mother for her warning and promised to be more careful from then on the lively reindeer was much more cautious and kept a safe distance from the deep icy hole he kept a smile on his face and continued exploring the snow the end

prince ben ben put on a blue shirt and a hat he said i am a prince you are my princess lily they pretended to have a tea party with their stuffed animals they had fun and laughed but then they heard a loud knock on the door it was their mom she said lily and ben its time to go we have to visit grandma hurry up and change your clothes lily and ben looked at each other they did not want to go they liked their clothes they said no mom we want to stay we like our clothes they are unusual and pretty mom said no lily and ben you have to go grandma is waiting for us you cant wear those clothes they are not suitable for visiting change your clothes now lily and ben started to panic they did not know what to do they did not want to change their clothes they did not want to leave their toys they did not want to upset mom they did not want to make grandma sad they felt scared and confused they cried and shouted they said no no no mom came into the room she saw lily and ben crying and shouting she saw their clothes and toys she felt sorry for them she said lily and ben i understand you are having fun you like your clothes you like your toys but you have to go grandma loves you she wants to see you she has a surprise for you you can wear your clothes and bring your toys later but now you have to change your clothes and come with me please lily and ben dont cry dont shout be good lily and ben looked at mom they saw her face she was not angry she was kind they felt sorry for mom they said okay mom we will change our clothes we will go with you we love you we love grandma we are sorry mom smiled and hugged them she said thank you lily and ben you are good i love you grandma will be happy come on lets go lily and ben changed their clothes they put on their usual clothes they were not as pretty as their unusual clothes but they were suitable for visiting they packed their toys in a bag they said goodbye to their stuffed animals they went with mom to the car they were still sad but they were also curious they wondered what the surprise was they hoped it was something fun the moral value of the story is sometimes we have to do things we dont like or want to do but we have to be respectful and obedient to our parents and elders they know what is best for us and they love us we can still have fun and be creative later but we have to follow the rules and be polite first

john was a curious little boy he liked to wander around and explore new places one day he decided to explore the living room in his home there were many things to discover books toys a big tv and interesting looking objects john saw a plate on the shelf it was colourful and round and it looked so inviting he decided to pick it up and take a closer look it was thick and it had pictures on it he couldnt help but touch it he felt the smoothness of its edges and was delighted with his find he continued to wander around the living room eventually deciding to put the plate back on the shelf with an air of satisfaction he was glad he had gone exploring
sara and ben were best friends they liked to play in the park every day they had a ball a bike and a kite they shared their toys and had fun one day they saw a big sign in the park it said keep the park tidy put your trash in the bin sara and ben nodded they wanted to help keep the park clean they played with their ball for a while they kicked it threw it and caught it then they wanted to play with their bike sara said lets skip to the bike skipping is fun ben agreed they skipped to the bike holding hands but when they got to the bike they saw something bad someone had left a lot of trash on the grass there were cans wrappers and bottles sara and ben felt sad and angry they said who did this this is not tidy this is not nice they looked around and saw a boy he was holding a can of soda he was about to throw it on the ground sara and ben ran to him they said stop dont do that you have to put your trash in the bin thats the rule if you dont the park will be dirty and the animals will be sick the boy looked at them he felt ashamed he said im sorry i didnt know i was just lazy i wont do it again he took his can and walked to the bin he threw it inside he said thank you for telling me can i play with you sara and ben smiled they said sure you can play with us but you have to be tidy and share the boy nodded he said ok i will what do you want to play sara said how about kite we have a nice kite we can take turns to fly it ben said good idea lets go they gave the boy a pass to join their group they skipped to the kite holding hands they flew the kite high in the sky they were happy and proud they had made a new friend and kept the park tidy

mia and leo love to dance they dance in the house in the park and in the school they dance when they are happy when they are sad and when they are bored they dance with their feet their hands and their heads one day they see a big road with many cars and buses they want to dance on the road but they know it is not safe they wait for the green light and the white man then they cross the road with their mom and dad on the other side of the road they see a rare thing it is a big truck with many colors and shapes it has a sign that says circus they hear music and laughter they see people and animals they want to see the circus but they do not have tickets they ask their mom and dad if they can go to the circus their mom and dad say no they do not have money for the circus they say they can watch from outside but they have to be careful mia and leo are sad but they do not cry they see a clown with a red nose and a big smile he sees them and waves he says hello little dancers do you want to join me he takes out two hats and two canes he gives them to mia and leo he says follow me i will show you a trick he leads them to a small stage near the truck he says ladies and gentlemen boys and girls welcome to the circus today we have a special show for you we have two amazing dancers who will make you laugh and clap please give a big hand to mia and leo mia and leo are surprised but they are not scared they put on the hats and hold the canes they follow the clown and dance with him they dance fast and slow high and low left and right they make funny faces and silly noises they have fun and make everyone happy the people in the truck and outside the truck clap and cheer they say bravo mia and leo you are great dancers mia and leo smile and bow they thank the clown and give him back the hats and canes they hug their mom and dad they say we love to dance they are happy they dance all the way home
once upon a time there was a small mouse living in a nice warm cave he was always very curious and he questioned a lot of things one evening he decided to go out of his cave so he could explore the world on his adventure he came across a big bird who was flying high in the sky the bird asked him where are you going mouse the mouse replied i am going exploring i have an urge to explore the world the bird said things can be dangerous out there be careful no matter how small you are your courage can take you far the mouse nodded and said of course i will always be careful the bird smiled and said good be brave and never be afraid of asking questions the mouse smiled and said thank you for the advice from then on the mouse kept what the bird said in mind and with his newfound courage and willingness to ask questions he was able to explore the world without any harm the moral of the story is that even something small and timid can be very brave and strong if it questions and asks for advice
john was a little boy he loved to run every morning he would get up and run outside to the big green park he was so fast no one could catch him one day john saw something that he had never seen before in the middle of the park was a giant green knot he had never seen a knot so big he wanted to know what it was and so he ran over to it john was very curious so he slowly reached out and touched it all of a sudden the knot slowly started to bounce and wiggle john was so surprised that he started to giggle and run away he ran and ran until he finally got tired and stopped he looked back and the knot was gone he was so excited that he could not stop smiling he ran back home and told everyone about the big green knot he had found

once upon a time there was a cute little crane that lived in a big pond every morning the crane would fly around and look for food but one day something special happened the sky started to glow with a magical light it was the most beautiful thing the crane had ever seen the crane flew into the sky to get closer and as it flew the light kept growing brighter and brighter the crane kept going higher and higher until it reached the source of the light it was the most beautiful thing the crane had ever seen it was a bright colourful star that was glowing in the night sky the star lit up the entire pond and the crane felt so happy the crane flew around the star for hours enjoying the magical light then the star started to slowly fade and the crane knew it was time to go but it would never forget the cute little star and its magical glow

once there was a boy named bob he was not very wealthy but he was happy one day bob was walking in the park and he saw a big fluffy cloud in the sky he thought it looked so soft and snugly that he wanted to steal it so bob reached up high and tried to grab the cloud but it was too far away bob was sad and he thought he could never get the cloud a kindly wealthy man saw bob and said i can help you bob the man pulled a long stick out of his coat and gave it to bob he said now you can reach the cloud bob took the stick and swung it up to the sky he had never seen anything so beautiful he grabbed hold of the cloud and held tight before the man could say a word bob ran off with his stolen cloud bob was so happy he ran around laughing and twirling all day with his new cloud close to him he showed it to his friends who all thought it was the best cloud ever and bob never felt so happy and wealthy

lily was a little dog who loved to play she had many toys but her favorite was a big bone she liked to chew it bury it and dig it up again she had the bone for a long time and it was very old and dirty one day lilys mom came home with a surprise she had a bag in her hand and she said lily i have something for you its a new bone she opened the bag and showed lily a shiny white bone it looked very tasty and fun lily was very happy she ran to her mom and licked her face she took the new bone in her mouth and wagged her tail she wanted to play with it right away she ran to the yard and found a good spot to bury it but as she was digging she saw something it was her old bone it was still there under the dirt lily stopped digging and looked at the two bones she felt confused she liked her new bone but she also liked her old bone she didnt want to lose either of them she dropped the new bone and picked up the old bone she looked at it and sniffed it it smelled like her she felt happy and sad at the same time she didnt know what to do she carried the old bone back to the house she saw her mom sitting on the couch she went to her and put the old bone on her lap she looked at her mom with big eyes and said mom i love you and i love my new bone but i also love my old bone can i keep both of them please her mom smiled and hugged her she said of course lily you can keep both of them they are both yours you are a very good and sweet dog and i love you too lily wagged her tail and licked her moms face she felt very happy she had two bones and a mom who loved her she yawned and curled up on the couch she put her head on the old bone and held the new bone with her paw she closed her eyes and fell asleep she had a very good day

once upon a time there was a big broken castle a little girl named lily lived in the castle with her friend a small dog named max one day they found a big red ball in the castle max lets play with the ball said lily but max didnt want to play he barked and ran away lily felt sad and didnt know why max ignored her she went to look for him in the castle lily found max in a small room he was looking at a broken toy lily understood that max was sad too she said max im sorry i ignored your feelings lets fix the toy together they worked together and fixed the broken toy after fixing the toy they played with the big red ball they learned that they should not ignore each others feelings and they lived happily in the big broken castle
once upon a time there was a little girl called jane she lived in a small village and loved to explore one day jane decided to explore somewhere far away so she said goodbye to her family and set off on an adventure after walking for ages jane came to a very distant village she looked around and saw some incredible things the village was full of beautiful flowers friendly animals and happy people suddenly jane heard a strange noise behind her she looked back and saw a giant bear he let out a loud roar that seemed to shake the ground beneath them the bear slowly began to move towards jane so she cried out for help a nearby farmer heard her cries and quickly ran over to the bear he reached out and squeezed the bears nose the bear let out a small whimper and slowly backed away jane was safe once again she thanked the brave farmer for saving her and he smiled back they both returned to their villages and never saw each other again but to this day jane still remembers the distant village and the brave farmer who saved her
once upon a time there was a tired little bear he had worked so hard all day and now he needed to relax he looked for the perfect spot and finally he found it a cozy bed high up in a tree but when he tried to lay down he noticed something the bed was too small for him the bear was very frustrated but then he heard an old wise owl nearby you have worked hard today said the owl but to rest you must find a bed that is the right size the bear thanked the owl and set off to look for the right bed when he finally found it he was so happy and perfect size he flopped onto it and found the best sleep he had ever had the moral of the story is that even when we are tired if we take the time to find the right thing it can bring us the rest and relaxation that we need

once upon a time there was a famous bear called bob he loved to draw on the blackboard in his house every day he created colourful pictures of suns and stars trees and animals one day bob saw a bee flying by and decided he wanted to try drawing one too he got out his chalk and started to draw on the blackboard as he was drawing the chalk got caught in the blackboard and broke in half bob was very sad he wanted to finish the bee so he tried to take the broken piece out of the blackboard in the process bob suffered a cut on his arm bob tms neighbour a mouse saw what had happened and ran to him oh bob are you okay the mouse asked bob shook his head and said i suffered a cut i was so excited to draw the bee the mouse smiled and said i know the feeling just go slowly and carefully next time and remember you tmre a famous bear bob thanked the mouse and then slowly and carefully carried on finishing his bee picture

once upon a time there was a furry rabbit named carrot he had a special gift he could unpack vegetables his friends were amazed one day carrots friends challenged him to unpack a big bag of vegetables carrot said he could do it and he set to work using his special gift carrot unpacked the big bag of vegetables he was so fast it almost seemed like magic the vegetables were now all out of the bag and spread out on the ground carrots friends were so impressed they had never seen anyone unpack vegetables so quickly before carrot was happy that he had been able to help his friends the moral of the story is with hard work and dedication anything is possible

once there was a girl named jane who was 3 years old she was playing in her living room when she came across a beautiful vase she adored the vase because it was so big and original she wanted to keep it so she picked it up and hugged it tight suddenly jane noticed a sign near the bottom of the vase it said do not touch she felt a little scared and confused and decided to put the vase back as she did she shrugged her shoulders because she didnt know what to do the next day janes mom asked her why she had taken the vase jane didnt know so she shrugged her shoulders again her mom laughed and explained to her that the vase was very special and that it was the original vase she had gotten for her wedding day jane was so glad she hadnt kept the special vase and she was happy to know that her mom didnt mind from then on she was more careful when touching things she didnt own and she always shrugged her shoulders when she was feeling unsure

once upon a time there was a lazy cat named tom tom liked to sleep all day and didnt like to play with his friends one day toms friend jerry came to visit him jerry was a little mouse who liked to play and have fun hey tom do you want to play with me asked jerry no im too lazy to play replied tom jerry didnt give up and tried to convince tom to play with him come on tom lets crawl under the sofa and play hide and seek said jerry tom thought for a moment and finally agreed to play they crawled under the sofa and started to play suddenly they heard a loud noise it was an arrow that had hit the wall behind them they were scared and quickly crawled out from under the sofa lets go play somewhere else its not safe here said jerry tom agreed and they went to play outside they had a lot of fun and tom realized that playing with friends was much better than sleeping all day from that day on tom was never lazy again and always played with his friends

one day a little boy named tom went to the park with his mom he saw a big rocket on a hill he wanted to go inside and fly to the moon he ran to the rocket and climbed in he pushed some buttons and pulled some levers the rocket started to make loud noises and smoke tom come back his mom shouted that rocket is not for playing it is dangerous but tom did not listen he was too excited he looked out the window and saw the earth getting smaller and smaller he saw the blue sky and the white clouds he saw the bright sun and the dark stars he felt like an astronaut but then he felt something else he felt scared he did not know how to fly the rocket he did not know how to go back to the park he did not know how to see his mom again he started to cry he wished he had listened to his mom he stared at the earth and hoped someone would help him suddenly he heard a voice on the radio it was a man from the space station he said hello little boy we saw your rocket on our radar dont worry we are here to help you we will guide you back to the earth safely just follow our instructions and everything will be fine tom felt relieved he said thank you sir im sorry i took the rocket i was curious and foolish i learned my lesson i will never do it again the man said youre welcome tom im glad youre okay curiosity is good but you have to be careful and listen to your parents they know whats best for you now lets go home the man helped tom to steer the rocket back to the park tom saw his mom waiting for him she hugged him and kissed him she was angry and happy at the same time she said tom im so glad youre safe but you scared me so much why did you do that tom said im sorry mom i wanted to see the moon but i was wrong the earth is much better i love you mom mom said i love you too tom but dont ever do that again the earth is your home and home is where your family is the end

a big red boat that their dad had made for them one day they went to the park with their mom and brought their big red boat they saw a small stream that flowed under a bridge they thought it would be fun to sail their boat there they put their boat in the water and watched it go under the bridge and come out on the other side wow our boat is so fast and strong lila said yes it is the best boat ever ben agreed they saw another boy who was also playing with a toy boat his boat was smaller and green and it looked old and worn he was trying to sail it in the stream but it kept getting stuck on the rocks and the weeds look at that silly boat lila laughed it is so slow and weak yeah it is the worst boat ever ben echoed they ran to the bridge and shouted at the boy hey your boat is no good you should get a new one like ours the boy looked sad and said i cant this is the only boat i have my grandpa gave it to me before he died he said it was his favorite toy when he was a kid he said it was a humble boat but it had a big heart lila and ben felt ashamed they realized they had been mean and rude to the boy they remembered that their mom had taught them to be kind and respectful to others and to be grateful for what they had they ran to the boy and said we are sorry we didnt mean to hurt your feelings your boat is very special and beautiful can we play with you the boy smiled and said sure thank you you are very nice can i see your boat they showed him their big red boat and let him hold it they told him how their dad had made it for them they said it was a fast and strong boat but it also had a big heart they played together for a long time sailing their boats in the stream and making friends they learned that it didnt matter how big or small how new or old how fast or slow their boats were what mattered was how they treated each other and how they enjoyed their toys they also learned that broccoli was good for them and ate it for dinner without complaining the end

once upon a time there was a caterpillar who was looking for a peaceful place to rest he walked and he walked until he found a big green leaf it was the perfect spot he settled himself on the leaf and was just about to have a peaceful nap when he heard a loud noise it disturbed him and he looked up to see what was causing it he saw a little boy playing with a ball the caterpillar was sad that his peace had been disturbed he was just about to leave when the boy noticed him and picked up the caterpillar gently the boy smiled and put the caterpillar in the grass the caterpillar felt much better now that he was in a peaceful place he had a wonderful nap and soon he was on his way

because bouncing was fun one day she bounced too high and hit her head on a branch she felt a big pain and started to cry her mom heard her and ran to see what happened she saw the bump on bellas head and said oh my poor baby you need to see the veterinarian he will make you feel better bella did not want to go to the veterinarian she was scared of the big building the strange smells and the other animals she said no mom i dont want to go i want to stay here and bounce her mom said bella you have to go the veterinarian is a nice person who helps animals he will check your head and give you some medicine if you dont go your bump might get worse and you might not be able to bounce anymore bella did not like that idea she loved bouncing more than anything she said okay mom i will go but only if you come with me and hold my hand her mom said of course i will come with you and hold your hand i love you bella they went to the veterinarian who was very kind and gentle he looked at bellas head and said you have a small cut but nothing serious i will clean it and put a bandage on it it will heal soon but you have to be careful when you bounce dont bounce too high or too fast and watch out for branches and other things bouncing is fun but safety is important too bella said thank you veterinarian i will be careful im sorry i was scared of you you are a good person the veterinarian said youre welcome bella you are a brave bunny and you have a good mom who cares for you here have a carrot its delicious and good for you bella ate the carrot and smiled she felt better and happier she said thank you mom for taking me to the veterinarian i love you mom her mom said i love you too bella now lets go home and rest you can bounce again tomorrow but not too much bella nodded and hugged her mom she learned that bouncing was fun but not worth getting hurt she also learned that the veterinarian was a friend not a foe and she learned that her mom was always there for her she was a lucky bunny

once there was a girl named jane she loved avocado she found a large basket filled with avocado and she was so excited to eat all of them she turned to her mom and said mommy can we sort the avocado and make a big dinner her mom replied yes thats a great idea here let me help you together jane and her mom sorted the avocados into piles according to their sizes they put the biggest ones in one pile and the smallest ones in another when they were done janes mom said that was very generous of you jane now lets cook dinner and enjoy the avocado so jane and her mom cooked the dinner and ate their delicious meal jane was so happy and thanked her mom for being so generous the end
lila was a restless girl who liked to explore she always wondered what was behind every door and under every bed one day she found a big chamber in the basement of her house it was dark and dusty and full of old things wow look at all this stuff lila said to herself she saw a chest a lamp a mirror and a book she opened the chest and found a dress a hat and a necklace she put them on and looked at herself in the mirror she felt like a princess she picked up the lamp and rubbed it nothing happened she rubbed it harder still nothing she shook it and heard a clink she opened the lamp and saw a coin she was happy she put the coin in her pocket and looked at the book it had a lock on it she wondered what was inside she tried to open the book with the coin but it did not work she tried to break the lock with the lamp but it did not work she tried to pry it open with her fingers but it did not work she got angry and threw the book on the floor it made a loud noise suddenly she heard footsteps on the stairs it was her mom she was coming to check on her lila was scared she knew she was not supposed to be in the chamber she quickly took off the dress the hat and the necklace and put them back in the chest she hid behind the chest and hoped her mom would not see her her mom entered the chamber and saw the mess she saw the lamp the mirror and the book on the floor she saw the coin on the table she saw the chest open she knew lila was there she looked around and found her behind the chest lila what are you doing here her mom asked she was not happy she was angry lila did not answer she looked down and felt sorry lila you know you are not allowed to be in this chamber this is where i keep my old things they are not toys they are precious to me you could have broken them or lost them you could have hurt yourself you have been very naughty you have to apologize and clean up this mess and you have to give me back the coin it is not yours it is a special coin that my grandma gave me it is very old and very valuable do you understand her mom said lila nodded she said sorry she gave back the coin she helped her mom clean up the mess she learned her lesson she learned to respect other peoples things she learned to be careful and not be so restless she learned to wonder with her eyes not with her hands
once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved playing in the rain but his mom always said no because he would get wet and sick one day timmy snuck outside when his mom wasnt looking and played in the rain anyway he had so much fun jumping in puddles and feeling the raindrops on his face but when he came back inside his mom was very upset she told him he was going to get sick and scolded him for not listening timmy felt sad and didnt know what to do luckily his dad came home and saw that timmy was upset he provided a solution by suggesting they make hot chocolate and watch a movie together timmy was happy again and felt successful because he got to have fun in the rain and spend time with his dad from then on whenever it rained timmy and his dad would have a special hot chocolate and movie tradition

sara and tom were friends who liked to play with toys they had many toys but they also liked to look at the screen the screen showed them funny pictures and sounds sometimes they laughed and clapped at the screen one day sara and tom found a new toy in the toy box it was a small screen that had buttons and lights they were curious and wanted to play with it they took turns to press the buttons and see what happened the screen made noises and changed colors they were happy and excited but then sara and tom started to argue sara wanted to keep the screen for herself she said this is my screen i found it first you cant have it tom was angry and said no this is our screen we share it you are not nice they pulled and pushed the screen trying to take it from each other the screen did not like this it did not belong to sara or tom it belonged to someone else it was a gift from a kind aunt who wanted to surprise them the screen was sad and scared it did not want to be broken or lost it wanted to be loved and cared for the screen made a loud beep and flashed a message it said please stop fighting i am not your toy i am a gift please give me back to the toy box thank you sara and tom were surprised and ashamed they realized they were wrong they said sorry to each other and to the screen they put the screen back in the toy box and hugged they decided to play with their other toys and be cheerful and kind the moral of the story is do not fight over things that do not belong to you be respectful and grateful for what you have share and play nicely with your friends

john and his mom were walking through the park as they walked they noticed a gray otter look mom said john in excitement its an otter his mom smiled and nodded john wished he could touch the otter he wondered if the otter would be friendly he looked back at his mom can i go tie it asked john his mom chuckled and shook her head no dear you cant tie the otter she said but you can be friends with it by leaving it some food on the ground so john got a cracker from his pocket and placed it on the ground he stepped back and watched as the otter sniffed the cracker and cautiously walked up to it suddenly it snatched the cracker up and ran off with it john laughed and waved goodbye to the otter

once upon a time there was a boy named joe joe loved to play outside and go on adventures on the way to his favorite spot joe stopped at the big blue lake he was shocked to find it empty he felt a bit sad and he didnt know why suddenly he saw a shiny container near the lake curious he picked it up and found it was full of salt he carried the salt back to his favorite spot and spread it all along the path joe smiled now he could have more fun the next day joe decided to carry more salt so there would be even more adventures he found more containers along the lake and filled them up with the salty goodness as joe walked back to his spot he saw the lake was full of life and happiness joe knew the salt had made a difference the salt now surrounded joes favorite spot and he could go on magical adventures whenever he wanted joe was so happy and would carry salt for other adventures ever after

one day a little boy named tim went to the station with his mom they were going to see his grandma tim was a bit anxious because he had never been on a train before at the station tim saw a big dog he wanted to pet the dog but he was scared the dogs owner saw tim and said dont worry hes friendly tim looked at his mom and she just shrugged so tim reached out and pet the dog the dog wagged its tail and licked tims hand tim felt happy and forgot about being anxious he was excited to ride the train and see his grandma when the train came tim and his mom got on and waved goodbye to the dog they had a fun trip and a great day with grandma
ben and mia like to fish with dad they have a big pole with a string and a hook dad puts a worm on the hook and throws it in the water ben and mia wait for a fish to bite one day they go to a new lake dad says it is very deep and has big fish ben and mia are excited they want to catch a big fish they throw their hooks in the water and wait soon ben feels a tug on his pole he pulls hard and sees a big fish it is shiny and green and has a long mouth ben is happy he says look dad i caught a big fish mia feels a tug on her pole too she pulls hard and sees a big fish it is brown and spiky and has a big eye mia is scared she says eek dad i caught a scary fish dad smiles and helps them take the fish off the hooks he says you both did a great job these are different kinds of fish bens fish is a bass and mias fish is a catfish they are both good to eat do you want to keep them or let them go ben says i want to keep my fish it is pretty and i want to show mom mia says i want to let my fish go it is ugly and i dont like it dad says ok that is fine you can choose what to do with your fish you have to accept that they are different and respect them ben and mia nod they do what they want with their fish then they hug dad and say thank you dad for taking us fishing we had fun dad hugs them back and says youre welcome ben and mia i love you they pack up their poles and go home
once upon a time there was a brave sailor called tom he looked and looked but he couldnt find the right ornament to put on his ship then he noticed a sparkly one floating in the sea he went over to take a closer look but it was very dangerous the sea was getting higher and higher and was going to soak him fortunately tom was smart and he had an idea he found a very long stick and used it to get the sparkly ornament he put it carefully on his ship and it lit up the sky everyone was amazed and cheered for tom tom was so proud of himself he had saved the day and got the perfect ornament he and his ship sailed happily ever after
once upon a time there was a puddle in the park the puddle was sunny and bright and it made the park very happy the puddle was filled with happy raindrops which made everyone smile and clap one day a bird landed in the puddle it was a dead bird and it made the park very sad all the park visitors stopped clapping and started to cry then something special happened a tiny frog hopped out from the grass and into the puddle he sang a beautiful song and the park became filled with joy once again everyone started to clap and soon the frog hopped away into the grass from that day onwards everyone remembered the tiny frog and the song it had sung the park was happy and the puddle was sunny again and whenever anyone was feeling sad they remembered the tiny frog and started to clap
once upon a time there was a factory that made fake toys the toys looked real but they were not one day a little girl named jacky came to the factory she saw a big box that was rolling around jacky opened the box and there was an old rusty toy car inside jacky picked up the car with a big smile and said cool she pushed the car around the factory then decided to take it home on the way home one of the tires of the car fell off jacky looked sad and so she stopped at a store to buy another tire she looked at all the tires but none of them fit her toy car but then jacky saw a tire that was shaped like a bubble she asked the shopkeeper is this tire real the shopkeeper smiled and said no its just a fake tire but it will fit perfectly on your toy car take it home and have fun rolling around the house jacky was so happy she thanked the shopkeeper and took the fake tire home she quickly put it on her toy car and off she went rolling around the house

once upon a time in a small village there was a little boy named tim tim was an obedient boy who always listened to his mom and dad he loved to play near the small stream that ran through the village the stream had many pretty stones and fish one sunny day tim went to the stream to play he saw a big frog that could display many colors the frog was green blue and yellow tim was so happy to see the frog and wanted to show it to his friends tim tried to catch the frog but it jumped away he chased the frog but it went very far from the stream tim got lost and could not find his way back home he was sad and scared in the end tim learned that he should not go too far from the stream and always listen to his mom and dad

lily and ben love to pick blueberries in the summer they go with mom and dad to the big field where the blueberry bushes grow they each have a basket to fill with the juicy sweet berries lily and ben run from bush to bush looking for the biggest and ripest blueberries they pop some in their mouths and some in their baskets they laugh and sing as they pick but then lily sees something that makes her pause she sees a fat furry animal hiding under a bush it has a black nose a long tail and sharp teeth it is a raccoon lily is scared of the raccoon she drops her basket and runs to mom and dad she cries mom dad there is a raccoon it wants to eat our blueberries mom and dad come to see what is wrong they see the raccoon too they are not scared they say dont worry lily the raccoon is not going to hurt you he is just hungry like you he likes blueberries too lets share some with him they take some blueberries from their baskets and toss them to the raccoon the raccoon sniffs them and then eats them happily he wags his tail and makes a soft noise he says thank you in his own way lily and ben smile they are not scared anymore they think the raccoon is cute and funny they say youre welcome raccoon enjoy the blueberries we have enough for everyone they pick up their baskets and go back to picking blueberries they have a fun and friendly day in the field

once upon a time in the land of australia there lived a little kangaroo called harry one day when harry was hopping through the bush he came across an icy lake he stopped and looked at the lake with its frozen surface glistening in the sun just then he heard a voice calling out to him it was his friend a wise old koala named chris chris said harry be careful that lake is very icy and you could slip and hurt yourself harry listened and said thank you he then hopped away from the lake carefully avoiding the icy surface but then just when he thought he was safe he heard a noise coming from the lake it was an angry crocodile warning harry to stay away harry quickly hopped away and was relieved to be safe he thanked his friend chris for warning him about the icy lake

once upon a time there was a big bookcase in a house the bookcase was very tall and had many books on it a little boy named timmy loved to look at the books on the bookcase one day timmy climbed up to reach a book on the highest shelf he accidentally knocked over some books and the bookcase started to wobble timmy was scared that the bookcase would fall on him so he stayed very still and tried not to move suddenly a fierce wind blew through the window and knocked the bookcase over but timmy was safe because he stayed still and didnt move his mom came running in to see what happened and was very proud of timmy for being so brave from then on timmy knew to be careful around the bookcase and to always stay still if it started to wobble
once upon a time there was a strong lion who lived in the jungle he was proud of his long tail which he had kept neat and tidy one day a weak fox tried to catch the lions tail but it was too quick for him the fox became angry and he tried to catch the lions waist instead he tried so hard that he managed to tear the lions waist the lion was very angry and he roared how dare you try to tear my waist the fox was so scared that all he could do was shake and reply im sorry i didnt know it was so weak the lion replied go back to your home and never come here again the fox hurried away glad to escape with his life the lions waist healed quickly but he never forgot what had happened he made sure his waist was always strong to make sure the fox couldnt tear it again and the lion lived happily ever after
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to ride her bike with her friends one day she noticed that her bike was not working well she looked at the gears and saw they were broken she felt sad because she loved her bike so much lilys dad tried to fix the gears but they were too broken he told her she needed a new bike lily was happy to hear that but she didnt want to wait she begged her dad to let her ride her bike one more time he agreed but he warned her to be gentle with it lily rode her bike gently but suddenly the gears got stuck she lost control of her bike and fell off she hurt herself badly and had to go to the hospital from that day on lily always listened to her dads advice and never rode her bike without checking the gears first

one day a little girl went for a walk she was excited to explore the world around her she saw so many things from birds in the sky to the trees that waved in the wind but the walk was long and she soon became very tired despite this she kept on walking until she came to a fork in the path one way was confusing and the other seemed much easier she chose the easier path and continued walking but soon it didnt seem so easy the path had changed and she couldnt tell where it was leading it twisted and turned in some very strange directions everywhere the little girl looked she could see nothing but dark shadows the little girl was so scared that she finally stopped and sat down to cry suddenly a loud voice came from the shadows and said turn back now if you want to get home before dark otherwise you will be stuck here forever but the little girl was too scared to turn around too scared to even move eventually the shadows got darker and darker until the little girl couldnt see the path anymore she was stuck in the dark forest forever and ever

lily and tom were friends who liked to play in the park one day they saw a big goose near the pond the goose had a red ribbon around its neck and looked sad hello goose lily said why are you sad the goose honked and pointed with its wing lily and tom followed and saw a small cage inside the cage was another goose also with a red ribbon the cage was locked with a chain and a padlock oh no tom said someone trapped your friend that is very mean the goose nodded and looked helpless lily and tom wanted to help they looked around and saw a big rock they had a plan maybe we can break the lock with the rock lily said good idea tom said you hold the rock and i will swing it they worked together and smashed the lock with the rock the cage opened and the other goose came out the two geese hugged and thanked lily and tom you are welcome lily said we are happy to help the geese gave lily and tom their red ribbons as a gift then they flew away honking happily lily and tom smiled and waved goodbye they were proud of their plan and their kindness

once upon a time there was a barber who was very careless he was always in a rush and he never paid attention to what he was doing one day he was giving a haircut to a little boy he was passing the scissors over the boys hair but he wasnt really looking and the scissors slipped giving the boy a bad cut on the side of his head the boy started to cry and the barber felt very sorry for what he had done he told the boy that he was sorry and he gave him an extra big piece of candy to make him feel better then he called his mom and explained what had happened she was so upset that she ran to the barbers shop and she made him promise to be more careful from now on the barber learned his lesson and from that day on he was very careful whenever he was giving someone a haircut he made sure to pay attention and take his time he was never careless again
once upon a time there was a girl called poppy she was three years old one day poppys mum was going to send her to the shop she gave poppy some money and said go slow and be careful so poppy set off at a slow pace when she arrived at the shop she asked the shopkeeper what she could buy with the money she had the shopkeeper showed her lots of things but poppy chose a big red lolly when she got back home poppy showed her mum the lolly and she was very happy she said to poppy thank you very much for getting the lolly now i am going to send you to the playground so poppy went to the playground where she had lots of fun she went on the swing and the slide and made lots of new friends then when it was time to go home poppy ran back home very slowly when she got back her mum said thank you for going so slowly poppy poppy smiled and they both went inside to have some yummy treats the end
once upon a time there was a small rabbit called bob bob wanted to explore the world so one day he decided to go on an adventure he hopped and hopped until he saw an underground hole bob looked inside and it was dark and rough he was a bit scared but he was also brave and determined bob said to himself i want to explore this underground he took a deep breath and hopped down the tunnel it was very dark and bumpy bob kept bouncing and bouncing until he heard a noise he saw a bright light and decided to follow it when he got to the end he saw a bear bob was a bit scared but he was also excited to meet him hi my name is bob and im on an adventure bob said the bear turned to him with a big smile and said i tmm so glad you followed the light now let tms go together and explore the underground world bob and the bear had lots of fun and eventually made it back home safe and sound
once upon a time there was an open flute it was a happy flute and it wanted to find a place to belong so it flew off across the sky searching and searching for somewhere to go it flew over mountains and lakes and forests asking every creature it saw if it could belong somewhere with them but none of the creatures said yes the flute was so small and different that none of them wanted it finally it flew over a little village and saw a boy sitting in the grass he was playing music on a bigger flute and the little flute watched him for a while the boy smiled when he saw the little flute and said why don tmt you join in there tms always room for one more the little flute was so happy and it joined in with the music from that day on they played music together whenever the boy was outside and the little flute finally belonged somewhere
lily and ben were playing in the park they saw a big round pond with many ducks lily wanted to feed the ducks some bread ben wanted to splash the water with a stick come on lily lets splash the water its fun ben said no ben thats not nice the ducks dont like it they want to eat the bread see they are coming to us lily said but ben did not listen he ran to the pond and waved his stick he made big splashes that scared the ducks away lily was sad she dropped the bread on the ground ben stop it you are mean to the ducks they are incredible animals they can swim and fly and quack you should be kind to them lily said but ben did not stop he laughed and splashed more water he did not see the big duck behind him the big duck was angry it bit bens leg ben cried out loud he dropped his stick and ran away lily went to ben and hugged him she felt sorry for him she gave him a band aid for his leg are you okay ben lily asked ow ow ow that duck hurt me it was mean to me ben said no ben the duck was not mean to you you were mean to the duck you scared it and its friends you should say sorry to the duck and you should not splash the water anymore its not fun its rude lily said ben thought about what lily said he realized he was wrong he felt bad he nodded his head okay lily you are right i was wrong im sorry duck and im sorry lily can we still be friends ben asked of course ben we are always friends but next time lets be nice to the ducks and lets feed them the bread they will like that and we will like that too lily said they smiled and hugged they went back to the pond they fed the bread to the ducks the ducks came back and quacked happily lily and ben had fun they learned to be kind to animals and they learned to be kind to each other the end
lily was a gifted girl who loved to sing and dance she liked to make up songs and perform them for her family and friends one day she had a big idea she wanted to put on a show for everyone in her neighborhood she asked her mom and dad if she could use the backyard as a stage they said yes and helped her set up some chairs and a curtain they also made some flyers and invited all the people who lived nearby lily was very excited and practiced her songs every day on the day of the show lily wore a pretty dress and a shiny crown she peeked behind the curtain and saw many people sitting in the chairs she saw her mom and dad her brother and sister her grandma and grandpa and her best friend mia she also saw some kids and grown ups she did not know but they looked friendly lily took a deep breath and walked onto the stage she smiled and said hello to everyone then she started to sing her songs she sang about flowers and stars about animals and colors about love and dreams she also danced and twirled and clapped her hands she had so much fun and so did the audience when she finished her last song everyone cheered and applauded they gave her flowers and hugs and said how wonderful she was lily felt very happy and proud she thanked everyone for coming and for being so nice she said she hoped they liked her show and that they had a good time she also said she was glad to share her gift with them because she valued their friendship and support she said she loved them all very much then she bowed and waved and went back to her mom and dad who hugged her and kissed her and told her how much they loved her too

once there was a boy named joe he was only three years old but he loved to explore one day joe went to the park with his mom he decided to explore by himself joe saw a big tree and wanted to see what was on top of it so he started to climb the tree but he didnt watch where he was stepping his foot slipped and he fell down breaking one of the trees branches joe was scared but his mom came to give him a big hug then joe noticed a big pink bubble gum at the base of the tree he was so happy he quickly forgot about the branch he had broken but just as joe was about to grab the gum he heard a loud voice it was the park keeper he had seen joe break the branch and he was not happy he scolded joe and said that he shouldnt climb so high joe was sad he didnt get the gum joe went back home with his mom and learned an important lesson that day he knew that it was not okay to break things joe knew he shouldnt climb too high again
