lily and ben were twins who liked to help their mom in the kitchen one day mom asked them to complete a task she gave them each a bowl of rice and said please wash the rice and put it in the pot then i will cook it for dinner lily and ben nodded and took their bowls to the sink lily was calm and careful she poured some water on the rice and rubbed it gently with her hands she drained the water and repeated until the water was clear then she put the rice in the pot and smiled ben was not calm and careful he poured too much water on the rice and splashed it everywhere he rubbed it roughly with his hands and spilled some rice on the floor he drained the water and did not repeat he put the rice in the pot and grinned mom came back and saw the mess she was not happy she said ben what did you do you did not wash the rice well you wasted water and rice you made the kitchen dirty you did not complete the task ben felt bad he said im sorry mom i wanted to be fast and fun i did not mean to make a mess mom said being fast and fun is not always good you need to be calm and careful when you do something you need to complete the task well that is how you help me and yourself do you understand ben nodded and said i understand mom i will be calm and careful next time can i help you clean the kitchen mom smiled and said yes you can thank you ben and thank you lily you did a good job im proud of you both lily and ben hugged mom and helped her clean the kitchen they learned to be calm and careful when they complete a task they also learned to say sorry and help when they make a mistake they enjoyed their dinner of rice and other yummy food they were happy and grateful

anna and ben were best friends they liked to play outside and look at the sky one day they saw a big bright star it was shining more than the other stars they wanted to see it better lets go closer to the star anna said maybe it has a wonder for us ok ben said but how do we get there they found a big hill near their house they climbed up the hill it was hard and tiring but they did not give up they reached the top of the hill they looked at the star it was very impressive wow anna said it is so beautiful i wish we could touch it me too ben said maybe we can fly to it lets jump and flap our arms they jumped and flapped their arms but they did not fly they fell down the hill they rolled and bumped and hurt themselves they cried and screamed their parents heard them and ran to help them they took them to the doctor the doctor gave them bandages and medicine you were very foolish the doctor said you cannot fly to the star it is very far and hot you could have burned or died you should be happy with what you have and not chase after things you cannot reach anna and ben felt sorry and ashamed they learned their lesson they never tried to fly to the star again they still liked to play outside and look at the sky but they did not jump and flap their arms they knew that the star was not a wonder for them but a danger they were more careful and grateful
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily who loved music every day she would go outside and listen to the birds singing and the streams rippling one day she heard a special kind of music coming from the woods it was so beautiful that she had to follow it when she reached the woods she saw a big tree with open doors as she stepped closer she heard the music coming from inside she opened the door and found a room full of music boxes and woodwind instruments there was a small figure sitting in the corner weeping lily asked the figure who are you and why are you weeping the figure looked up and said i am a lonely angel i have been here for so long and i have no friends i weep because i have no one to share my music with lily smiled and said you dont have to cry anymore ill be your friend and share your music with you she held out her hand and the angel smiled together they played music and laughed until the sun went down
lila and ben were playing in the garden they liked to pretend they were explorers in the jungle they used sticks as swords and hats as helmets they ran and jumped and swung on the vines look ben i found a big vine lila said she grabbed a flexible vine that hung from a tree she pulled it and wrapped it around her waist i can swing like a monkey wow lila you are so brave ben said he wanted to try too he looked for another vine he saw one that was thick and green he reached for it but the vine was not a vine it was a snake the snake hissed and coiled around bens arm ben screamed and dropped his stick he was very scared lila heard bens scream she saw the snake she was scared too but she wanted to help ben she swung on her vine and kicked the snake the snake let go of ben and slithered away ben are you okay lila asked she hugged ben im okay lila thank you ben said he hugged lila back you are so brave they ran back to the house they told their mom what happened she checked bens arm it was not hurt she gave them cookies and milk she was proud of them they decided to play something else they did not want to scare themselves again they did not like snakes they liked vines but only the flexible ones

once upon a time there was a proud crane who lived by the lake every day the crane would fly through the sky and enjoy the view one day the crane noticed a small boat that had been abandoned the boat was starting to rot the crane felt sad to see such a beautiful boat in such a terrible state the crane turned to the sky and said i will have to fix this boat so no one else has to see it like this so the crane flapped his wings and flew from tree to tree gathering wood and strong leaves he worked hard to rebuild the boat until it was as strong as it was before the crane was proud of his work and stared proudly at the boat before taking off back to the lake he said to himself no one else has to see this boat rotted and in ruins its all fixed now

alvin was excited as he was unpacking his suitcase inside he found a big surprise a toy boat the boat was blue and had a funny flag on the top alvin couldnt wait to play with it he grabbed it and ran to the nearest river he lined the boat up carefully and said goodbye as he watched the boat sail away it went very far until he couldnt see it anymore soon it was getting dark and alvin was a little worried he started to dream about his boat getting lost or stuck suddenly he saw a light in the distance he ran closer and noticed it was his boat alvin was so happy he had found it he rushed over and picked it up but when he got closer he noticed the back of it was wet he looked around and saw it had been pushed onto some big rocks he reached out and ran his finger along the side he felt a deep cut alvin was sad he knew it was time to go home he carefully packed the boat into his suitcase and walked back even though his boat was hurt he knew he had a great adventure

lila and ben were twins who liked to play in the forest they were not afraid of anything not even the big wolf who lived there they thought the wolf was funny and friendly and they often gave him some of their food one day they found a big basket of cookies and pies in the forest they were very hungry and wanted to eat them all but the wolf came and said hello little ones can i have some of your food i am very hungry too lila and ben did not want to share they said no wolf these are our food you can find your own food go away the wolf was sad and angry he said that is not nice you should share with others who need help if you do not share i will order you to give me your food and if you do not obey i will eat you lila and ben laughed they said you cannot order us you are not our boss and you cannot eat us you are too old and slow we are faster and smarter you are a disgusting wolf go away the wolf was very sad and angry he said you are very rude and mean you will see what happens when you do not share and respect others i will teach you a lesson the wolf waited until lila and ben were busy eating the cookies and pies then he sneaked behind them and grabbed them by their clothes he dragged them to his cave and locked them inside he said now you will stay here until you learn to share and respect others and maybe i will eat you later lila and ben were very scared and sorry they said please wolf let us go we are sorry for being rude and mean we will share with you and respect you please wolf forgive us the wolf said i will think about it but first you have to promise me something you have to promise me that you will never be rude and mean to anyone again and you have to promise me that you will always share and respect others do you promise lila and ben said yes wolf we promise we promise with all our heart please wolf let us go the wolf said ok i will let you go but you have to keep your promise and you have to give me some of your food and you have to be my friends do you agree lila and ben said yes wolf we agree we will give you some of our food and we will be your friends thank you wolf for being kind and forgiving the wolf said you are welcome little ones come let us eat together and be friends the wolf opened the cave and let lila and ben out they gave him some of their cookies and pies and they ate together and talked they became friends and learned to share and respect each other they never forgot the lesson that the wolf taught them the moral of the story is you should share and respect others who need help you should not be rude and mean to anyone you should not judge others by their appearance you should be kind and forgiving you should make friends with different kinds of people

once upon a time a little raven flew from its nest in search of something special after flying for a while the raven spotted a bright lake as it perched on a nearby tree it heard the most beautiful music coming from the lake the raven flew closer and saw a little girl by the lakes edge in her hands the girl held a beautiful golden flute she played her music which made the raven so happy that it began to dance the girl laughed and put down her flute she looked up at the raven and said oh little raven please accept my gift of music the raven hopped down from the tree and lightly ate from the girls hand from then on the raven visited the girl every day and accepted her gift of music the little raven and the girl became great friends they both enjoyed each others company and the music the girl played the little raven looked forward to hearing the girls music each and every day

tom and lily were having breakfast with their mom and dad they liked to eat toast with jam and drink milk mom gave them each a plate with two slices of toast and a small jar of jam she told them to be careful and not make a mess tom and lily spread the jam on their toast with their spoons they liked the sweet and sticky jam they took big bites and smiled they were happy and hungry but then a loud noise came from outside it sounded like a big truck tom and lily stopped eating and looked out the window they saw a big truck with a long arm and a big claw the truck was picking up the trash cans from the street and dumping them into a big hole in the back tom and lily thought the truck was incredible they had never seen anything like it they wanted to watch it more they got up from their chairs and ran to the window they pressed their noses against the glass and said wow but they forgot about their plates and their jam the plates slid off the table and fell to the floor the jam spilled everywhere it made a big mess mom and dad heard the noise and came to see what happened they saw the broken plates and the jam on the floor they were not happy they said oh no tom and lily turned around and saw their mom and dad they realized they had made a mistake they had disturbed their breakfast and made a mess they felt sorry they said sorry mom and dad we just wanted to see the truck it was incredible mom and dad sighed they were not angry but they were not pleased they said we know you like the truck but you have to be careful with your food you cant disturb your breakfast and make a mess you have to clean up now tom and lily nodded they said ok mom and dad we will clean up they got a cloth and a mop and started to wipe the jam and the broken pieces they learned their lesson they decided to finish their breakfast first and then watch the truck they hoped the truck would stay for a while it was incredible

once upon a time there was an old lady who lived in a big house one day she saw a little kitten outside her door the kitten was very cute and fluffy the old lady observed the kitten and saw that it was hungry and thirsty she gave the kitten some milk and food the kitten was very happy and started to purr it stayed with the old lady and they became friends the old lady would observe the kitten every day and watch it play the kitten would chase its tail and run around the house one day the old lady noticed that the kitten was not feeling well she took it to the vet and they gave the kitten some medicine the kitten got better and was happy again the old lady loved the kitten very much and they lived happily ever after

once there was a generous mouse he liked to give away bits of cheese to all the other animals in the forest one day he saw his reflection in a mirror and he decided to take a bite out of it the mouse thought the mirror would taste like delicious cheese but it tasted very strange he was confused and decided to take a second bite again the mirror did not taste like cheese at all the mouse frowned and he realized he had made a mistake he looked around for the other animals he had shared his cheese with but they were gone he felt embarrassed and thought he would not be so generous in the future the mouse put the mirror down and slowly started to walk away as he left he looked back and smiled he was happy to see that the animals had enjoyed the cheese he had shared and he vowed to be generous again in the future

lila and ben were friends who liked to play in the forest they found a big bush with many red berries they picked some berries and ate them they were sweet and juicy yum these berries are good lila said lets take some home for mom and dad ben said they filled their baskets with berries and started to walk back but on the way they met a big bear the bear was hungry and saw the berries he growled and ran towards them give me your berries the bear said he was very rude lila and ben were scared they did not want to give their berries to the bear they worked hard to pick them they wanted to share them with their parents no these are our berries lila said go away bear ben said they tried to run away but the bear was faster he caught up with them and grabbed their baskets he spilled the berries on the ground and ate them all he did not leave any for lila and ben lila and ben were sad and angry they cried and shouted at the bear thats not fair you are a bad bear lila said you are a mean and greedy bear ben said the bear did not care he licked his lips and smiled he was full and happy he did not say sorry or thank you he just walked away lila and ben hugged each other they had no berries left they decided to go home and tell their parents what happened they hoped the bear would not come back they also hoped to find more berries another day they learned to be careful in the forest they also learned that some animals are rude and selfish they wished the bear would learn to be nice and share

once upon a time there was a mighty rock it was big and strong but one day something strange happened the rock started to go it rolled down the hill faster and faster all the animals were surprised and ran away even the birds flew up high into the sky everyone was so scared but when the rock reached the bottom nothing happened it just stopped so everyone came back and looked at the rock the mighty rock still stood tall and strong everyone was happy and cheered and hugged each other the rock had gone but it still protected them
once upon a time there was a little mouse named timmy every day he went out in the open fields to look for food and adventure one day he came upon a strange test it seemed very difficult and timmy could not understand it he felt very scared and sad as he was about to give up and leave a wise old owl flew down from the sky and said timmy why dont you try the test i believe in you and know that you can do it timmy was surprised to hear the owl and he decided to take the test even though he suffered through the test he eventually managed to pass it he felt so proud of himself the wise old owl flew down again and said see timmy you can do impossible things when you put your mind to it timmy was so happy that he gave a big hug to the wise old owl and thanked him for his kind words the old owl smiled and flew away leaving timmy feeling empowered and confident

once upon a time there was a chubby cat named tom tom had a red balloon he loved to play with it all day he would bat it with his paw and watch it float up and down one day tom saw a big dog named max max said i hate balloons they are loud and scary tom looked at his red balloon and thought i dont want max to be scared so tom went to max and said lets play together we can play without my balloon max wagged his tail and they played all day they chased each other and had lots of fun tom learned that even if someone hates something you love you can still be friends and find other ways to play
lily and ben were friends who liked to play in the park one day they saw a big slide that looked fun they ran to the slide but they did not see a sign that said wet and slippery they were careless and did not look where they were going lily went first and slid down the slide very fast she was happy until she reached the end and fell off the slide she hurt her knee and cried ben saw what happened and followed her he slid down the slide too but he was not happy he was scared and wanted to stop he reached the end and fell off the slide too he hurt his elbow and cried lily and ben were both sad and in pain they did not know what to do they looked at each other and felt sorry they decided to unite and help each other they held each others hand and walked to the bench they found a band aid and put it on their wounds they hugged and said they were sorry they felt better and smiled they learned a lesson that day they learned to be careful and to look before they run they also learned to be kind and to unite when they are hurt they were still friends who liked to play in the park but they were more careful and more united they held each others hand and went to the swings they had fun and were happy

once upon a time there was a bunny named bob bob was a very selfish bunny who liked having all the things for himself one day bob found a patch of grass with a lovely soft texture instead of wanting to share it bob kept it all to himself and he would never let anyone else get near it this made his friends very sad because they all wanted to touch the soft grass and feel its special texture they asked bob to separate some of the grass so they could have some too but he just said no he wouldnt share finally bobs friends said they wouldnt play with him anymore if he didnt share the special grass bob thought about this and realised that it wasnt very nice to keep it all to himself he decided to separate some of the grass and give it to his friends so that everyone could experience the lovely texture bobs friends were so happy that he had changed his selfish ways and started to share from that day on bob was always happy to separate some of his special things and share them with his friends

sara and ben like to play in the park they have a ball a kite and a bike they also have a friend a big black raven the raven likes to fly with the kite and catch the ball he is very smart and funny one day sara and ben see a new bird in the park it is a blue jay it has bright blue feathers and a loud voice the blue jay sees the raven and says you are ugly and boring you have no color and no song you are not a real bird go away the raven feels sad and angry he says i am a real bird i have many skills and tricks i can fly fast and high i can talk and mimic i can solve puzzles and find shiny things you are rude and mean you have no manners and no friends the blue jay laughs and says you are lying and silly you have no proof and no challenge you can only copy and steal you can not create and sing you are a loser and a pest i dare you to show me what you can do the raven thinks and says ok i will show you i have a game for you you see that bike over there it belongs to sara and ben it has a blue bell on the handle if you can ring the bell you win if you can not you lose do you accept the blue jay says yes i accept that is easy i can fly to the bike and ring the bell you can not you are too big and clumsy you will fail watch me the blue jay flies to the bike and tries to ring the bell but the bell is too hard and heavy the blue jay can not move it he pushes and pecks and flaps he makes a lot of noise and mess he gets tired and frustrated the raven watches and smiles he knows a secret he has a plan he has been to the bike before he has seen how it works he has learned how to ring the bell he waits for the right moment when the blue jay gives up and flies away the raven flies to the bike he lands on the seat he looks at the bell he sees a small blue button on the side he presses the button with his beak the bell rings loud and clear the raven says i win i win i am a real bird i have color and song i have skills and tricks i have manners and friends you lose you lose you are rude and mean you have no proof and no challenge you have no game and no fun sara and ben hear the bell and the raven they run to the bike they see the raven and the blue jay they understand what happened they clap and cheer they say you are amazing and clever you have a great game and a great friend we love you raven you are our favorite bird

once upon a time there was an old man one day he went to the drain to fetch some water to give to his flowers but as he came closer he noticed that something was wrong all the water had gone he asked the other people who were standing around the drain what has happened here one of them replied the old pipe has refused to work and so the water has drained out the old man was disappointed he had hoped to help his flowers but instead all he could do was go home without any water on the way back he saw an old lady who was also looking upset he asked her why she was sad and she replied i have been looking for water to give to my plants but there is none here the old man then remembered the water he had at home and said i have some water at home would you like me to share it with you the old lady was delighted and she thanked him deeply together they went back to the old mans house and shared the water from the old mans tap from then on whenever the old people went to the drain and noticed that the water had gone the old man would remember the old lady and offer her some of his water he wouldnt refuse her no matter how old he was

once there was a little goat who lived on a farm the farm was a big one and all the other animals treated the goat very nicely one day the sun began to rise over the farm the goat stood up and stretched his lazy legs good morning the goat said to the chickens the chickens clucked excitedly in reply lets go explore the farm the goat said so the goat with the chickens following behind walked all around the farm he rose up to the highest hill in the back and looked out over the grassy fields the sun was getting higher and higher in the sky and the goat could feel the warmth on his waist but the goat was starting to get tired he was getting lazy and didnt really want to explore anymore lets head back the goat said so the goat with the chickens still close behind walked back to the farm he looked up at the sky watching as the sun rose even higher the warm feeling on his waist reminded him of that days adventure the goat gave a big happy yawn and then contented he settled in for a well deserved nap

once upon a time there was a young dog named spot spot loved to play and run all day one day spot felt itchy he tried to scratch but the itch did not go away spot went to his friend the wise old cat named whiskers whiskers looked at spot and said you have a flea let me help you whiskers started to pick the flea off of spot spot felt better and said thank you whiskers the next day spot saw a little bird with a flea too spot remembered what whiskers did for him so he went to the bird and said i can help you spot picked the flea off the bird the bird was happy and said thank you spot from that day on spot helped all his friends when they had fleas

tim and sam were friends who liked to joke and play one day they saw a big mill near the river the mill had a wheel that turned and made noise tim and sam wanted to see what was inside the mill lets go in and have some fun tim said ok but be careful the mill might be dangerous sam said they sneaked into the mill and saw many machines and bags of flour they also saw a man who worked in the mill he was busy and did not see them tim and sam started to joke and throw flour at each other they laughed and made a mess they did not know that the man heard them and was angry who is there what are you doing the man shouted tim and sam were scared and ran to the door but the door was locked they were trapped in the mill help help they cried the man came to the door and saw them he was very mad you naughty boys you have ruined my flour and my machines you will pay for this he said tim and sam were very worried they thought the man would hurt them they wished they had not joked in the mill they learned a lesson

once upon a time there was a young bird named tim tim lived on a small island with his family the island was very pretty with lots of trees and flowers one day tim saw a big bird trying to take food from a smaller bird tim didnt like this he wanted to help the small bird but he was scared tims mom told him sometimes we must surrender our fear to do what is right so tim flew to the big bird and said please dont take the food its not nice the big bird listened and flew away the small bird thanked tim for his help tim felt happy and proud the moral of the story is to be brave and help others even when you are scared sometimes surrendering your fear can make a big difference

once upon a time there was a bee who lived in a huge hive this bee was called bob and he was very curious bob wanted to explore the world outside his hive but he knew he wasnt allowed one night he thought up a plan he decided to sneak out the next morning when everyone else was asleep that morning bob slowly made his way towards the entrance of the hive just as he was about to sneak out a kind voice said wait bob it was bobs mother she said its not right to go without permission you must ask me if its okay to go before you leave bob thought for a moment before he replied okay will you permit me to go outside and explore the original world around me his mother smiled and said yes but you must be back before night time bob excitedly thanked his mother and set off on his adventure he was so happy to be able to explore the original world he looked forward to telling the other bees what he saw when he returned

once upon a time there was an old tree she was tall and strong with many branches and leaves she had been growing in the same place for as long as anyone could remember and everyone thought she made the world look nicer one day a man came by with a saw he wanted to cut down the old tree and make some furniture with it the tree was very scared please dont cut me down pleaded the tree i wont be able to stand up again the man thought about it then said i cant do that ill have to use screws to put you back together the tree felt relieved and thanked the man the man worked hard he cut the tree into small pieces then put it back together using screws even though the tree had a lot of bumps and scrapes from the saw she was proud to stand up straight again as the man worked a lazy bird watched from a nearby branch the bird asked why the man was taking so long the man replied im making sure everything is secure that tree has been standing for a very long time and i want to make sure she stands for many years to come the tree felt proud and the bird flew away from that day onwards the tree stood tall proud and strong

ben and sam were brothers they liked to play in the cabin in the woods the cabin was old and small but it had many toys and books ben and sam had fun with the toys and books one day they heard a loud noise outside they looked out the window and saw a big truck the truck was red and shiny it had a bald man driving it the bald man got out of the truck and knocked on the door hello boys the bald man said im sorry to delay your play but i need to talk to your dad he asked me to fix the roof of the cabin it has a hole and it leaks when it rains ben and sam were curious they wanted to see the hole and the roof they asked the bald man if they could help him sure you can help me the bald man said but you have to be careful the roof is high and steep you have to wear these helmets and gloves and you have to listen to me and do what i say ben and sam nodded they put on the helmets and gloves they followed the bald man to the ladder they climbed up the ladder and saw the hole it was big and dark the bald man had a hammer and some nails he showed ben and sam how to fix the hole with some wood and tar ben and sam helped the bald man they held the wood and the nails they spread the tar they hammered the nails they worked hard and fast they fixed the hole good job boys the bald man said you are very brave and smart you helped me a lot now the roof is good and strong it wont leak anymore ben and sam smiled they were proud and happy they thanked the bald man they climbed down the ladder they ran to the cabin they told their dad what they did their dad hugged them and praised them he gave them some cookies and milk they ate the cookies and drank the milk they went back to the cabin they played with the toys and books they had more fun

and want to try it they take the lab set to the kitchen and put it on the table they fill the bottles with water and food coloring they mix the colors and see what happens they have fun making different colors and watching them change then ben has an idea he picks up the spray and points it at lily he squeezes the spray and a jet of red water comes out it hits lily on her face and clothes lily is surprised and angry she screams ben why did you do that you made me wet and red that is not nice ben laughs he thinks it is funny he sprays lily again with blue water lily is more angry she grabs the spray from ben and sprays him back with yellow water ben is shocked and angry too he tries to get the spray from lily they fight over the spray and spill more water and colors on the table you made a big mess with your lab set you are wet and colorful you have to clean up and change your clothes right now ben and lily stop fighting and look at their mom they are scared and sorry they say sorry mom we were playing with the lab set and we sprayed each other we did not mean to make a mess their mom sighs she says playing with the lab set is fine but you have to be careful and respectful you cannot spray each other or make a mess you have to share and be nice do you understand ben and lily nod they say yes mom we understand we will clean up and be nice their mom smiles she says good i will help you clean up and then you can have a snack but no more spraying okay ben and lily say okay mom no more spraying they hug their mom and start to clean up they learn their lesson tom you cant eat a star stars are very far away and very hot they are not food for us they are lights that shine at night but why do they shine tom asked because they are made of fire and gas his mom said they are like big balls of fire that burn and glow they are very beautiful but also very dangerous if you try to eat a star you will get burned and hurt tom felt scared and curious he wanted to see a star up close but he also did not want to get burned he asked his mom how can i see a star then his mom hugged him and said you can see a star with a telescope a telescope is a tool that makes things look bigger and closer maybe someday we can get a telescope and see the stars together but for now you can see them with your eyes and make a wish tom liked that idea he looked at the stars again and picked one that was bright and shiny he closed his eyes and made a wish he wished that he could have a telescope and see the stars with his mom he also wished that he could have a cookie and some milk before bed he opened his eyes and said mom i made a wish can i have a cookie and some milk please his mom laughed and said sure tom you can have a cookie and some milk but only one okay you dont want to eat too much before bed come on lets go to the kitchen tom followed his mom to the kitchen he was happy and sleepy he ate his cookie and drank his milk he thanked his mom and gave her a kiss he said mom i love you and i love the stars but i dont want to eat them they are too hot and bad his mom said i love you too tom and im glad you dont want to eat the stars they are not for us they are for the sky now lets go to bed its late and you need to sleep tom nodded and yawned he went to his room with his mom he got into his bed and snuggled with his teddy bear he looked out of his window and saw the stars again he smiled and said good night stars thank you for shining maybe someday i will see you with a telescope but for now i will dream of you he closed his eyes and fell asleep he dreamed of stars and cookies and his mom he was happy and warm he did not eat a star but he felt like one

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play in the dirt and make mud pies he would dig and dig until he found the best soil to use his mommy would always tell him to be careful and not make a messy spot in the yard one day timmy found a big stick and decided to turn it into a magic wand he waved it around and said abracadabra but nothing happened he tried again and again but still nothing then he remembered that he needed to add some special soil to make the magic work timmy ran to the garden and found the perfect soil he added it to the stick and waved it around one more time suddenly a big gust of wind came and turned everything in the yard upside down timmys mommy was not happy with the messy yard but timmy was proud of his magic wand
once there was a little girl she was three years old and very curious one day she was in the kitchen looking for something interesting she opened the fridge and saw a big bowl of salad in there she was excited to try it so she grabbed a spoon and took a bite but the salad was disgusting she made a face and put the spoon down then she heard a noise she followed the noise and found a little mouse under the fridge it was so tiny but she was scared and wanted it to go away so she clapped her hands and shouted go away but the mouse didnt move it seemed to not want to leave so she took the bowl of salad and threw it at the mouse the mouse was disturbed and quickly ran away the little girl was proud of herself and smiled she had saved the kitchen from the mouse and her parents would be proud of her

once upon a time there was a girl who loved cocoa every day she would go for a walk and if she found a cocoa tree shed shake it to see if any cocoa beans would fall down one day she found a really big tree in the forest she was so excited and quickly started shaking it suddenly lots of cocoa beans fell down and they all rolled into the forest the girl was eager to find them again so she started running through the forest to find them she ran and ran until she came to a clearing with a river in the river she could see some of the cocoa beans floating around but the river was very deep and the water was very rough she couldnt get close enough to the beans without falling in so she had to find another way then she saw a big stick she grabbed it and started using it to push the beans back to the shore after a few minutes of hard work she managed to get all the cocoa beans out of the river safely she was so happy and she collected the beans in her pocket and headed home from that day on she kept going back to the river to collect cocoa beans whenever she wanted a hot cup of cocoa

once upon a time there was a little boy called tom tom loved playing with his friends outside he hadnt seen them for a long time finally one day tom saw his friends playing up the street he was so excited he was about to go and join them when he remembered something it was cold outside and he had no jumper tom started to get a bit sad but then he had an idea he ran up to his mom and asked her for a hug his mom smiled and said yes as tom hugged his mom he started to feel warm tom was so happy he asked his mom if he could take the hug outside with him his mom said yes and showed him what to do he had to close his eyes and squeeze really tight when he opened his eyes tom saw that the hug had shrunk down so much it could fit in his pocket he put the small hug in his pocket and ran outside he felt much warmer now and was able to play with his friends until it was time to go home tom was glad he was able to take his moms hug outside with him he knew it would keep him warm and safe

tom and ben were friends who liked to play music tom had a trumpet that he got from his dad ben had a drum that he made from a can and a stick they would play songs together and have fun one day tom saw a new trumpet in a shop window it was shiny and big and had many buttons tom wanted the new trumpet very much he was envious of anyone who had a better trumpet than him he thought his old trumpet was not good enough he asked his dad to buy him the new trumpet but his dad said no he said that tom should be happy with what he had and take good care of it he said that the new trumpet was too expensive and that tom was not ready for it tom was angry and sad he did not listen to his dad he hid his old trumpet under his bed and did not play it anymore he hoped that his dad would change his mind and get him the new trumpet but his dad did not change his mind and toms old trumpet did not get any love it got dusty and dirty and rusty it started to rot the sound became bad and the buttons got stuck one day ben came to visit tom he wanted to play music with him he brought his drum and asked tom to get his trumpet tom felt ashamed and did not want to show his trumpet to ben he said that he did not want to play music anymore ben was surprised and sad he liked to play music with tom he asked him why he did not want to play music anymore tom did not answer he just looked away ben looked under toms bed and saw the trumpet he pulled it out and saw how rotten it was he was shocked and sad he asked tom what happened to his trumpet tom did not answer he just cried ben felt sorry for tom he said that he liked toms trumpet and that it was a good trumpet he said that he did not care about the new trumpet in the shop window he said that he cared about tom and their friendship he said that tom should not be envious of others and that he should be grateful for what he had he said that tom should take good care of his trumpet and his friends he said that tom should play music with him again and have fun tom realized that ben was right he felt sorry for being envious and for neglecting his trumpet and his friend he hugged ben and said that he was sorry he said that he liked his trumpet and that it was a good trumpet he said that he liked ben and that he was a good friend he said that he wanted to play music with ben again and have fun he asked ben to help him clean his trumpet and make it sound good again ben agreed and smiled they cleaned the trumpet and played songs together and had fun the moral of the story is be happy with what you have and take good care of it do not be envious of others and lose what you have cherish your friends and play music with them

once upon a time there was a frog that lived in a pond the pond was filled with thick green water one day the little frog had a big question can i really jump over the pond the frog asked his friend the caterpillar said i believe you can do it if you believe in yourself practice every day and soon youll be able to jump over the pond the frog nodded and hopped around the water each day he was surprised by how much he was able to jump one day the frog believed in himself and made the biggest jump he ever had he jumped over the pond the frog was so happy that he had reached his goal he thanked the caterpillar for believing in him from then on he could jump across the pond whenever he wanted

once upon a time there was a chicken who lived on a very icy hill she was small but determined every day she would use her strong legs to kick the ice and make a path down the hill one cold winter day she was walking down the path when she saw someone else had slipped and slid right into her path startled the chicken quickly tried to move away but she couldnt get away in time and she ended up kicking the stranger the stranger was sad and they shared an icy stare then the chicken started to feel sad too she knew she had done something wrong and didnt want to make anyone feel bad so with a kind nod the chicken showed the stranger the way down the path and things got better the moral of the story is that even when things get icy kindness can help us keep things cool

one day sam and his mom went to the zoo sam loved to see the animals but he was afraid of some of them he saw a big gray animal with a long nose and two enormous ears it was an elephant mom what is that sam asked pointing at the elephant that is an elephant sam it is a very big and strong animal it lives in africa and asia it can use its long nose to drink water and pick up things it is called a trunk mom explained sam looked at the elephants trunk he thought it was funny and weird he wondered if it could touch its own ears mom what are those sam asked pointing at the elephants tusks those are tusks sam they are like big teeth that grow out of the elephants mouth they are made of ivory which is very hard and white some elephants use them to dig or fight but they are also very precious and some bad people want to take them away that is why we have to protect the elephants mom explained sam felt sad for the elephants he did not like bad people he wanted the elephants to be happy and safe mom can i hug the elephant sam asked looking at the elephants arm that is not an arm sam that is a leg the elephant has four legs just like a dog or a horse but you cannot hug the elephant sam it is too big and too far and it might not like it the elephant needs its space and respect you can wave at it or talk to it but you have to stay behind the fence mom explained sam nodded he understood he waved at the elephant and said hello the elephant waved back with its trunk and made a loud noise sam laughed he liked the elephant he thought it was enormous and amazing

sam was very excited he wanted to march on the sand and splash in the water mia was not so excited she wanted to stay under the umbrella and look at her books come on mia sam said lets march to the book and tried to read but the sun was too bright and the wind was too strong she closed her book and sighed suddenly she heard sam scream she looked up and saw him running back to her he was wet and anna and ben liked to help mom in the kitchen they put the dirty plates and cups in the dishwasher mom said the dishwasher made them clean with hot water and soap one day anna and ben found a big chocolate bar in the cupboard they wanted to eat it but mom said no she said it was for later for a special cake she put the chocolate bar on the counter and told them not to touch it but anna and ben were very curious they wanted to see the chocolate bar they climbed on a chair and reached for it it was soft and sticky they broke a piece and tasted it it was sweet and yummy lets put it in the dishwasher ben said maybe it will make it hard and shiny again okay anna said they opened the dishwasher and put the chocolate bar inside then they closed it and pressed the button they waited for a while then they heard a beep the dishwasher was done they opened it and looked for the chocolate bar but they could not find it there was only a brown mess on the plates and cups oh no anna said what did we do we melted the chocolate bar ben said mom will be angry they heard mom coming they ran to their room and hid under the bed they hoped mom would not see the dishwasher they hoped she would not see the clear signs of their mischief
tom and lily were playing with their toy cars on the floor they liked to match the cars by their colors and shapes tom had a red car and a blue car lily had a yellow car and a green car look tom i have a yellow car and a green car they match lily said thats nice lily but i have a red car and a blue car they match too tom said they were having fun until they heard a loud noise from the roof they looked up and saw smoke coming out of the chimney the chimney was filthy and black whats that tom lily asked i dont know lily maybe its a fire lets go and tell mommy tom said they ran to the kitchen where mommy was making cookies they told her what they saw and she went to check dont worry kids its not a fire its just santa claus hes coming to bring you presents mommy said santa claus but its not christmas yet tom said well hes a bit early this year he wanted to surprise you but he got stuck in the chimney because its so filthy we need to help him out mommy said how can we help him mommy lily asked we can use your toy cars lily they match the colors of his suit red green yellow and blue if we put them on the fireplace maybe he can see them and follow them out mommy said ok mommy lets do it lily said they took their toy cars and placed them on the fireplace they waited and listened soon they heard a ho ho ho and a thud santa claus came out of the chimney he was covered in soot and ash but he was smiling thank you tom and lily you saved me you are very clever and kind here are your presents merry christmas santa claus said he gave them each a big box wrapped in shiny paper he also gave them a hug and a kiss then he went back to the chimney and flew away with his reindeer tom and lily opened their presents and found more toy cars they were very happy and excited they thanked santa claus and mommy they played with their new toy cars and matched them with their old ones they had a lot of fun they also learned to keep the chimney clean the end

once there was a worm it was a dangerous worm and it didnt want to be seen so it disappeared it made itself small and it crawled away into a hole it stayed in the hole for a very long time one day two children were walking in the woods they were looking for rocks to put in their pockets suddenly they spotted the dangerous worm it had come out of his hole and was wiggling around the leaves the children were really surprised to see the worm they wanted to see it but it was scared so the worm disappeared poof it was gone the children looked all around the woods but the worm was nowhere to be seen it had disappeared again they just had to keep looking perhaps someday they would find the mysterious dangerous worm again

tom and sam are friends they like to play with toy guns they have two toy guns one is red and one is blue they take turns to shoot each other with the toy guns one day they go to the park to play they see a big tree with many birds they want to shoot the birds with their toy guns they run to the tree and point their toy guns at the birds bang bang tom says shooting his red toy gun i got one bang bang sam says shooting his blue toy gun i got two the birds are scared they fly away from the tree they make loud noises tom and sam laugh they think they are very good at shooting but then they hear a voice it is a man he is angry he is the owner of the birds he keeps the birds in a cage near the tree he lets them out sometimes to fly hey you two stop shooting my birds the man says they are not toys they are alive they are my pets tom and sam are surprised they did not know the birds belong to the man they did not know the birds are alive they thought they are just fun to shoot they feel bad they drop their toy guns they say sorry to the man we are sorry mister tom says we did not know we just wanted to play we are sorry mister sam says we did not mean to hurt your birds the man is still angry but he sees that tom and sam are sorry he sees that they are just kids he decides to forgive them ok ok the man says but dont do it again and dont play with toy guns they are dangerous they can hurt people and animals play with something else play with a ball or a kite or a book tom and sam nod they thank the man they pick up their toy guns they decide to give them away they do not want to play with toy guns anymore they want to play with something else something that does not hurt anyone something that is fun and safe
lila and tom were eager to go to the farm with their mom they liked to see the animals and pick fruits from the trees mom said they could pick some peaches today if they were ripe and sweet they got to the farm and saw a big basket of peaches by the gate mom asked the farmer if they could have some the farmer nodded and said sure you can have some but be careful some of them are sour you have to smell them and feel them first if they are soft and smell good they are ripe if they are hard and smell bad they are sour do you understand lila and tom nodded and said yes we understand they wanted to repeat what the farmer said to show they were listening but they were too eager to try the peaches they ran to the basket and grabbed some peaches they did not smell them or feel them they just bit into them lila bit into a ripe peach it was juicy and sweet she smiled and said mmm this is a good peach i like it tom bit into a sour peach it was hard and bitter he made a face and said yuck this is a bad peach i dont like it he spit it out and threw it away mom saw what happened and said tom you should have listened to the farmer he told you how to find a ripe peach you have to smell it and feel it first can you repeat what he said tom felt sorry and said yes mom he said if it is soft and smells good it is ripe if it is hard and smells bad it is sour mom said thats right next time remember to do that now do you want to try another peach tom nodded and said yes please i want a good peach like lila mom helped him find a ripe peach and gave it to him he smelled it and felt it it was soft and smelled good he bit into it and said mmm this is a good peach i like it he smiled and hugged mom lila smiled and hugged him they both said thank you mom thank you farmer we like peaches

wanted to see who could balance a spoon on their nose for the longest time lila went first she put a spoon on her nose and tried to stay still she counted to ten but then the spoon fell off she giggled and said your turn tom tom took a spoon and put it on his nose he was very good at balancing he counted to twenty then thirty then forty he smiled and said i win lila i can balance a spoon for a long time lila was not happy she wanted to win too she said no fair tom you have a bigger nose than me that makes it easier for you to balance a spoon tom said thats not true lila we have the same nose we are twins remember lila said well maybe you have a magic spoon let me try your spoon tom said ok fine here take my spoon but i dont think it will make a difference they swapped spoons and tried again lila put toms spoon on her nose and counted she got to fifteen but then the spoon fell off again she frowned and said see tom your spoon is magic it helps you balance tom put lilas spoon on his nose and counted he got to fifty then sixty then seventy he laughed and said see lila your spoon is not magic it doesnt help you balance im just better at balancing than you lila was very angry she said youre not better tom youre just lucky and mean and a cheater tom said im not lucky or mean or a cheater lila im just good at balancing and youre just a sore loser they started to argue and shout at each other they forgot about their spoons and their toys they forgot that they were twins and loved each other very much their parents heard them and came to see what was wrong they saw them fighting and said stop lila and tom what are you doing why are you so angry lila and tom told them about their game and their spoons their parents looked at them and said thats a silly game lila and tom it doesnt matter who can balance a spoon on their nose its just a spoon its not important whats important is that you are kind and respectful to each other you are twins and you are wealthy you have many toys and many spoons but the most valuable thing you have is each other you should share and play nicely you should apologize and hug each other you should be happy and grateful lila and tom realized that their parents were right they felt sorry for being rude and mean they said were sorry mom and dad were sorry lila and tom we love you mom and dad we love you lila and tom they hugged each other and their parents they picked up their spoons and their toys they decided to play a different game a game that was fun and fair a game that made them laugh and smile a game that showed them how to balance their love
once upon a time there was a little pig named pinky pinky lived in a barn with his friends cow and chicken one day it rained so much that the barn started to leak pinky said oh no our barn is getting wet what can we do cow said lets put some hay on the ground to soak up the water chicken said good idea cow but then they realized they didnt have enough hay pinky said i know where we can get more hay farmer brown has a big field of hay cow said but farmer brown is always so bitter towards us he wont let us take his hay chicken said we have to try our barn is getting wet and we need more hay so pinky cow and chicken went to farmer browns field when they got there farmer brown was mad he said what are you doing here you always cause trouble pinky said our barn is getting wet can we please have some hay to soak up the water farmer brown thought for a moment and then said okay ill give you some hay but next time please ask nicely pinky cow and chicken were happy and thanked farmer brown they brought the hay back to the barn and put it on the ground to soak up the water

once upon a time there was a happy octopus who loved swimming in the deep sea every day he swam around looking for new places to explore one day the octopus was stirring the ocean with his tentacles when he came across something strange it was a huge colourful rock lying in the middle of the ocean the octopus was curious and excited so he swam closer to take a look as he swam around it he realised it was actually a giant egg he watched in amazement as the egg began to crack and out popped a cheerful baby octopus the happy octopus swam around in circles stirring the water with delight this new little octopus was so much fun and they quickly became the best of friends the two octopuses explored the ocean together swimming around and stirring up any adventures they could find they became the best of friends and had many wonderful underwater adventures

once upon a time there was a little boy named joe who loved exploring new places and new things he was always very curious and asked lots of questions one day joes mommy took him to the tall building to ride in the elevator joe was excited and asked all sorts of questions as they both got into the elevator joe asked his mommy mommy what is an elevator his mommy smiled and said it is a safe way to take us up to the higher floors joe was so amazed he wanted to ride the elevator again his mommy taught him a valuable lesson she said joe always be honest and understand people if you are honest and try to understand others they will do the same to you joe nodded and said i understand mommy from that day onwards joe was more honest and understanding in his daily life the moral of the story is that understanding and being honest can bring most positive outcomes and help us get along with others
once upon a time there was a boy named timmy who loved animals he had a toy leopard that he always played with one day timmys mom took him to the zoo to see real animals timmy was so excited at the zoo timmy saw a real leopard for the first time he was a bit scared but also curious he asked his mom can we go closer to test if the leopard is friendly his mom said no because its not safe to get too close to wild animals later they sat down on a bench to rest timmy said mommy this bench is so comfortable his mom smiled and said yes it is im glad you like it they sat there for a while watching the animals and talking about which ones they liked best timmy hugged his toy leopard tightly happy to have seen a real one
once upon a time there was a worm he was a very special worm because he was unique one day the worm was picking some food from the ground he was eating some yummy leaves and grass suddenly something special caught the worms eye he noticed a bright sparkly rock nearby it was so beautiful that he had to pick it up he was so excited he held it in his hand for a few moments then he carefully put it safely in a little hole in the ground the worm liked the sparkly rock so much that he went back every day to pick it up again he would lay down in the grass and hed look at it and enjoy its beauty he thought it was the most special thing in the world the friends of the worm were so impressed by the unique rock that they started picking up special objects of their own they kept their special objects in the same hole in the ground as the sparkly rock the worm was very proud of his special rock and he liked that he could share this unique treasure with his friends they all enjoyed picking up new things looking at them and having fun
once there was a boy and his name was tom he had a staff that a very special staff he knew it was special because it could fit anyplace tom went to the park to show off his special staff while he was there he saw a fake staff it looked just like his but it was made of plastic tom grabbed his staff and said that staff is not real mine is special and it fits the best tom showed the other kids how his staff was the best he could fit it around a tree he could even fit it through the playground bars everyone was amazed by toms special staff and thats how he knew it was the best
once upon a time there was an old blanket it was fuzzy and soft and it liked to roll around in the sunshine on windy days the blanket would roll and tumble on the grass enjoying the feeling of the breeze on its fibers one day a little girl found the old blanket she had never seen anything like it before and she thought it was so special she picked up the blanket and wrapped it around her shoulders like a shawl then she began to roll around the park with it the blanket and the little girl laughed and tumbled all around playing with each other they rolled by the pond underneath a big tree and up and down a big hill she would even pretend to fly with the blanket running and flapping it around like a pair of wings when the sun went down the little girl and the old blanket rolled all the way back home she tucked it under her pillow and fell fast asleep dreaming of their next adventure
